	declare all_root_notes[17] : string[] := ["C", "C#", "Db", "D", "D#", "Eb", "E", "F", "F#", "Gb", "G", "G#", "Ab", "A", "A#", "Bb", "B"] {Reuses: 0}

	declare _root_notes[2 * 12] : string[] {Reuses: 0}
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= 1) 
		ii{int} := 0
		while(ii{int} <= (12 - 1)) 
			int_buffer{int} := search[all_root_note_nums{int[]}, ii{int}]
			_root_notes[(i{int} * 12) + ii{int}]{string} := all_root_notes[int_buffer{int}]{string}
			if(ii{int} < (12 - 1))
				if(all_root_note_nums[int_buffer{int}]{int} = all_root_note_nums[int_buffer{int} + 1]{int})
					_root_notes[(i{int} * 12) + ii{int}]{string} := all_root_notes[int_buffer{int} + i{int}]{string}
				end if
			end if
			inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	declare _midi_notes[2 * 127] : string[] {Reuses: 0}
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= 1) 
		ii{int} := 0
		while(ii{int} <= 126) 
			_midi_notes[(i{int} * 127) + ii{int}]{string} := _root_notes[(i{int} * 12) + (ii{int} mod 12)]{string} & ((ii{int} / 12) - 2)
			inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while

		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (512 - 1)) 
			if((instrument.exists[i{int}]{int} = 1) and (instrument.is_in_melody[i{int}]{int} = 1))
				instrument.start_group[i{int}]{int} := get_group_idx(instrument.start_group_name[i{int}]{string}){Builtin, None}
				if(instrument.start_group[i{int}]{int} = NI_NOT_FOUND{int})
					message("could not find groups for " & instrument.names[i{int}]{string}){Builtin, None}
				else
					message("found " & instrument.names[i{int}]{string} & " at " & instrument.start_group[i{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
				end if
				if(instrument.type[i{int}]{int} = 0)
					instrument.num_groups[i{int}]{int} := instrument.rr_nums[i{int}]{int} + 1
				else
					if(instrument.type[i{int}]{int} = 1)
						instrument.num_groups[i{int}]{int} := ((instrument.dynamic_layers[i{int}]{int} + instrument.release_layers[i{int}]{int}) + 1) + (1 * sgn(instrument.release_layers[i{int}]{int}){Builtin, None})
					else
						if(instrument.type[i{int}]{int} = 2)
							instrument.num_groups[i{int}]{int} := ((6 + instrument.rr_nums[i{int}]{int}) + (3 * instrument.dynamic_layers[i{int}]{int})) + instrument.trans_groups[i{int}]{int}
						end if
					end if
				end if
			end if
			inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while

		declare btn_slot[2] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
		declare ui_button btn_slot0 : int  {Reuses: 0}
		declare ui_button btn_slot1 : int  {Reuses: 0}

				btn_sound[_iter0{int}]{int} := get_ui_id(btn_sound0{int}){Builtin, None} + _iter0{int}
				inc(_iter0{int}){Builtin, None}
			end while

		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (8 - 1)) 
			set_control_par_str(btn_sound[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, ""){Builtin, None}
			set_control_par_str(btn_sound[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, "transparent"){Builtin, None}
			set_control_par(btn_sound[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT_ALIGNMENT{int}, 1){Builtin, None}
			set_control_par(btn_sound[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE{int}, instrument_browser.font_value{int}){Builtin, None}
			set_control_par(btn_sound[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXTPOS_Y{int}, 3){Builtin, None}
			set_control_par(btn_sound[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}, (160 + 160) + (2 * 75)){Builtin, None}
			set_control_par(btn_sound[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}, 40 + (22 * i{int})){Builtin, None}
			set_control_par(btn_sound[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}, 160){Builtin, None}
			set_control_par(btn_sound[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT{int}, 20){Builtin, None}
			set_control_par(btn_sound[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PARENT_PANEL{int}, instrument_browser{int}){Builtin, None}
			set_control_par_str(btn_sound[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, instrument.names[i{int}]{string}){Builtin, None}
			set_control_par(btn_sound[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_DISABLE_TEXT_SHIFTING{int}, 1){Builtin, None}
			set_font_types(btn_sound[i{int}]{int}, fonts.regular_white{int[]}){UserDefined, Inlining}
			set_control_par_str(btn_sound[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HELP{int}, "Click to load sound."){Builtin, None}
			inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while

	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[meters.names{string[]}] - 1)) 
		add_menu_item(mnu_beats_per_bar{int}, meters.names[i{int}]{string}, i{int}){Builtin, None}
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	add_menu_item(mnu_beats_per_bar{int}, "Unsupported", 99){Builtin, None}

		preset_system.show(0){UserDefined, Inlining}

		main_display.open{UserDefined, Call}
	end if
end on

on note{thread-unsafe}
	ignore_event(EVENT_ID{int}){Builtin, None}
	console.print1(EVENT_NOTE{int}){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
	num_notes_pressed{int} := 0
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[KEY_DOWN{int[]}] - 1)) 
		num_notes_pressed{int} := KEY_DOWN[i{int}]{int} + num_notes_pressed{int}
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	playing_legato_note{int} := EVENT_NOTE{int}
	if(playing{int} = 0)
		slot{int} := 0
		while(slot{int} <= (2 - 1)) 
			inst.id{int} := slot.loaded_sound[slot.order[slot{int}]{int}]{int}
			if(inst.id{int} # - 1)
				ignore_input{int} := 0
				if(ignore_input{int} = 0)
					if(instrument.type[inst.id{int}]{int} = 0)
						one_shot(slot.order[slot{int}]{int}, EVENT_NOTE{int} + slot.note_offset[slot.order[slot{int}]{int}]{int}, none{int}, EVENT_VELOCITY{int}, none{int}, instrument.start_group[inst.id{int}]{int}, instrument.rr_nums[inst.id{int}]{int}, instrument.rr_cycle[inst.id{int}]{int}, - 1){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
						if(get_control_par(btn_octave_doubling[slot{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None} = 1)
							one_shot(slot.order[slot{int}]{int}, (EVENT_NOTE{int} + slot.note_offset[slot.order[slot{int}]{int}]{int}) + 12, none{int}, EVENT_VELOCITY{int}, none{int}, instrument.start_group[inst.id{int}]{int}, instrument.rr_nums[inst.id{int}]{int}, instrument.rr_cycle[inst.id{int}]{int}, - 1){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
						end if
					else
						if(instrument.type[inst.id{int}]{int} = 1)
							sustain(slot.order[slot{int}]{int}, EVENT_NOTE{int} + slot.note_offset[slot.order[slot{int}]{int}]{int}, none{int}, EVENT_VELOCITY{int}, _sustain.note_ids[(slot{int} * 128) + EVENT_NOTE{int}]{int}, instrument.start_group[inst.id{int}]{int}, instrument.dynamic_layers[inst.id{int}]{int}, instrument.rr_nums[inst.id{int}]{int}){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
							if(get_control_par(btn_octave_doubling[slot{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None} = 1)
								sustain(slot.order[slot{int}]{int}, (EVENT_NOTE{int} + slot.note_offset[slot.order[slot{int}]{int}]{int}) + 12, none{int}, EVENT_VELOCITY{int}, _sustain.note_ids[(slot{int} * 128) + EVENT_NOTE{int}]{int}, instrument.start_group[inst.id{int}]{int}, instrument.dynamic_layers[inst.id{int}]{int}, instrument.rr_nums[inst.id{int}]{int}){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
							end if
						else
							if(instrument.type[inst.id{int}]{int} = 2)
								if(in_range(EVENT_NOTE{int} + slot.note_offset[slot.order[slot{int}]{int}]{int}, instrument.range_low[inst.id{int}]{int}, instrument.range_high[inst.id{int}]{int}){Builtin, None})
									leg.note{int} := EVENT_NOTE{int} + slot.note_offset[slot.order[slot{int}]{int}]{int}
									leg.current_trans_group{int} := instrument.current_trans_group[inst.id{int}]{int}
									c.slot{int} := slot.order[slot{int}]{int}
									atk_group[slot.order[slot{int}]{int}]{int} := instrument.start_group[inst.id{int}]{int} + title_groups{int}
									atk_sus_group[slot.order[slot{int}]{int}]{int} := (atk_group[slot.order[slot{int}]{int}]{int} + instrument.rr_nums[inst.id{int}]{int}) + title_groups{int}
									sus_group[slot.order[slot{int}]{int}]{int} := (atk_sus_group[slot.order[slot{int}]{int}]{int} + instrument.dynamic_layers[inst.id{int}]{int}) + title_groups{int}
									sus_fx_group[slot.order[slot{int}]{int}]{int} := (sus_group[slot.order[slot{int}]{int}]{int} + instrument.dynamic_layers[inst.id{int}]{int}) + title_groups{int}
									trans_group[slot.order[slot{int}]{int}]{int} := (sus_fx_group[slot.order[slot{int}]{int}]{int} + (instrument.dynamic_layers[inst.id{int}]{int} * instrument.sustain_fx[inst.id{int}]{int})) + title_groups{int}
									sus_rls_group[slot.order[slot{int}]{int}]{int} := (trans_group[slot.order[slot{int}]{int}]{int} + instrument.trans_groups[inst.id{int}]{int}) + title_groups{int}
									interval[slot.order[slot{int}]{int}]{int} := (EVENT_NOTE{int} + slot.note_offset[slot.order[slot{int}]{int}]{int}) - last_note[slot.order[slot{int}]{int}]{int}
									if(((num_notes_pressed{int} > 1) and ((EVENT_NOTE{int} + slot.note_offset[slot.order[slot{int}]{int}]{int}) # last_note[slot.order[slot{int}]{int}]{int})) and (is_attack[slot.order[slot{int}]{int}]{int} # - 1))

	end if
end on

on ui_control(btn_save_confirm{int}){thread-unsafe}
	btn_save_confirm{int} := 0
	preset.overwrite{int} := (preset.overwrite{int} + 1) mod 2
	check.preset_overwrite{UserDefined, Inlining}
	if(preset.overwrite{int} = 0)
		if(saving_preset{int} = user.SAVES_NEW{int})
			save.preset{UserDefined, Inlining}
		else
			if(saving_preset{int} = user.EDITS_TAGS{int})
				edit.tags{UserDefined, Inlining}
			end if
		end if
		preset.overwrite{int} := 0
	end if
end on

			on_saving_preset_dialog{UserDefined, Call}

			edit.tags{UserDefined, Inlining}
		end if
	else
		btn_edit_tags{int} := 0
	end if
end on

	end if

				lead_user_preset_tags0[i{int}]{int} := 0

			end while
			array.clear(preset.array{int[]}){UserDefined, Inlining}

	end if
end on

on ui_control(file_browser{int}){thread-unsafe}
	preset.load_id{int} := load_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, fs_get_filename(get_ui_id(file_browser{int}){Builtin, None}, 2){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	wait_async(load_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, fs_get_filename(get_ui_id(file_browser{int}){Builtin, None}, 2){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	if(preset.usr_count{int} < 10)
		wait(5000){Builtin, None}
	end if
	message("file name: " & fs_get_filename(get_ui_id(file_browser{int}){Builtin, None}, 0){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	if((preset_scan{int} = 1) and (preset.array[preset.VERSION_IDX{int}]{int} # - 9999))
		if(preset.array[preset.VERSION_IDX{int}]{int} = PRODUCT_PRESET_VERSION{int})
			if((preset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX{int}]{int} = 1) and (get_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_scan_presets{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT{int}){Builtin, None} = 0))
				set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(lbl_scan_info{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, "Scanning Files: " & (preset.usr_display_num{int} + 1)){Builtin, None}
				save_scanned_preset_vars{UserDefined, Inlining}
				inc(preset.usr_display_num{int}){Builtin, None}
			else
				if(((preset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX{int}]{int} = 0) or (preset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX{int}]{int} = 1)) and (get_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_scan_presets{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT{int}){Builtin, None} = 1))
					set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(lbl_scan_info{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, "Scanning Files: " & (preset.usr_display_num{int} + 1)){Builtin, None}
					validate.user_preset_idx(preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{int}]{int}, preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{int}]{int}){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
					preset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX{int}]{int} := 1
					save_scanned_preset_vars{UserDefined, Inlining}
					inc(preset.usr_display_num{int}){Builtin, None}
					inc(preset.deleted_count{int}){Builtin, None}
				end if
			end if
			save_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, base_path{string} & fs_get_filename(get_ui_id(file_browser{int}){Builtin, None}, 0){Builtin, None} & ".nka"){Builtin, None}
		else
			if(preset.array[preset.VERSION_IDX{int}]{int} < 2)
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (num_elements[preset.array{int[]}] - 1)) 
					preset.arrayOG[i{int}]{int} := preset.array[i{int}]{int}
					preset.array[i{int}]{int} := 0
					inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
				end while
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= ((num_elements[preset.array{int[]}] - 1) - preset.CONTENT_IDX{int})) 
					preset.array[i{int} + preset.CONTENT_IDX{int}]{int} := preset.arrayOG[i{int}]{int}
					inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
				end while
				preset.array[preset.VERSION_IDX{int}]{int} := PRODUCT_PRESET_VERSION{int}
				preset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX{int}]{int} := 1
				floatmask.load(presetmask{int[]}, 0, 0){UserDefined, Inlining}
				floatmask.set(presetmask{int[]}, 2, 1){UserDefined, Inlining}
				preset.array[preset.TAGS0_IDX{int}]{int} := presetmask[0]{int}
				preset.array[preset.TAGS1_IDX{int}]{int} := presetmask[1]{int}
				validate.user_preset_idx(preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{int}]{int}, preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{int}]{int}){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
				set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(lbl_scan_info{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, "Scanning Files: " & "Old User Presets found"){Builtin, None}
				save_scanned_preset_vars{UserDefined, Inlining}
				inc(preset.usr_display_num{int}){Builtin, None}
				save_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, base_path{string} & fs_get_filename(get_ui_id(file_browser{int}){Builtin, None}, 0){Builtin, None} & ".nka"){Builtin, None}
			end if
		end if
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_scan_presets{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, 1){Builtin, None}
		fs_navigate(get_ui_id(file_browser{int}){Builtin, None}, 1){Builtin, None}
	else
		get_user_preset_after_scan{UserDefined, Inlining}
		save.resource_arrays{UserDefined, Inlining}
		preset.count{int} := preset.count{int} - NUM_USER_PRESETS{int}
		update.preset_situation{UserDefined, Call}
		i{int} := NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS{int}
		while(i{int} <= (NUM_PRESETS{int} - 1)) 
			lead_favorite_presets_array[i{int}]{int} := 0
			inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
		save.favorite_array{UserDefined, Inlining}
		saving_preset{int} := 0
		on_button_tag{UserDefined, Call}
		if(load_new{int} = 1)
			load_new{int} := 0
		end if
		update.btn_active_status{UserDefined, Call}
		btn_scan_presets{int} := 0
		on_btn_scan_presets{UserDefined, Call}
		preset_scan{int} := 0
	end if
end on

on async_complete
	if(NI_ASYNC_ID{int} = preset.load_id{int})
		if(NI_ASYNC_EXIT_STATUS{int} = 1)
			preset.load_id{int} := - 1
		else
			if(NI_ASYNC_EXIT_STATUS{int} = 0)
				preset.load_id{int} := 0
			end if
		end if
	end if
end on

	if((2 = 1) and (btn_fxrack_instrument_settings{int} = 0))
		show_fx_rack{int} := 0
	end if

	if(2 = 1)
		single_nki.gui_update{UserDefined, Call}
	end if
end on

	if(get_control_par(btn_lfo_sync[0]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None} = 1)
		frequency[0]{real} := ((tempo{real} * 24) / 60) / real(ticks_durations[(((get_control_par(sli_lfo_freq[0]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None} - 0) * ((num_elements[ticks_durations{int[]}] - 1) - 0)) / (1000000 - 0)) + 0]{int}){Builtin, None}

		set_control_par_str(lbl_lfo_freq[0]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, (int_to_real(real_to_int(frequency[0]{real} * 100){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None} / 100) & " Hz"){Builtin, None}
	end if
	set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(sli_lfo_freq0{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_LABEL{int}, get_control_par_str(lbl_lfo_freq[0]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}

on ui_control(xy_eq{real[]}){thread-unsafe}
	if(NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE{int} = NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_LEFT_BUTTON_DOWN{int})
		set_control_par(eq.lbl_band[0]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE{int}, fonts.regular_white[0]{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(eq.lbl_band[1]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE{int}, fonts.regular_white[0]{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(eq.lbl_band[2]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE{int}, fonts.regular_white[0]{int}){Builtin, None}
	end if
	if(NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE{int} = NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_LEFT_BUTTON_UP{int})
		xy_eq[0]{real} := real(get_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_FREQ1{int}, - 1, eq_position[active_slot{int}]{int} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + active_slot{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None} / 1e+06
		xy_eq[1]{real} := real(get_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_GAIN1{int}, - 1, eq_position[active_slot{int}]{int} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + active_slot{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None} / 1e+06
		xy_eq[2]{real} := real(get_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_FREQ2{int}, - 1, eq_position[active_slot{int}]{int} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + active_slot{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None} / 1e+06
		xy_eq[3]{real} := real(get_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_GAIN2{int}, - 1, eq_position[active_slot{int}]{int} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + active_slot{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None} / 1e+06
		xy_eq[4]{real} := real(get_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_FREQ3{int}, - 1, eq_position[active_slot{int}]{int} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + active_slot{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None} / 1e+06
		xy_eq[5]{real} := real(get_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_GAIN3{int}, - 1, eq_position[active_slot{int}]{int} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + active_slot{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None} / 1e+06
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(xy_eq{real[]}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_ACTIVE_INDEX{int}, - 1){Builtin, None}
		wait(1000000){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par_str(eq.lbl_param[0]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, "Freq"){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par_str(eq.lbl_param[1]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, "Q"){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par_str(eq.lbl_param[2]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, "Gain"){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(eq.lbl_band[0]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE{int}, fonts.regular_white[0]{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(eq.lbl_band[1]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE{int}, fonts.regular_white[0]{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(eq.lbl_band[2]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE{int}, fonts.regular_white[0]{int}){Builtin, None}
	else
		if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(xy_eq{real[]}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_ACTIVE_INDEX{int}){Builtin, None} # - 1)
			if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(xy_eq{real[]}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT{int}){Builtin, None} = 0)
				set_control_par(_eq.sli_freq[(active_slot{int} * 3) + (get_control_par(get_ui_id(xy_eq{real[]}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_ACTIVE_INDEX{int}){Builtin, None} / 2)]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, int(xy_eq[get_control_par(get_ui_id(xy_eq{real[]}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_ACTIVE_INDEX{int}){Builtin, None}]{real} * 1e+06){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
				set_control_par(_eq.sli_gain[(active_slot{int} * 3) + (get_control_par(get_ui_id(xy_eq{real[]}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_ACTIVE_INDEX{int}){Builtin, None} / 2)]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, int(xy_eq[get_control_par(get_ui_id(xy_eq{real[]}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_ACTIVE_INDEX{int}){Builtin, None} + 1]{real} * 1e+06){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
				set_eq_freq(active_slot{int}, get_control_par(get_ui_id(xy_eq{real[]}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_ACTIVE_INDEX{int}){Builtin, None} / 2, get_control_par(_eq.sli_freq[(active_slot{int} * 3) + (get_control_par(get_ui_id(xy_eq{real[]}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_ACTIVE_INDEX{int}){Builtin, None} / 2)]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}){UserDefined, Inlining}

			while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
				mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR"){Builtin, None}
				tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, get_control_par(sli_release[1]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}){Builtin, None}
				string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
				inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
			end while
		else
			if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
					mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
					tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
					set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, get_control_par(sli_release[1]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}){Builtin, None}
					string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
					inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
				end while
			else
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
					i{int} := 0
					while(i{int} <= ((instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - (((instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - 0) .and. sh_right((instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - 0, 31){Builtin, None}))) 
						ii{int} := 0
						while(ii{int} <= ((instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - (((instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - 0) .and. sh_right((instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - 0, 31){Builtin, None}))) 
							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR"){Builtin, None}
							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
							set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, get_control_par(sli_release[1]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}){Builtin, None}
							string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
							inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
						end while
						inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
					end while
				end if
			end if
		end if
		if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
			set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(lbl_release{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, string_buffer{string}){Builtin, None}
			timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_release{int}){Builtin, None}, "Release", 0){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
		end if
	end if
	set_control_par_str(sli_release[1]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_LABEL{int}, string_buffer{string}){Builtin, None}
	nks.update_attack_release_labels{UserDefined, Call}
end on

	mtx.combine(_rhythm.transition_matrix{int[]}, _rhythm.train_matrix{int[]}, sli_import_weight_rhythm{int}, 9){UserDefined, Inlining}

on ui_control(msa_import_midi{int}){thread-unsafe}
	if(NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE{int} = NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_DROP{int})
		console.print("Imported " & num_elements[NI_DND_ITEMS_MIDI{string[]}] & " item(s)"){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (num_elements[NI_DND_ITEMS_MIDI{string[]}] - 1)) 
			wait_async(mf_insert_file(NI_DND_ITEMS_MIDI[i{int}]{string}, 0, 0, 0){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
			mf_get_first(- 1){Builtin, None}
			last_end{int} := 0
			while(mf_get_event_par(mf_get_id(){Builtin, None}, EVENT_PAR_MIDI_BYTE_1{int}){Builtin, None} # 0) 
				octify(imported.pitch{int}, mf_get_event_par(mf_get_id(){Builtin, None}, EVENT_PAR_MIDI_BYTE_1{int}){Builtin, None} mod 12){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
				imported.length{int} := search[RHYTHM.LENGTHS{int[]}, mf_get_event_par(mf_get_id(){Builtin, None}, EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH{int}){Builtin, None} / (960 / 4)]
				if(last_end{int} = mf_get_event_par(mf_get_id(){Builtin, None}, EVENT_PAR_POS{int}){Builtin, None})
					last_end{int} := mf_get_event_par(mf_get_id(){Builtin, None}, EVENT_PAR_POS{int}){Builtin, None} + mf_get_event_par(mf_get_id(){Builtin, None}, EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH{int}){Builtin, None}
					mf_get_next(- 1){Builtin, None}
				else
					imported.pitch{int} := 0
					imported.length{int} := search[RHYTHM.LENGTHS{int[]}, (mf_get_event_par(mf_get_id(){Builtin, None}, EVENT_PAR_POS{int}){Builtin, None} - last_end{int}) / (960 / 4)]
					last_end{int} := mf_get_event_par(mf_get_id(){Builtin, None}, EVENT_PAR_POS{int}){Builtin, None}
				end if
				message("imported " & imported.pitch{int} & " | " & imported.length{int}){Builtin, None}
				inc(_pitch.train_matrix[(imported.last_pitches[2]{int} * 343) + ((imported.last_pitches[1]{int} * 49) + ((imported.last_pitches[0]{int} * 7) + imported.pitch{int}))]{int}){Builtin, None}
				array.cascade(imported.last_pitches{int[]}, imported.pitch{int}){UserDefined, Inlining}
				if(imported.length{int} # - 1)
					inc(_rhythm.train_matrix[(imported.last_rhythms[2]{int} * 729) + ((imported.last_rhythms[1]{int} * 81) + ((imported.last_rhythms[0]{int} * 9) + imported.length{int}))]{int}){Builtin, None}
					array.cascade(imported.last_rhythms{int[]}, imported.length{int}){UserDefined, Inlining}
				end if
			end while
			inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
		mtx.normalize(_pitch.train_matrix{int[]}, 7){UserDefined, Inlining}
		mtx.normalize(_rhythm.train_matrix{int[]}, 9){UserDefined, Inlining}
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(UI_import_display{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
	end if
end on

		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while

on ui_control(sli_volume0{int})
	sli_volume.moved{int} := 1
	s{int} := sli_volume0{int} - sli_volume.previous[0]{int}
	if(in_range(sli_volume_min0{int} + s{int}, 0, 499039){Builtin, None} and in_range(sli_volume_max0{int} + s{int}, 0, 499039){Builtin, None})
		sli_volume_min0{int} := sli_volume_min0{int} + s{int}
		sli_volume_max0{int} := sli_volume_max0{int} + s{int}
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, get_control_par(sli_volume_min[0]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + 0){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par_str(lbl_volume_min[0]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + 0){Builtin, None} & " dB"){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par_str(sli_volume_min[0]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_LABEL{int}, get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + 0){Builtin, None} & " dB"){Builtin, None}
		timed_display.trigger(lbl_volume_min[0]{int}, "Min", 0){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, get_control_par(sli_volume_max[0]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + 0){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par_str(lbl_volume_max[0]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + 0){Builtin, None} & " dB"){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par_str(sli_volume_max[0]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_LABEL{int}, get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + 0){Builtin, None} & " dB"){Builtin, None}
		timed_display.trigger(lbl_volume_max[0]{int}, "Max", 0){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
	else
		sli_volume0{int} := sli_volume.previous[0]{int}
	end if
	sli_volume.previous[0]{int} := sli_volume0{int}
	execute_morph_faders{UserDefined, Call}
end on

on ui_control(sli_volume_min0{int})
	if(abs(sli_volume_min0{int} - sli_volume_max0{int}){Builtin, None} < 10000)
		sli_volume_min0{int} := sli_volume_max0{int}
	end if
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, get_control_par(sli_volume_min[0]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + 0){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par_str(lbl_volume_min[0]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + 0){Builtin, None} & " dB"){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par_str(sli_volume_min[0]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_LABEL{int}, get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + 0){Builtin, None} & " dB"){Builtin, None}
	timed_display.trigger(lbl_volume_min[0]{int}, "Min", 0){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
	execute_morph_faders{UserDefined, Call}
end on

on ui_control(sli_volume_max0{int})
	if(abs(sli_volume_max0{int} - sli_volume_min0{int}){Builtin, None} < 10000)
		sli_volume_max0{int} := sli_volume_min0{int}
	end if
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, get_control_par(sli_volume_max[0]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + 0){Builtin, None}

on ui_control(sli_volume1{int})
	sli_volume.moved{int} := 1
	s{int} := sli_volume1{int} - sli_volume.previous[1]{int}
	if(in_range(sli_volume_min1{int} + s{int}, 0, 499039){Builtin, None} and in_range(sli_volume_max1{int} + s{int}, 0, 499039){Builtin, None})
		sli_volume_min1{int} := sli_volume_min1{int} + s{int}
		sli_volume_max1{int} := sli_volume_max1{int} + s{int}
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, get_control_par(sli_volume_min[1]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + 1){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par_str(lbl_volume_min[1]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + 1){Builtin, None} & " dB"){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par_str(sli_volume_min[1]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_LABEL{int}, get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + 1){Builtin, None} & " dB"){Builtin, None}
		timed_display.trigger(lbl_volume_min[1]{int}, "Min", 0){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, get_control_par(sli_volume_max[1]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + 1){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par_str(lbl_volume_max[1]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + 1){Builtin, None} & " dB"){Builtin, None}

		timed_display.trigger(lbl_volume_max[1]{int}, "Max", 0){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
	else
		sli_volume1{int} := sli_volume.previous[1]{int}
	end if
	sli_volume.previous[1]{int} := sli_volume1{int}
	execute_morph_faders{UserDefined, Call}
end on

on ui_control(btn_open_import{int}){thread-unsafe}
	wait_async(load_array_str(transfer.array{int[]}, get_folder(GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR{int}){Builtin, None} & "../.transfer" & "/_transfer__chord_array.nka"){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[_transfer.chord_array{int[]}] - 1)) 
		_transfer.chord_array[i{int}]{int} := transfer.array[i{int}]{int}
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (1 - 1)) 
		transfer.additional_info[i{int}]{int} := transfer.array[(16 * 6) + i{int}]{int}
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= ((2 * 8) - 1)) 
		ii{int} := 0
		while(ii{int} <= (6 - 1)) 
			_chords[(i{int} * 6) + ii{int}]{int} := _transfer.chord_array[(i{int} * 6) + ii{int}]{int}
			inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	mnu_beats_per_bar{int} := 0 - ((0 - search[meters.translation{int[]}, transfer.additional_info[0]{int}]) .and. sh_right(0 - search[meters.translation{int[]}, transfer.additional_info[0]{int}], 31){Builtin, None})
	meter.update{UserDefined, Call}
	guess_root_key_from_chords{UserDefined, Call}
	apply_root_key_to_chords{UserDefined, Call}
	midi_main_display.update_chords{UserDefined, Call}
	btn_open_import{int} := 0
end on

			btn_chord.key_shift{int} := get_control_par(get_ui_id(_btn_chord0{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_KEY_SHIFT{int}){Builtin, None}
			btn_chord.key_control{int} := get_control_par(get_ui_id(_btn_chord0{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_KEY_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
			btn_chord.key_alt{int} := get_control_par(get_ui_id(_btn_chord0{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT{int}){Builtin, None}
			btn_chord.special_functions{UserDefined, Call}
			set_control_par(get_ui_id(_btn_chord0{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, 0){Builtin, None}
		else
			chord_selector.open{UserDefined, Call}
		end if

		chord_selector.close{UserDefined, Call}
	end if

on ui_control(btn_clear_melody{int})
	undo.create{UserDefined, Call}
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (((8 * 7) * 4) - 1)) 
		_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((i{int} * 3) + 1)]{int} := - 1
		_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((i{int} * 3) + 2)]{int} := 0
		_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + (i{int} * 3)]{int} := 0
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	midi_main_display.update_notes{UserDefined, Call}
	melody.exists{int} := 0
	btn_clear_melody{int} := 0
end on

		click.y{int} := real_to_int(round(abs(1 - xy_time_selector[1]{real}){Builtin, None} * int_to_real((2 * 40) + ((2 - 1) * 30)){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None} / (40 + 30)
		time_selection.start{int} := click.x{int} + ((click.y{int} * 4) * beats_per_bar{int})
		time_selection.end{int} := time_selection.start{int}
		play_pos{int} := int(round(real(time_selection.start{int} * 4){Builtin, None} * midi_steps{real}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
		starting_pos{int} := play_pos{int}
		current_structure_part{int} := time_selection.start{int} / (beats_per_bar{int} * 2)
		structure_selection_display.open{UserDefined, Call}
		cursor.update{UserDefined, Call}
		legato.stop_all{UserDefined, Call}
	end if

									legato_release(inst.slot{int}, instrument.last_played_note[inst.slot{int}]{int}, none{int}, leg.note_id[inst.slot{int}]{int}, leg.release_id{int}, instrument.start_group[inst.id{int}]{int}, instrument.dynamic_layers[inst.id{int}]{int}, instrument.rr_nums[inst.id{int}]{int}, instrument.trans_groups[inst.id{int}]{int}){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
									instrument.trigger_transition[inst.slot{int}]{int} := 0
								end if
							end if
						end if
					end if
				end if
			end if
			inc(inst.slot{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
	end if
	midi_edit_display.update_notes{UserDefined, Call}
	midi_update_flag{int} := 1
end on

on ui_control(btn_tool_add{int})
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_tool_edit{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, 0){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_tool_cursor{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, 0){Builtin, None}

end on

on ui_control(btn_tool_edit{int})
	if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_tool_edit{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None} = 0)
		tool_edit_state{int} := (tool_edit_state{int} + 1) mod 4
		select(tool_edit_state{int})
		case 0
			set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(btn_tool_edit{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, "btn_melody_edit_move+scale"){Builtin, None}
		case 1
			set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(btn_tool_edit{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, "btn_melody_edit_move"){Builtin, None}
		case 2
			set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(btn_tool_edit{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, "btn_melody_edit_scale_left"){Builtin, None}
		case 3
			set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(btn_tool_edit{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, "btn_melody_edit_scale_right"){Builtin, None}
		end select
	end if
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_tool_cursor{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, 0){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_tool_add{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, 0){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_tool_velocity{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, 0){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_tool_edit{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, 1){Builtin, None}
	current_tool{int} := tool_edit_state{int}
end on

on ui_control(btn_tool_remove{int})
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= multiselection{int}) 
		_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((selected_notes[i{int}]{int} * 3) + 1)]{int} := - 1
		_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + (selected_notes[i{int}]{int} * 3)]{int} := 0
		_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((selected_notes[i{int}]{int} * 3) + 2)]{int} := 0
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	midi_edit_display.update_notes{UserDefined, Call}
end on

on ui_control(btn_tool_copy{int})
	multiselection.sort{UserDefined, Call}
	if(multiselection{int} > - 1)
		note.get_length(int_buffer{int}, _melody{int[]}, current_segment{int}, selected_notes[multiselection{int}]{int}, ((8 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) - 1){UserDefined, Inlining}
		message("note at " & selected_notes[multiselection{int}]{int} & " has len " & int_buffer{int}){Builtin, None}
		melody.copy.length{int} := 0
		message("copy from " & selected_notes[0]{int} & " to " & ((selected_notes[multiselection{int}]{int} + int_buffer{int}) - 1)){Builtin, None}
		i{int} := selected_notes[0]{int}
		while(i{int} <= ((selected_notes[multiselection{int}]{int} + int_buffer{int}) - 1)) 
			ii{int} := 0
			while(ii{int} <= (3 - 1)) 
				_melody.copy[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((melody.copy.length{int} * 3) + ii{int})]{int} := _melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((i{int} * 3) + ii{int})]{int}
				inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
			end while
			message("check " & _melody.copy[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((melody.copy.length{int} * 3) + 1)]{int}){Builtin, None}
			if((_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((i{int} * 3) + 1)]{int} # - 1) and (search[selected_notes{int[]}, i{int}] = - 1))
				_melody.copy[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((melody.copy.length{int} * 3) + 1)]{int} := - 1
			end if
			inc(melody.copy.length{int}){Builtin, None}
			inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
		btn_tool_copy{int} := 0
	end if
end on

on ui_control(btn_tool_paste{int})
	undo.create{UserDefined, Call}
	message("paste from " & int(real(starting_pos{int}){Builtin, None} / midi_steps{real}){Builtin, None} & " to " & ((int(real(starting_pos{int}){Builtin, None} / midi_steps{real}){Builtin, None} + melody.copy.length{int}) - 1)){Builtin, None}
	i{int} := int(real(starting_pos{int}){Builtin, None} / midi_steps{real}){Builtin, None}
	while(i{int} <= ((int(real(starting_pos{int}){Builtin, None} / midi_steps{real}){Builtin, None} + melody.copy.length{int}) - 1)) 
		ii{int} := 0
		while(ii{int} <= (3 - 1)) 
			_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((i{int} * 3) + ii{int})]{int} := _melody.copy[(current_segment{int} * 672) + (((i{int} - int(real(starting_pos{int}){Builtin, None} / midi_steps{real}){Builtin, None}) * 3) + ii{int})]{int}
			inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	midi_edit_display.update_notes{UserDefined, Call}
	btn_tool_paste{int} := 0
	midi_update_flag{int} := 1
end on

	subbeat_buffer{int} := get_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_edit_subbeat0{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}
	undo.create{UserDefined, Call}
	if(subbeat_buffer{int} = 0)
		_melody_rates[0]{int} := 4
	else
		_melody_rates[0]{int} := 3
	end if
	empty_unused_values{UserDefined, Call}
	midi_edit_display.update_allround{UserDefined, Call}
	midi_edit_display.update_bars{UserDefined, Call}

end on

on ui_control(btn_chord_type_prev_group{int})
	if(active_chord_type_group{int} > 0)
		active_chord_type_group{int} := (active_chord_type_group{int} + 3) mod 4
		chord_type_group_offset{int} := 8 * active_chord_type_group{int}
		update_type_buttons{UserDefined, Call}
		ui.update_next_prev_group_buttons{UserDefined, Call}
		btn_chord_type_prev_group{int} := 0
	end if
end on

on ui_control(btn_chord_type_next_group{int})
	if(active_chord_type_group{int} < 3)
		active_chord_type_group{int} := (active_chord_type_group{int} + 1) mod 4
		chord_type_group_offset{int} := 8 * active_chord_type_group{int}
		update_type_buttons{UserDefined, Call}
		ui.update_next_prev_group_buttons{UserDefined, Call}
		btn_chord_type_next_group{int} := 0
	end if
end on

	get_accidental_from_root_key{UserDefined, Call}
	apply_root_key_to_chords{UserDefined, Call}
end on

	root_key[0]{int} := mnu_root_key.key{int}
	get_accidental_from_root_key{UserDefined, Call}
	apply_root_key_to_chords{UserDefined, Call}
end on

on ui_control(btn_play{int}){thread-unsafe}
	if(btn_play{int} = 1)
		if(edit_suggestion.play_pos_buffer{int} # - 1)
			play_pos{int} := edit_suggestion.play_pos_buffer{int}
		else
			play_pos{int} := starting_pos{int}
		end if
		playing{int} := 1
	else
		playing{int} := 0
		engine.reset{UserDefined, Call}
	end if
end on

on ui_control(btn_alert_box_deny{int})
	alert_box.close{UserDefined, Call}
	mnu_beats_per_bar{int} := search[meters.beats{int[]}, beats_per_bar{int}]
	btn_alert_box_deny{int} := 0
end on

on ui_control(btn_alert_box_confirm{int})
	alert_box.close{UserDefined, Call}
	beats_per_bar{int} := host_manager.beats_per_bar_new{int}
	tempo.internal_multiplier{real} := host_manager.internal_multiplier_new{real}
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (((8 * 7) * 4) - 1)) 
		_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((i{int} * 3) + 1)]{int} := - 1
		_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((i{int} * 3) + 2)]{int} := 0
		_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + (i{int} * 3)]{int} := 0
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	melody.exists{int} := 0
	undo.flush{UserDefined, Call}
	tempo.update{UserDefined, Call}
	midi_edit_display.update_allround{UserDefined, Call}
	midi_main_display.update_bars{UserDefined, Call}
	midi_main_display.update_notes{UserDefined, Call}
	midi_edit_display.update_bars{UserDefined, Call}
	btn_alert_box_confirm{int} := 0
end on

	scroll_instr_offset{int} := (1000000 - sli_lead_scrollbar{int}) / (1000000 / (current_instr_num{int} - 8))
	instrument_browser.update_scroll{UserDefined, Call}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(sli_lead_scrollhandle{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}, get_control_par(get_ui_id(sli_lead_scrollbar{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}){Builtin, None} + ((brwsr_sli_scroll_height{int} - lead_handle_size{int}) - ((sli_lead_scrollbar{int} * (brwsr_sli_scroll_height{int} - lead_handle_size{int})) / 1000000))){Builtin, None}
end on

	if(search[slot.loaded_sound{int[]}, _instrument_browser.structure[(current_category{int} * 176) + ((current_section{int} * 16) + scroll_instr_offset{int})]{int}] = - 1)
		instrument.load(active_slot{int}, _instrument_browser.structure[(current_category{int} * 176) + ((current_section{int} * 16) + scroll_instr_offset{int})]{int}){UserDefined, Inlining}
		if(btn_override_fx{int} = 1)
			message("load fx preset " & resources_path{string} & "fxpreset" & slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int} & ".nka"){Builtin, None}
			wait_async(load_array_str(fxRack.save_array{int[]}, resources_path{string} & "fxpreset" & slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int} & ".nka"){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
			fxRack.load{UserDefined, Call}
		end if
		main_display.update{UserDefined, Call}
		instrument_browser.update{UserDefined, Call}
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_fxrack_top_line{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
	end if
end on

	set_control_par(get_ui_id(UI_help{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
	btn_help{int} := 0
end on

on ui_control(btn_help{int})
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[help_trigger_controls{int[]}] - 1)) 
		if(get_control_par(help_trigger_controls[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}){Builtin, None} = HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int})
			set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(lbl_help_overlay{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, help_pictures[i{int}]{string}){Builtin, None}
			i{int} := num_elements[help_trigger_controls{int[]}] - 1
		end if
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	if(btn_main_view{int} = 1)
		set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(lbl_help_overlay{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, help_pictures[2]{string}){Builtin, None}
	end if
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(UI_help{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, hide_state[btn_help{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
end on

function controller_callback
	if(current_controller{int} = dyn_cc_num{int})
		motion.modwheel{int} := CC[current_controller{int}]{int}
		message("motion.modwheel = " & motion.modwheel{int} & ", CC = " & CC[current_controller{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
		motion.mw_animation{UserDefined, Call}
		motion.apply_modwheel{UserDefined, Call}
	end if
	execute_morph_faders{UserDefined, Call}
	set_controller(101, CC[1]{int}){Builtin, None}
	set_controller(103, CC[1]{int}){Builtin, None}
	set_event_par_arr(- 1, EVENT_PAR_MOD_VALUE_ID{int}, int((1e+06 * real(CC[1]{int}){Builtin, None}) / 127){Builtin, None}, 1){Builtin, None}
end function

function bitlist.set_range(bit_list : int, start_idx : int, end_idx : int, val : int)
	bit_list{int} := (- sh_right(abs(val{int} - 1){Builtin, None} - 1, 31){Builtin, None} * ((- sh_right(abs((end_idx{int} - start_idx{int}) - 32){Builtin, None} - 1, 31){Builtin, None} * sh_right(- 1, 32){Builtin, None}) + (bit_list{int} .or. sh_left(.not. sh_left(- 1, end_idx{int} - start_idx{int}){Builtin, None}, 32 - end_idx{int}){Builtin, None}))) + (- sh_right(abs(val{int} - 0){Builtin, None} - 1, 31){Builtin, None} * (- sh_right((end_idx{int} - start_idx{int}) - 32, 31){Builtin, None} * (bit_list{int} .and. .not. sh_left(.not. sh_left(- 1, end_idx{int} - start_idx{int}){Builtin, None}, 32 - end_idx{int}){Builtin, None})))
end function

function array.clear(array : int[])
	lib.i{int} := 0
	while(lib.i{int} <= (num_elements[array{int[]}] - 1)) 
		array[lib.i{int}]{int} := 0
		inc(lib.i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function array.max(result : int, array : int[])
	result{int} := array[0]{int}
	lib.i{int} := 1
	while(lib.i{int} <= (num_elements[array{int[]}] - 1)) 
		result{int} := array[lib.i{int}]{int} - ((array[lib.i{int}]{int} - result{int}) .and. sh_right(array[lib.i{int}]{int} - result{int}, 31){Builtin, None})
		inc(lib.i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function array.cumsum(array : int[], new_array : int[])
	lib.i{int} := 0
	while(lib.i{int} <= (num_elements[array{number[]}] - 1)) 
		new_array[lib.i{int}]{number} := new_array[0 - ((0 - (lib.i{int} - 1)) .and. sh_right(0 - (lib.i{int} - 1), 31){Builtin, None})]{number} + array[lib.i{int}]{number}
		inc(lib.i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function array.insert(array : int[], idx : int, val : int)
	lib.i{int} := num_elements[array{[]}] - 2
	while(lib.i{int} >= idx{unknown}) 
		array[lib.i{int} + 1]{unknown} := array[lib.i{int}]{unknown}
		dec(lib.i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	array[idx{unknown}]{unknown} := val{unknown}
end function

function floatmask.load(float_mask : int[], bit_list1 : int, bit_list2 : int)
	float_mask[0]{unknown} := bit_list1{unknown}
	float_mask[1]{unknown} := bit_list2{unknown}
end function

function floatmask.clear(float_mask : int[])
	float_mask[0]{int} := 0
	float_mask[1]{int} := 0
end function

function floatmask.control_to_floatmask(float_mask : int[], control_array : int[])
	lib.i{int} := 0
	while(lib.i{int} <= ((64 - ((64 - num_elements[control_array{[]}]) .and. sh_right(num_elements[control_array{[]}] - 64, 31){Builtin, None})) - 1)) 
		floatmask.set(float_mask{int[]}, lib.i{int}, get_control_par(control_array[lib.i{int}]{unknown}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}){UserDefined, Inlining}
		inc(lib.i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function floatmask.set(float_mask : int[], idx : int, val : int)
	float_mask[idx{int} / 32]{int} := (float_mask[idx{int} / 32]{int} .and. .not. sh_left(1, (31 - idx{int}) mod 32){Builtin, None}) .or. sh_left(val{int}, (31 - idx{int}) mod 32){Builtin, None}
end function

function floatmask.set_range(float_mask : int[], start_idx : int, end_idx : int, val : int)
	bitlist.set_range(float_mask[0]{int}, 32 - ((32 - start_idx{int}) .and. sh_right(start_idx{int} - 32, 31){Builtin, None}), 32 - ((32 - end_idx{int}) .and. sh_right(end_idx{int} - 32, 31){Builtin, None}), val{int}){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
	bitlist.set_range(float_mask[1]{int}, (32 - ((32 - start_idx{int}) .and. sh_right(32 - start_idx{int}, 31){Builtin, None})) - 32, (32 - ((32 - end_idx{int}) .and. sh_right(32 - end_idx{int}, 31){Builtin, None})) - 32, val{int}){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
end function

function floatmask.get_range(float_mask : int[], start_idx : int, end_idx : int, return_mask : int[])
	return_mask[0]{int} := (- sh_right(abs(((32 - ((32 - end_idx{int}) .and. sh_right(end_idx{int} - 32, 31){Builtin, None})) - (32 - ((32 - start_idx{int}) .and. sh_right(start_idx{int} - 32, 31){Builtin, None}))) - 32){Builtin, None} - 1, 31){Builtin, None} * float_mask[0]{int}) + sh_left(sh_right(float_mask[0]{int}, 32 - (32 - ((32 - end_idx{int}) .and. sh_right(end_idx{int} - 32, 31){Builtin, None}))){Builtin, None} .and. .not. sh_left(- 1, (32 - ((32 - end_idx{int}) .and. sh_right(end_idx{int} - 32, 31){Builtin, None})) - (32 - ((32 - start_idx{int}) .and. sh_right(start_idx{int} - 32, 31){Builtin, None}))){Builtin, None}, 32 - (32 - ((32 - end_idx{int}) .and. sh_right(end_idx{int} - 32, 31){Builtin, None}))){Builtin, None}
	return_mask[1]{int} := (- sh_right(abs((((32 - ((32 - end_idx{int}) .and. sh_right(32 - end_idx{int}, 31){Builtin, None})) - 32) - ((32 - ((32 - start_idx{int}) .and. sh_right(32 - start_idx{int}, 31){Builtin, None})) - 32)) - 32){Builtin, None} - 1, 31){Builtin, None} * float_mask[1]{int}) + sh_left(sh_right(float_mask[1]{int}, 32 - ((32 - ((32 - end_idx{int}) .and. sh_right(32 - end_idx{int}, 31){Builtin, None})) - 32)){Builtin, None} .and. .not. sh_left(- 1, ((32 - ((32 - end_idx{int}) .and. sh_right(32 - end_idx{int}, 31){Builtin, None})) - 32) - ((32 - ((32 - start_idx{int}) .and. sh_right(32 - start_idx{int}, 31){Builtin, None})) - 32)){Builtin, None}, 32 - ((32 - ((32 - end_idx{int}) .and. sh_right(32 - end_idx{int}, 31){Builtin, None})) - 32)){Builtin, None}
end function

function floatmask.and(float_mask1 : int[], float_mask2 : int[], return_mask : int[])
	return_mask[0]{int} := float_mask1[0]{int} .and. float_mask2[0]{int}
	return_mask[1]{int} := float_mask1[1]{int} .and. float_mask2[1]{int}
end function

function floatmask.or(float_mask1 : int[], float_mask2 : int[], return_mask : int[])
	return_mask[0]{int} := float_mask1[0]{int} .or. float_mask2[0]{int}
	return_mask[1]{int} := float_mask1[1]{int} .or. float_mask2[1]{int}
end function

function floatmask.not(float_mask : int[], return_mask : int[])
	return_mask[0]{int} := .not. float_mask[0]{int}
	return_mask[1]{int} := .not. float_mask[1]{int}
end function

function Rand(result : int, min : int, max : int)
	___M.Seed{int} := (8088405 * ___M.Seed{int}) + 1
	result{int} := ((sh_right(___M.Seed{int}, 8){Builtin, None} .and. 16777215) mod ((max{int} - min{int}) + 1)) + min{int}
end function

function RandomSeed
	___M.Seed{int} := KSP_TIMER{int}
end function

end function

	if(search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}] = - 1)
		preset.idx{int} := 0
	end if
	btn_scan_presets{int} := 0

	update.btn_active_status{UserDefined, Call}
	on_button_tag{UserDefined, Call}
end function

function clear_tags
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[tag_button_array{int[]}] - 1)) 
		set_control_par(tag_button_array[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, 0){Builtin, None}
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	floatmask.clear(bit_list{int[]}){UserDefined, Inlining}
end function

function get_category_idx(result : int, tag_idx : int)
	i{int} := 0
	while((i{int} < num_elements[category_accum{int[]}]) and (category_accum[i{int}]{int} <= tag_idx{int})) 
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	result{int} := 0 - ((0 - (i{int} - 1)) .and. sh_right(0 - (i{int} - 1), 31){Builtin, None})
end function

	if(preset.idx{int} # - 1)
		set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(btn_presetBrowser{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, preset_title_array[search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{string}){Builtin, None}

	floatmask.load(presetmask{int[]}, preset_tags0[search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{int}, preset_tags1[search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{int}){UserDefined, Inlining}
	set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(btn_edit_tags{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, btn_edit_pics[abs(((sh_right(presetmask[2 / 32]{int}, (31 - 2) mod 32){Builtin, None} .and. 1) * preset.allow_user{int}) - 1){Builtin, None}]{string}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(btn_delete_preset{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, btn_delete_pics[abs(((sh_right(presetmask[2 / 32]{int}, (31 - 2) mod 32){Builtin, None} .and. 1) * preset.allow_user{int}) - 1){Builtin, None}]{string}){Builtin, None}
	saving_disabled{int} := abs(((sh_right(presetmask[2 / 32]{int}, (31 - 2) mod 32){Builtin, None} .and. 1) * preset.allow_user{int}) - 1){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par_str(tag_button_array[24 - 1]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, btn_favorite_pics[0]{string}){Builtin, None}
	if((search[final_lead_favorite_presets_array{int[]}, 1] = - 1) and ((sh_right(bit_list[(24 - 1) / 32]{int}, (31 - (24 - 1)) mod 32){Builtin, None} .and. 1) = 0))
		set_control_par_str(tag_button_array[24 - 1]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, btn_favorite_pics[1]{string}){Builtin, None}
	end if
end function

function update.scrollarea
	repaint.scrollarea{UserDefined, Call}
	sli_scrollbar{int} := 1000000 - ((1000000 / (NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} - 12)) * scroll.up{int})
end function

function repaint.scrollarea
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (12 - 1)) 
		set_control_par_str(btn_preset_button[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, "      " & final_preset_title_array[i{int} + scroll.up{int}]{string}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par_str(lbl_preset_info[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, final_preset_info[i{int} + scroll.up{int}]{string}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(btn_preset_button[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, btn_preset_onoff[i{int} + scroll.up{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(lbl_preset_info[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE{int}, fonts.smaller_font[get_control_par(btn_preset_button[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}]{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(btn_preset_favorite[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, final_lead_favorite_presets_array[i{int} + scroll.up{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(btn_preset_button[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, hide_state[end_of_presets_array[i{int} + scroll.up{int}]{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(lbl_preset_info[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, hide_state[end_of_presets_array[i{int} + scroll.up{int}]{int} * 1]{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(btn_preset_favorite[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, hide_state[end_of_presets_array[i{int} + scroll.up{int}]{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	if(abs(sh_right(abs(1 + sh_right(abs(bit_list[0]{int} + bit_list[1]{int}){Builtin, None} - 1, 31){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None} - 1, 31){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None} = 1)
		scroll.up_origin{int} := scroll.up{int}
	end if
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_scrollhandle{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}, get_control_par(get_ui_id(sli_scrollbar{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}){Builtin, None} + ((249 - handle_size{int}) - ((sli_scrollbar{int} * (249 - handle_size{int})) / 1000000))){Builtin, None}
end function

function on_button_tag override
{thread-unsafe}
	bit_list2[0]{int} := bit_list[0]{int}
	bit_list2[1]{int} := bit_list[1]{int}
	if((saving_preset{int} = 0) and (tag_button_pressed{int} = 0))
		tag_button_pressed{int} := 1
		filter_presets{UserDefined, Call}
		if(NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} = 0)
			p{int} := 24 - 1
			while((NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} = 0) and (p{int} >= 0)) 
				if((sh_right(bit_list[p{int} / 32]{int}, (31 - p{int}) mod 32){Builtin, None} .and. 1) = 1)
					set_control_par(tag_button_array[p{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, 0){Builtin, None}
					floatmask.set(bit_list{int[]}, p{int}, 0){UserDefined, Inlining}
					filter_presets{UserDefined, Call}
					wait(5){Builtin, None}
				end if
				dec(p{int}){Builtin, None}
			end while
		end if
		tag_state_handling{UserDefined, Call}
		if(preset_scan{int} = 0)
			set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(lbl_presetcount{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} & "/" & NUM_PRESETS{int}){Builtin, None}
		end if
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (num_elements[end_of_presets_array{int[]}] - 1)) 
			end_of_presets_array[i{int}]{int} := 1 + (sh_right((NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} - 1) - i{int}, 31){Builtin, None} .or. sh_right(i{int} - 0, 31){Builtin, None})
			inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
		scroll.up{int} := real_to_int(round((((int_to_real(scroll.up{int}){Builtin, None} - 0) * (int_to_real(1 - ((1 - (NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} - 12)) .and. sh_right(1 - (NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} - 12), 31){Builtin, None})){Builtin, None} - 0)) / (int_to_real(1 - ((1 - (NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS_OLD{int} - 12)) .and. sh_right(1 - (NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS_OLD{int} - 12), 31){Builtin, None})){Builtin, None} - 0)) + 0){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
		update.preset_button_focus{UserDefined, Call}
		if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_clear_tags{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None} = 1)
			if(preset.idx{int} # - 1)
				if(abs(sh_right(abs(1 + sh_right(abs(bit_list[0]{int} + bit_list[1]{int}){Builtin, None} - 1, 31){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None} - 1, 31){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None} = 1)
					scroll.up{int} := scroll.up{int}
				else
					scroll.up{int} := search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]
				end if
			else
				scroll.up{int} := scroll.up_origin{int}
			end if
			btn_clear_tags{int} := 0
		end if
		if(btn_presetBrowser{int} = 1)
			repaint.scrollarea{UserDefined, Call}
			if(NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} > 12)
				sli_scrollbar{int} := 1000000 - ((1000000 / (NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} - 12)) * scroll.up{int})
				set_control_par(get_ui_id(sli_scrollbar{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_MOUSE_BEHAVIOUR{int}, - (((508 - 249) * 12) + (2 * (NUM_PRESETS{int} - NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int})))){Builtin, None}
				handle_size{int} := real_to_int(round(int_to_real(249){Builtin, None} / (int_to_real(NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int}){Builtin, None} / int_to_real(12){Builtin, None})){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
				if(handle_size{int} < 30)
					handle_size{int} := 30
				end if
			else
				sli_scrollbar{int} := 1000000
				handle_size{int} := 249
			end if
			set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_scrollhandle{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT{int}, handle_size{int}){Builtin, None}
			set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_scrollhandle{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}, get_control_par(get_ui_id(sli_scrollbar{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}){Builtin, None} + ((249 - handle_size{int}) - ((sli_scrollbar{int} * (249 - handle_size{int})) / 1000000))){Builtin, None}
		end if
		tag_button_pressed{int} := 0
	end if
end function

function update.preset_button_focus
	if((search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}] # - 1) and (preset.idx{int} # - 1))
		btn_preset_onoff[search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{int} := 1
		if((scroll.up{int} > search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]) and (scroll.up{int} <= (NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} - 12)))
			scroll.up{int} := search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}] + ((sh_right((scroll.up{int} - 3) - 0, 31){Builtin, None} + 1) * - 3)
			if(scroll.up{int} > (NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} - 12))
				scroll.up{int} := search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]
			end if
		else
			if(((search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}] - scroll.up{int}) > 12) and (scroll.up{int} <= (NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} - 12)))
				scroll.up{int} := ((search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}] - 12) + 1) + ((1 + sh_right(NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} - (scroll.up{int} + 3), 31){Builtin, None}) * 3)
			end if
		end if
		if((search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}] > (NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} - 12)) and (NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} > 12))
			scroll.up{int} := NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} - 12
		end if
		scroll.up{int} := (sh_right(scroll.up{int} - 0, 31){Builtin, None} + 1) * scroll.up{int}
	else
		if(preset.idx{int} = - 1)
			scroll.up{int} := 0
		end if
	end if
	if(scroll.up{int} > (NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} - 12))
		scroll.up{int} := NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} - 12
	end if
	if(NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} < 12)
		scroll.up{int} := 0
	end if
end function

function filter_presets override
{thread-unsafe}
	declare local escape[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	escape[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} := 0
	declare local allowed[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	allowed[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} := 0
	declare local bit_count[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : int[] {Reuses: 0}

1, 31){Builtin, None} * 32)){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None} - 1, 31){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None} - 1, 31){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(lbl_categories[ii{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE{int}, fonts.category_font[category_active[ii{int}]{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
		i{int} := category_accum[ii{int}]{int}
		while(i{int} <= (category_accum[ii{int} + 1]{int} - 1)) 
			u{int} := 0
			while(u{int} <= (num_elements[font.types{int[]}] - 1)) 
				set_control_par(tag_button_array[i{int}]{int}, font.types[u{int}]{int}, fonts.base_font[u{int} * tag_mask_array[i{int}]{int}]{int} + (- sh_right(abs(tag_mask_array[i{int}]{int} - 0){Builtin, None} - 1, 31){Builtin, None} * 6)){Builtin, None}
				inc(u{int}){Builtin, None}
			end while
			inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
		inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function doubleclick_check(double_click_control : int){thread-unsafe}
	wait((CLICKK_INTERVAL{int} * 1000) + 2000){Builtin, None}
	if((ENGINE_UPTIME{int} - clicktime[1]{int}) > CLICKK_INTERVAL{int})
		set_control_par(double_click_control{unknown}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
		clicktime[2]{int} := 0
	end if
end function

function update.preset_situation
	ii{int} := 0
	NUM_USER_PRESETS{int} := search[lead_user_preset_tags0{int[]}, 0]
	set_preset_numbers{UserDefined, Inlining}
	if(NUM_USER_PRESETS{int} > 0)
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (NUM_USER_PRESETS{int} - 1)) 
			if(lead_user_deleted_presets[i{int}]{int} = 1)
				lead_user_preset_titles[ii{int}]{string} := lead_user_preset_titles[i{int}]{string}
				lead_user_preset_tags0[ii{int}]{int} := lead_user_preset_tags0[i{int}]{int}
				lead_user_preset_tags1[ii{int}]{int} := lead_user_preset_tags1[i{int}]{int}
				lead_user_preset_numbers[ii{int}]{int} := lead_user_preset_numbers[i{int}]{int}
				lead_user_preset_info[ii{int}]{string} := lead_user_preset_info[i{int}]{string}
				inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
			end if
			inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
		NUM_USER_PRESETS{int} := ii{int}
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (NUM_USER_PRESETS{int} - 1)) 
			preset_title_array[NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS{int} + i{int}]{string} := lead_user_preset_titles[i{int}]{string}
			final_preset_title_array[NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS{int} + i{int}]{string} := lead_user_preset_titles[i{int}]{string}
			file_name_array[NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS{int} + i{int}]{string} := lead_user_preset_titles[i{int}]{string}
			preset_tags0[NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS{int} + i{int}]{int} := lead_user_preset_tags0[i{int}]{int}
			preset_tags1[NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS{int} + i{int}]{int} := lead_user_preset_tags1[i{int}]{int}
			preset_numbers_array[NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS{int} + i{int}]{int} := lead_user_preset_numbers[i{int}]{int}
			final_preset_numbers_array[NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS{int} + i{int}]{int} := lead_user_preset_numbers[i{int}]{int}
			preset_info[NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS{int} + i{int}]{string} := lead_user_preset_info[i{int}]{string}
			inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
	end if
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[lead_user_deleted_presets{int[]}] - 1)) 
		if(i{int} < NUM_USER_PRESETS{int})
			lead_user_deleted_presets[i{int}]{int} := 1
		else
			lead_user_deleted_presets[i{int}]{int} := 0
			lead_user_preset_titles[i{int}]{string} := 0
			lead_user_preset_tags0[i{int}]{int} := 0
			lead_user_preset_tags1[i{int}]{int} := 0
			lead_user_preset_numbers[i{int}]{int} := 0
			lead_user_preset_info[i{int}]{string} := 0
		end if
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	NUM_PRESETS{int} := NUM_USER_PRESETS{int} + NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS{int}
	set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(file_browser{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_BASEPATH{int}, base_path{string}){Builtin, None}
end function

function set_preset_numbers
	i{int} := NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS{int}
	while(i{int} <= (1499 - 1)) 
		preset_numbers_array[i{int}]{int} := 0
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function save.favorite_array{restricted}
	save_array(lead_favorite_presets_array{int[]}, 1){Builtin, None}
end function

function save.resource_arrays{restricted}
	save_array(lead_user_deleted_presets{int[]}, 1){Builtin, None}
	save_array(lead_user_preset_tags0{int[]}, 1){Builtin, None}
	save_array(lead_user_preset_tags1{int[]}, 1){Builtin, None}
	save_array(lead_user_preset_titles{string[]}, 1){Builtin, None}
	save_array(lead_user_preset_numbers{int[]}, 1){Builtin, None}
	save_array(lead_user_preset_info{string[]}, 1){Builtin, None}
end function

function check.preset_overwrite{thread-unsafe}{restricted}
	i{int} := preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{int}]{int}
	preset.load_id{int} := load_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, base_path{string} & get_control_par_str(get_ui_id(txt_presetname{string}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}){Builtin, None} & ".nka"){Builtin, None}
	wait_async(load_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, base_path{string} & get_control_par_str(get_ui_id(txt_presetname{string}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}){Builtin, None} & ".nka"){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	if(saving_preset{int} = user.EDITS_TAGS{int})
		if(i{int} = preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{int}]{int})
			preset.load_id{int} := 0
		end if
	end if
	if(((preset.load_id{int} = - 1) and (preset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX{int}]{int} # 0)) and (preset.overwrite{int} = 1))
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(txt_presetname{string}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE{int}, fonts.current_preset_font[0]{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(btn_overwrite{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, "File already exists. Overwrite?"){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_overwrite{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
	else
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(txt_presetname{string}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE{int}, fonts.current_preset_font[0]{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_overwrite{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
		preset.overwrite{int} := 0
	end if
end function

	set_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_presetBrowser{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, hide_state[abs(sh_right(abs(Boolean{int}){Builtin, None} - 1, 31){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}]{int}){Builtin, None}

	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[btn_preset_button{int[]}] - 1))
