				inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
			end while
			set_control_par(lbl_preset_info[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE{int}, fonts.smaller_font[0]{int}){Builtin, None}
		end if
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	if(in_range(search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}] - scroll.up{int}, 0, 12 - 1){Builtin, None})
		set_control_par(lbl_preset_info[search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}] - scroll.up{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE{int}, fonts.smaller_font[abs(sh_right(abs(Boolean{int}){Builtin, None} - 1, 31){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None} + (Boolean{int} * 3)]{int}){Builtin, None}
	end if
end function

function on_saving_preset_dialog
	visibility.preset.save.dialog(1){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(UI_preset_save_dialog{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, hide_state[1]{int}){Builtin, None}
	if(preset.idx{int} # - 1)
		floatmask.load(presetmask{int[]}, preset_tags0[search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{int}, preset_tags1[search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{int}){UserDefined, Inlining}
		select(saving_preset{int})
		case user.EDITS_TAGS{int}
			set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(txt_presetname{string}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, preset_title_array[search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{string}){Builtin, None}
		case user.SAVES_NEW{int}
			if(((sh_right(presetmask[2 / 32]{int}, (31 - 2) mod 32){Builtin, None} .and. 1) * preset.allow_user{int}) = 0)
				set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(txt_presetname{string}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, preset_title_array[search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{string} & " (User)"){Builtin, None}
			else
				set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(txt_presetname{string}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, preset_title_array[search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{string}){Builtin, None}
			end if
		end select
		set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(lbl_warning{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, "Choose a selection of tags"){Builtin, None}
		add_text_line(lbl_warning{int}, "that apply to your preset"){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_warning{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE{int}, fonts.base_font[1]{int}){Builtin, None}
		floatmask.control_to_floatmask(bit_list{int[]}, tag_button_array{int[]}){UserDefined, Inlining}
		bit_list2[0]{int} := bit_list[0]{int}
		bit_list2[1]{int} := bit_list[1]{int}
		floatmask.load(bit_list{int[]}, preset_tags0[search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{int}, preset_tags1[search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{int}){UserDefined, Inlining}
		floatmask.set(bit_list{int[]}, 24 - 1, lead_favorite_presets_array[preset.idx{int}]{int}){UserDefined, Inlining}
		get_category_idx(ii{int}, 2){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
		floatmask.set_range(bit_list{int[]}, category_accum[ii{int}]{int}, category_accum[ii{int} + 1]{int} - 1, 0){UserDefined, Inlining}
		floatmask.set(bit_list{int[]}, 2, 1){UserDefined, Inlining}
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= ((24 - 1) - 1)) 
			set_control_par(tag_button_array[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, sh_right(bit_list[i{int} / 32]{int}, (31 - i{int}) mod 32){Builtin, None} .and. 1){Builtin, None}
			u{int} := 0
			while(u{int} <= (num_elements[font.types{int[]}] - 1)) 
				set_control_par(tag_button_array[i{int}]{int}, font.types[u{int}]{int}, fonts.base_font[u{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
				inc(u{int}){Builtin, None}
			end while
			inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_current_favorite{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, lead_favorite_presets_array[preset.idx{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
	end if
end function

function save.preset{thread-unsafe}{restricted}
	preset.usr_name{string} := get_control_par_str(get_ui_id(txt_presetname{string}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}){Builtin, None}
	if(saving_preset{int} = user.EDITS_TAGS{int})
		preset.usr_name{string} := preset_title_array[search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{string}
	end if
	preset.load_id{int} := load_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, base_path{string} & preset.usr_name{string} & ".nka"){Builtin, None}
	wait_async(load_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, base_path{string} & preset.usr_name{string} & ".nka"){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	floatmask.control_to_floatmask(bit_list{int[]}, tag_button_array{int[]}){UserDefined, Inlining}
	preset.array[preset.TAGS0_IDX{int}]{int} := bit_list[0]{int}
	preset.array[preset.TAGS1_IDX{int}]{int} := bit_list[1]{int}
	lead_user_deleted_presets[NUM_USER_PRESETS{int}]{int} := 1
	if((preset.load_id{int} = - 1) and (preset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX{int}]{int} # 0))
		lead_user_preset_tags0[search[lead_user_preset_numbers{int[]}, preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{int}]{int}]]{int} := preset.array[preset.TAGS0_IDX{int}]{int}
		lead_user_preset_tags1[search[lead_user_preset_numbers{int[]}, preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{int}]{int}]]{int} := preset.array[preset.TAGS1_IDX{int}]{int}
		lead_user_preset_titles[search[lead_user_preset_numbers{int[]}, preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{int}]{int}]]{string} := preset.usr_name{string}
		lead_user_deleted_presets[search[lead_user_preset_numbers{int[]}, preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{int}]{int}]]{int} := 1
		lead_user_preset_info[search[lead_user_preset_numbers{int[]}, preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{int}]{int}]]{string} := ""
	else
		lead_user_preset_tags0[NUM_USER_PRESETS{int}]{int} := preset.array[preset.TAGS0_IDX{int}]{int}
		lead_user_preset_tags1[NUM_USER_PRESETS{int}]{int} := preset.array[preset.TAGS1_IDX{int}]{int}
		lead_user_preset_titles[NUM_USER_PRESETS{int}]{string} := preset.usr_name{string}
		validate.user_preset_idx(preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{int}]{int}, NUM_USER_PRESETS{int} + 999){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
		lead_user_preset_numbers[NUM_USER_PRESETS{int}]{int} := preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{int}]{int}
		lead_user_preset_info[NUM_USER_PRESETS{int}]{string} := ""
	end if
	preset.array[preset.VERSION_IDX{int}]{int} := PRODUCT_PRESET_VERSION{int}
	preset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX{int}]{int} := 1
	save_preset{UserDefined, Call}
	save_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, base_path{string} & preset.usr_name{string} & ".nka"){Builtin, None}
	preset.last_idx{int} := preset.idx{int}
	update.preset_situation{UserDefined, Call}
	if(saving_preset{int} = user.SAVES_NEW{int})
		preset.idx{int} := preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{int}]{int}
		filter_presets{UserDefined, Call}
	end if
	save.resource_arrays{UserDefined, Inlining}
	btn_save{int} := 0
	off_saving_preset_dialog{UserDefined, Call}
	message("preset.idx: " & preset.idx{int}){Builtin, None}
	browser.load_preset{UserDefined, Inlining}
	instrument.reload_all{UserDefined, Inlining}
end function

function validate.user_preset_idx(result : int, idx : int)
	declare local preset_exists : int {Reuses: 0}
	preset_exists{int} := 0
	if(search[lead_user_preset_numbers{int[]}, idx{int}] # - 1)
		preset.count{int} := 0
		preset_exists{int} := 1
		while(preset_exists{int} = 1) 
			if(search[lead_user_preset_numbers{int[]}, preset.count{int} + 999] # - 1)
				inc(preset.count{int}){Builtin, None}
			else
				preset_exists{int} := 0
			end if
		end while
		result{int} := preset.count{int} + 999
	else
		result{int} := idx{int}
	end if
end function

function edit.tags{thread-unsafe}{restricted}
	preset.usr_name{string} := preset_title_array[search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{string}
	message("@preset.usr_name: " & preset.usr_name{string}){Builtin, None}
	preset.load_id{int} := load_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, base_path{string} & preset.usr_name{string} & ".nka"){Builtin, None}
	wait_async(load_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, base_path{string} & preset.usr_name{string} & ".nka"){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	preset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX{int}]{int} := 0
	save_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, base_path{string} & preset.usr_name{string} & ".nka"){Builtin, None}
	wait_async(save_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, base_path{string} & preset.usr_name{string} & ".nka"){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[preset.array{int[]}] - 1)) 
		preset.arrayBuffer[i{int}]{int} := preset.array[i{int}]{int}
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	preset.arrayBuffer[preset.DELETED_IDX{int}]{int} := 1
	floatmask.control_to_floatmask(bit_list{int[]}, tag_button_array{int[]}){UserDefined, Inlining}
	preset.arrayBuffer[preset.TAGS0_IDX{int}]{int} := bit_list[0]{int}
	preset.arrayBuffer[preset.TAGS1_IDX{int}]{int} := bit_list[1]{int}
	preset.load_id{int} := load_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, base_path{string} & get_control_par_str(get_ui_id(txt_presetname{string}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}){Builtin, None} & ".nka"){Builtin, None}
	wait_async(load_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, base_path{string} & get_control_par_str(get_ui_id(txt_presetname{string}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}){Builtin, None} & ".nka"){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	lead_user_deleted_presets[search[lead_user_preset_numbers{int[]}, preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{int}]{int}]]{int} := 0
	lead_user_deleted_presets[search[lead_user_preset_numbers{int[]}, preset.arrayBuffer[preset.NUMBER_IDX{int}]{int}]]{int} := 1
	lead_user_preset_tags0[search[lead_user_preset_numbers{int[]}, preset.arrayBuffer[preset.NUMBER_IDX{int}]{int}]]{int} := preset.arrayBuffer[preset.TAGS0_IDX{int}]{int}
	lead_user_preset_tags1[search[lead_user_preset_numbers{int[]}, preset.arrayBuffer[preset.NUMBER_IDX{int}]{int}]]{int} := preset.arrayBuffer[preset.TAGS1_IDX{int}]{int}
	lead_user_preset_titles[search[lead_user_preset_numbers{int[]}, preset.arrayBuffer[preset.NUMBER_IDX{int}]{int}]]{string} := get_control_par_str(get_ui_id(txt_presetname{string}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}){Builtin, None}
	lead_user_preset_info[search[lead_user_preset_numbers{int[]}, preset.arrayBuffer[preset.NUMBER_IDX{int}]{int}]]{string} := ""
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[preset.array{int[]}] - 1)) 
		preset.array[i{int}]{int} := preset.arrayBuffer[i{int}]{int}
		preset.arrayBuffer[i{int}]{int} := 0
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	save_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, base_path{string} & get_control_par_str(get_ui_id(txt_presetname{string}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}){Builtin, None} & ".nka"){Builtin, None}
	message("SAVED AS: " & base_path{string} & get_control_par_str(get_ui_id(txt_presetname{string}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}){Builtin, None} & ".nka"){Builtin, None}
	update.preset_situation{UserDefined, Call}
	preset.idx{int} := preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{int}]{int}
	save.resource_arrays{UserDefined, Inlining}
	btn_save{int} := 0
	off_saving_preset_dialog{UserDefined, Call}
	browser.load_preset{UserDefined, Inlining}
	instrument.reload_all{UserDefined, Inlining}
end function

function delete.preset{thread-unsafe}{restricted}
	preset.load_id{int} := load_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, base_path{string} & final_preset_title_array[search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{string} & ".nka"){Builtin, None}
	wait_async(load_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, base_path{string} & final_preset_title_array[search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{string} & ".nka"){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	preset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX{int}]{int} := 0
	lead_user_deleted_presets[search[lead_user_preset_numbers{int[]}, preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{int}]{int}]]{int} := 0
	save_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, base_path{string} & final_preset_title_array[search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{string} & ".nka"){Builtin, None}
	i{int} := search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[lead_favorite_presets_array{int[]}] - 1)) 
		if(i{int} < (num_elements[lead_favorite_presets_array{int[]}] - 1))
			lead_favorite_presets_array[i{int}]{int} := lead_favorite_presets_array[i{int} + 1]{int}
		end if
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	save.favorite_array{UserDefined, Inlining}
	preset.idx{int} := preset_numbers_array[search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}] - 1]{int}
	update.preset_situation{UserDefined, Call}
	save.resource_arrays{UserDefined, Inlining}
	saving_preset{int} := 0
	on_button_tag{UserDefined, Call}
	if(search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}] # - 1)
		preset.idx{int} := final_preset_numbers_array[search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}] mod NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int}]{int}
	else
		preset.idx{int} := preset.idx{int}
	end if
	btn_preset_onoff[search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{int} := 1
	if(in_range(search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}] - scroll.up{int}, 0, 12 - 1){Builtin, None})
		set_control_par(btn_preset_button[search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}] - scroll.up{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, 1){Builtin, None}
	end if
	update.preset_button_focus{UserDefined, Call}
	update.scrollarea{UserDefined, Call}
	update.btn_active_status{UserDefined, Call}
	if(search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.last_idx{int}] = - 1)
		message("loaded preset has been deleted"){Builtin, None}
		browser.load_preset{UserDefined, Inlining}
		instrument.reload_all{UserDefined, Inlining}
	end if
end function

function off_saving_preset_dialog{thread-unsafe}
	saving_disabled{int} := 1
	saving_preset{int} := 0
	btn_save{int} := 0
	btn_edit_tags{int} := 0
	preset.overwrite{int} := 0
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(txt_presetname{string}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE{int}, fonts.current_preset_font[0]{int}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_overwrite{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
	visibility.preset.save.dialog(0){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(UI_preset_save_dialog{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, hide_state[0]{int}){Builtin, None}
	bit_list[0]{int} := bit_list2[0]{int}
	bit_list[1]{int} := bit_list2[1]{int}
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (24 - 1)) 
		set_control_par(tag_button_array[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, sh_right(bit_list[i{int} / 32]{int}, (31 - i{int}) mod 32){Builtin, None} .and. 1){Builtin, None}
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	btn_scan_presets{int} := 0
	on_btn_scan_presets{UserDefined, Call}
	on_button_tag{UserDefined, Call}
	update.btn_active_status{UserDefined, Call}
end function

function on_btn_scan_presets
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_scan_animation{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, hide_state[btn_scan_presets{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(lbl_scan_animation{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}, get_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_scan_presets{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None} + 1){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(lbl_scan_animation{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}, get_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_scan_presets{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}){Builtin, None} + 1){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_scan_presets{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, hide_state[abs(sh_right(abs(btn_scan_presets{int}){Builtin, None} - 1, 31){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}]{int}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_disable_input{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, hide_state[btn_scan_presets{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_scan_info{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, hide_state[btn_scan_presets{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(lbl_scan_info{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, "Scanning files..."){Builtin, None}
	if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_scan_presets{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None} = 0)
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(file_browser{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(lbl_scan_info{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, ""){Builtin, None}
	end if
end function

function scanning_automation
	if((preset_scan_info{int} = 0) and (get_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_scan_presets{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None} = 1))
		if(preset_scan{int} = 1)
			set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_scan_animation{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE{int}, preset.frame_count{int}){Builtin, None}
		end if
		if((preset_scan{int} = 0) and in_range(preset.frame_count{int}, 1, 50){Builtin, None})
			set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_scan_animation{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE{int}, preset.frame_count{int}){Builtin, None}
			if(preset.frame_count{int} >= 50)
				preset_scan_info{int} := 1
				preset.frame_count{int} := 0
				set_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_scan_presets{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, 0){Builtin, None}
				on_btn_scan_presets{UserDefined, Call}
			end if
		end if
		preset.frame_rate{int} := (preset.frame_rate{int} + 1) mod real_to_int(round((1 / int_to_real(30){Builtin, None}) / (int_to_real(MS_SIGNAL{int}){Builtin, None} / 1e+06)){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
		preset.frame_count{int} := (preset.frame_count{int} + (sh_right(- preset.frame_rate{int}, 31){Builtin, None} + 1)) mod 51
	else
		if((preset_scan_info{int} = 1) and (preset_scan{int} = 0))
			preset.frame_rate{int} := (preset.frame_rate{int} + 1) mod real_to_int(round((1 / int_to_real(30){Builtin, None}) / (int_to_real(MS_SIGNAL{int}){Builtin, None} / 1e+06)){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
			preset.frame_count{int} := (preset.frame_count{int} + (sh_right(- preset.frame_rate{int}, 31){Builtin, None} + 1)) mod 100
			if(preset.frame_count{int} >= 99)
				preset_scan_info{int} := 0
				set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_scan_info{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
				set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(lbl_presetcount{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} & "/" & NUM_PRESETS{int}){Builtin, None}
			else
				if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_scan_presets{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT{int}){Builtin, None} = 0)
					set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(lbl_scan_info{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, "User Presets found: " & preset.usr_display_num{int}){Builtin, None}
				else
					set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(lbl_scan_info{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, "Files recovered: " & preset.usr_display_num{int}){Builtin, None}
				end if
			end if
		end if
	end if
end function

function save_scanned_preset_vars{restricted}
	lead_user_preset_titles[preset.usr_count{int}]{string} := fs_get_filename(get_ui_id(file_browser{int}){Builtin, None}, 0){Builtin, None}
	lead_user_preset_tags0[preset.usr_count{int}]{int} := ((1 + sh_right(abs(preset.array[preset.TAGS0_IDX{int}]{int}){Builtin, None} - 1, 31){Builtin, None}) * preset.array[preset.TAGS0_IDX{int}]{int}) + (- sh_right(abs(preset.array[preset.TAGS0_IDX{int}]{int} - 0){Builtin, None} - 1, 31){Builtin, None} * - 1)
	lead_user_preset_tags1[preset.usr_count{int}]{int} := ((1 + sh_right(abs(preset.array[preset.TAGS1_IDX{int}]{int}){Builtin, None} - 1, 31){Builtin, None}) * preset.array[preset.TAGS1_IDX{int}]{int}) + (- sh_right(abs(preset.array[preset.TAGS0_IDX{int}]{int} - 0){Builtin, None} - 1, 31){Builtin, None} * - 1)
	lead_user_deleted_presets[preset.usr_count{int}]{int} := preset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX{int}]{int}
	validate.user_preset_idx(preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{int}]{int}, preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{int}]{int}){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
	lead_user_preset_numbers[preset.usr_count{int}]{int} := preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{int}]{int}
	lead_user_preset_info[preset.usr_count{int}]{string} := ""
	inc(preset.usr_count{int}){Builtin, None}
end function

function get_user_preset_after_scan{thread-unsafe}{restricted}
	floatmask.load(presetmask{int[]}, preset_tags0[search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{int}, preset_tags1[search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{int}){UserDefined, Inlining}
	if(((sh_right(presetmask[2 / 32]{int}, (31 - 2) mod 32){Builtin, None} .and. 1) * preset.allow_user{int}) = 1)
		preset.load_id{int} := load_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, base_path{string} & file_name_array[search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{string} & ".nka"){Builtin, None}
		message(base_path{string} & file_name_array[search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{string} & ".nka"){Builtin, None}
		wait_async(load_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, base_path{string} & file_name_array[search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{string} & ".nka"){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
		if(preset.load_id{int} = - 1)
			load_new{int} := 0
			preset.idx{int} := preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{int}]{int}
		else
			preset.idx{int} := preset_numbers_array[NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS{int} - 1]{int}
			load_new{int} := 1
		end if
		preset.idx{int} := preset.idx{int}
	end if
end function

function browser.load_preset{thread-unsafe}{restricted}
	if((preset.is_loading{int} = 0) and (preset.idx{int} # - 1))
		if(preset.idx{int} # preset.last_idx{int})
			preset.last_idx{int} := preset.idx{int}
			load_preset_array{UserDefined, Inlining}
			if(preset.load_id{int} = - 1)
				load_preset{UserDefined, Call}
				init.instrument{UserDefined, Call}
				nks.update_all_labels{UserDefined, Call}
				update.purge.state{UserDefined, Call}
			end if
		end if
	end if
end function

function update.purge.state
end function

function load_preset_array override
{thread-unsafe}{restricted}
	message(preset_numbers_array[search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{int} & ", " & preset.idx{int}){Builtin, None}
	floatmask.load(presetmask{int[]}, preset_tags0[search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{int}, preset_tags1[search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{int}){UserDefined, Inlining}
	if(((sh_right(presetmask[2 / 32]{int}, (31 - 2) mod 32){Builtin, None} .and. 1) * preset.allow_user{int}) = 1)
		preset.load_id{int} := load_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, base_path{string} & file_name_array[search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{string} & ".nka"){Builtin, None}
		message("loading user_preset" & ", " & base_path{string} & file_name_array[search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{string} & ".nka"){Builtin, None}
	else
		preset.load_id{int} := load_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, preset_path{string} & file_name_array[search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{string} & ".nka"){Builtin, None}
		message("loading factory_preset" & ", " & preset_path{string} & file_name_array[search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{string} & ".nka"){Builtin, None}
	end if
	while(preset.load_id{int} > 0) 
		wait(10){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function save_preset
	preset.n{int} := 0 + ((saving_preset{int} * preset.allow_user{int}) * preset.CONTENT_IDX{int})
	preset.array.add(PRODUCT_PRESET_VERSION{int}){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[slot.loaded_sound{int[]}] - 1)) 
		preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int} := slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}
		inc(preset.n{int}){Builtin, None}
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[sli_volume{int[]}] - 1)) 
		preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int} := get_control_par(sli_volume[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}
		inc(preset.n{int}){Builtin, None}
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[sli_volume_min{int[]}] - 1)) 
		preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int} := get_control_par(sli_volume_min[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}

		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	i{int} := 0

		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}

	i{int} := 0

function load_preset{thread-unsafe}

	preset.n{int} := 0 + (((sh_right(presetmask[2 / 32]{int}, (31 - 2) mod 32){Builtin, None} .and. 1) * preset.allow_user{int}) * preset.CONTENT_IDX{int})
	inc(preset.n{int}){Builtin, None}
	playing{int} := 0
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[slot.loaded_sound{int[]}] - 1))

	end while

function preset.array.add(value : int)
	preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int} := value{int}
	inc(preset.n{int}){Builtin, None}
end function

function check_development{restricted}
	development[0]{int} := - 1
	_id{int} := load_array_str(development{int[]}, development_path{string}){Builtin, None}
	if(_id{int} = - 1)
	end if
end function

function check_decoding{restricted}
	decode[0]{int} := - 1
	_id{int} := load_array_str(decode{int[]}, decode_path{string}){Builtin, None}
	if(_id{int} = - 1)
	end if
end function

function find_key_nka(result : string, array : int[], nka : string, key : int, parent_folder : string, search_depth : int){restricted}
	declare local path : string {Reuses: 0}
	declare local it : int {Reuses: 0}
	array[0]{int} := - 1
	it{int} := 0
	path{string} := ""
	_id{int} := load_array_str(array{int[]}, get_folder(GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR{int}){Builtin, None} & path{string} & parent_folder{unknown} & nka{unknown} & ".nka"){Builtin, None}
	while(((_id{int} # - 1) and (it{int} < search_depth{int})) and (array[0]{int} # key{int})) 
		array[0]{int} := - 1
		path{string} := path{string} & "../"
		_id{int} := load_array_str(array{int[]}, get_folder(GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR{int}){Builtin, None} & path{string} & parent_folder{unknown} & nka{unknown} & ".nka"){Builtin, None}
		inc(it{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	result{string} := get_folder(GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR{int}){Builtin, None} & path{string} & nka{unknown} & ".nka"
end function

function timed_display.trigger(control_id : int, text : string, time : int)
	declare local _id : int := search[timed_display.controls{int[]}, control_id{int}] {Reuses: 0}
	if(_id{int} # - 1)
		timed_display.times[_id{int}]{int} := time{int}
		if(time{int} = 0)
			timed_display.times[_id{int}]{int} := 1200
		end if
		timed_display.texts[_id{int}]{string} := text{unknown}
		timed_display.properties[_id{int}]{int} := 0
		timed_display.counters[_id{int}]{int} := 0
	else
		_id{int} := search[timed_display.controls{int[]}, - 1]
		if(_id{int} # - 1)
			timed_display.controls[_id{int}]{int} := control_id{int}
			timed_display.times[_id{int}]{int} := time{int}
			if(time{int} = 0)
				timed_display.times[_id{int}]{int} := 1200
			end if
			timed_display.texts[_id{int}]{string} := text{unknown}
			timed_display.counters[_id{int}]{int} := 0
			timed_display.properties[_id{int}]{int} := 0
		else
			set_control_par_str(control_id{int}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, text{unknown}){Builtin, None}
		end if
	end if
end function

function timed_display.trigger_with_bg_ani(control_id : int, text : string, time : int, frames : int)
	declare local _id : int := search[timed_display.controls{int[]}, control_id{int}] {Reuses: 0}
	if(_id{int} # - 1)
		timed_display.times[_id{int}]{int} := time{int}
		if(time{int} = 0)
			timed_display.times[_id{int}]{int} := 1200
		end if
		timed_display.texts[_id{int}]{string} := text{unknown}
		timed_display.properties[_id{int}]{int} := frames{int}
		timed_display.counters[_id{int}]{int} := 0
	else
		_id{int} := search[timed_display.controls{int[]}, - 1]
		if(_id{int} # - 1)
			timed_display.controls[_id{int}]{int} := control_id{int}
			timed_display.times[_id{int}]{int} := time{int}
			if(time{int} = 0)
				timed_display.times[_id{int}]{int} := 1200
			end if
			timed_display.texts[_id{int}]{string} := text{unknown}
			timed_display.counters[_id{int}]{int} := 0
			timed_display.properties[_id{int}]{int} := frames{int}
			animation.picture.start(none{int}, control_id{int}, 0, frames{int} - 1, frames{int}, 0){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
		else
			set_control_par_str(control_id{int}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, text{unknown}){Builtin, None}
		end if
	end if
end function

function animation.position.start(result : int, ui_id : int, start_pos_x : int, start_pos_y : int, end_pos_x : int, end_pos_y : int, length : int, mode : int)
	declare local id : int := search[animation.controls{int[]}, - 1] {Reuses: 0}
	if(id{int} # - 1)
		animation.controls[id{int}]{int} := ui_id{int}
		animation.time_left[id{int}]{int} := length{int}
		animation.length[id{int}]{int} := length{int}
		animation.type[id{int}]{int} := 0
		_animation.start_pos[id{int} * 2]{int} := start_pos_x{int}
		_animation.start_pos[(id{int} * 2) + 1]{int} := start_pos_y{int}
		_animation.end_pos[id{int} * 2]{int} := end_pos_x{int}
		_animation.end_pos[(id{int} * 2) + 1]{int} := end_pos_y{int}
		animation.mode[id{int}]{int} := mode{int}
	else
		message("***Error in animation.ksp *** too many animations at the same time. Increase value of MAX_ANIMATIONS"){Builtin, None}
	end if
	result{int} := id{int}
	message("started animation"){Builtin, None}
end function

function animation.picture.start(result : int, ui_id : int, start_pos : int, end_pos : int, length : int, mode : int)
	declare local id : int := search[animation.controls{int[]}, - 1] {Reuses: 0}
	if(id{int} # - 1)
		animation.controls[id{int}]{int} := ui_id{int}
		animation.time_left[id{int}]{int} := length{int}
		animation.length[id{int}]{int} := length{int}
		animation.type[id{int}]{int} := 1
		_animation.start_pos[id{int} * 2]{int} := start_pos{int}
		_animation.end_pos[id{int} * 2]{int} := end_pos{int}
		animation.mode[id{int}]{int} := mode{int}
	else
		message("***Error in animation.ksp *** too many animations at the same time. Increase value of MAX_ANIMATIONS"){Builtin, None}
	end if
	result{int} := id{int}
end function

function animation.abort(animation_id : int)
	if(animation_id{int} > - 1)
		if(animation.controls[animation_id{int}]{int} # - 1)
			animation.controls[animation_id{int}]{int} := - 1
		end if
	end if
end function

function motion.apply_modwheel
	motion.iterator{int} := 0
	while(motion.iterator{int} <= (28 - 1)) 
		if(((get_control_par(motion.btn_enable[motion.iterator{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None} = 1) and (get_control_par(motion.mnu_source[motion.iterator{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None} = 0)) and ((btn_midi_mode{int} = 0) or (current_controller_channel{int} = motion.slot[motion.iterator{int}]{int})))
			motion.value{int} := get_control_par(motion.sli_min[motion.iterator{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None} + real_to_int(int_to_real((get_control_par(motion.sli_max[motion.iterator{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None} - get_control_par(motion.sli_min[motion.iterator{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}) * motion.modwheel{int}){Builtin, None} / 127){Builtin, None}
			set_control_par(motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, real_to_int(((int_to_real(motion.value{int}){Builtin, None} * (int_to_real(motion.max[motion.iterator{int}]{int}){Builtin, None} - int_to_real(motion.min[motion.iterator{int}]{int}){Builtin, None})) / 1e+06) + int_to_real(motion.min[motion.iterator{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
			s{int} := search[_sli_fxrack_control{int[]}, motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int}]
			if(s{int} # - 1)
				fxRack.value{int} := get_control_par(_sli_fxrack_control[s{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}
				fxRack.slot{int} := s{int} / (4 * 3)
				fxRack.fx_slot{int} := (s{int} / 4) mod 3
				fxRack.control{int} := s{int} mod 4
				fxRack.ui_id{int} := motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int}
				if(_loaded_fx_types[(fxRack.slot{int} * 3) + fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int} # 6)
					fxRack.execute_slider{UserDefined, Call}
				end if
			end if
			string_buffer{string} := "N/A"
			s{int} := search[sli_attack{int[]}, motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int}]
			if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
					i{int} := 0
					while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
						mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR"){Builtin, None}
						tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
						set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, get_control_par(motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}){Builtin, None}
						string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
						inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
					end while
				else
					if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
						i{int} := 0
						while(i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
							set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, get_control_par(motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}){Builtin, None}
							string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
							inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
						end while
					else
						if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
							i{int} := 0
							while(i{int} <= ((instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - (((instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - 0) .and. sh_right((instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - 0, 31){Builtin, None}))) 
								ii{int} := 0
								while(ii{int} <= ((instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - (((instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - 0) .and. sh_right((instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - 0, 31){Builtin, None}))) 
									mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR"){Builtin, None}
									tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
									set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, get_control_par(motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}){Builtin, None}
									string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
									inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
								end while
								inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
							end while
						end if
					end if
				end if
				if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
					set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(lbl_attack{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, string_buffer{string}){Builtin, None}
					timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_attack{int}){Builtin, None}, "Attack", 0){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
				end if
			end if
			s{int} := search[sli_release{int[]}, motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int}]
			if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
					i{int} := 0
					while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
						mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR"){Builtin, None}
						tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
						set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, get_control_par(motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}){Builtin, None}
						string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
						inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
					end while
				else
					if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
						i{int} := 0
						while(i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
							set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, get_control_par(motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}){Builtin, None}
							string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
							inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
						end while
					else
						if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
							i{int} := 0
							while(i{int} <= ((instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - (((instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - 0) .and. sh_right((instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - 0, 31){Builtin, None}))) 
								ii{int} := 0
								while(ii{int} <= ((instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - (((instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - 0) .and. sh_right((instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - 0, 31){Builtin, None}))) 
									mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR"){Builtin, None}
									tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
									set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, get_control_par(motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}){Builtin, None}
									string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
									inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
								end while
								inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
							end while
						end if
					end if
				end if
				if(s{int} = active_slot{int})

					timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_release{int}){Builtin, None}, "Release", 0){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
				end if
			end if
			set_control_par_str(motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_LABEL{int}, string_buffer{string}){Builtin, None}
		end if
		inc(motion.iterator{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function motion.apply_lfo
	motion.iterator{int} := 0
	while(motion.iterator{int} <= (28 - 1)) 
		if((get_control_par(motion.btn_enable[motion.iterator{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None} = 1) and (get_control_par(motion.mnu_source[motion.iterator{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None} > 0))
			motion.value{int} := get_control_par(motion.sli_min[motion.iterator{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None} + real_to_int(int_to_real(get_control_par(motion.sli_max[motion.iterator{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None} - get_control_par(motion.sli_min[motion.iterator{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None} * lfo[get_control_par(motion.mnu_source[motion.iterator{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None} - 1]{real}){Builtin, None}
			set_control_par(motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, real_to_int(((int_to_real(motion.value{int}){Builtin, None} * (int_to_real(motion.max[motion.iterator{int}]{int}){Builtin, None} - int_to_real(motion.min[motion.iterator{int}]{int}){Builtin, None})) / 1e+06) + int_to_real(motion.min[motion.iterator{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
			s{int} := search[_sli_fxrack_control{int[]}, motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int}]
			if(s{int} # - 1)
				fxRack.value{int} := get_control_par(_sli_fxrack_control[s{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}
				fxRack.slot{int} := s{int} / (4 * 3)

					i{int} := 0

						mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR"){Builtin, None}

						inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
					end while
				else
					if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
						i{int} := 0
						while(i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
							set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, get_control_par(motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}){Builtin, None}
							string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
							inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
						end while
					else
						if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
							i{int} := 0
							while(i{int} <= ((instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - (((instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - 0) .and. sh_right((instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - 0, 31){Builtin, None}))) 
								ii{int} := 0
								while(ii{int} <= ((instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - (((instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - 0) .and. sh_right((instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - 0, 31){Builtin, None}))) 
									mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR"){Builtin, None}
									tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
									set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, get_control_par(motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}){Builtin, None}
									string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
									inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
								end while
								inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
							end while
						end if
					end if
				end if
				if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
					set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(lbl_release{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, string_buffer{string}){Builtin, None}
					timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_release{int}){Builtin, None}, "Release", 0){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
				end if
			end if
			set_control_par_str(motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_LABEL{int}, string_buffer{string}){Builtin, None}
		end if
		inc(motion.iterator{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function motion.add_fader(ui_id : int, id : int, min : int, max : int, slot : int)
	motion.id{int} := id{int}
	if(motion.ui_ids[motion.id{int}]{int} # - 1)
		message("motion id already in use"){Builtin, None}
	end if
	if(motion.id{int} # - 1)
		motion.ui_ids[motion.id{int}]{int} := ui_id{int}
		motion.min[motion.id{int}]{int} := min{int}
		motion.max[motion.id{int}]{int} := max{int}
		motion.type[motion.id{int}]{int} := 2
		motion.slot[motion.id{int}]{int} := slot{int}
		declare local _parent : int := get_control_par(ui_id{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PARENT_PANEL{int}){Builtin, None} {Reuses: 0}
		set_control_par(motion.btn_enable[motion.id{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}, (get_control_par(ui_id{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None} + (get_control_par(ui_id{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}){Builtin, None} / 2)) - (get_control_par(motion.btn_enable[motion.id{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}){Builtin, None} / 2)){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(motion.btn_enable[motion.id{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}, (get_control_par(ui_id{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}){Builtin, None} + get_control_par(ui_id{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT{int}){Builtin, None}) + 5){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(motion.btn_enable[motion.id{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PARENT_PANEL{int}, _parent{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(motion.btn_enable[motion.id{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_Z_LAYER{int}, 1){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(motion.lbl_enable_connect[motion.id{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PARENT_PANEL{int}, _parent{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(motion.lbl_enable_connect[motion.id{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_Z_LAYER{int}, 1){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(motion.mnu_source[motion.id{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}, (get_control_par(ui_id{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None} + get_control_par(ui_id{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}){Builtin, None}) + 2){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(motion.mnu_source[motion.id{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}, get_control_par(ui_id{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(motion.mnu_source[motion.id{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PARENT_PANEL{int}, _parent{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(motion.sli_min[motion.id{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_DEFAULT_VALUE{int}, get_control_par(ui_id{int}, CONTROL_PAR_DEFAULT_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par_str(motion.sli_min[motion.id{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, ""){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(motion.sli_min[motion.id{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_MOUSE_BEHAVIOUR{int}, - 1200){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(motion.sli_min[motion.id{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}, 20){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(motion.sli_min[motion.id{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT{int}, 100){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par_str(motion.sli_min[motion.id{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, "slider_fx_handles_left" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[active_slot{int}]{int}]{string}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(motion.sli_min[motion.id{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}, (get_control_par(ui_id{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None} + (get_control_par(ui_id{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}){Builtin, None} / 2)) - 20){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(motion.sli_min[motion.id{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}, get_control_par(ui_id{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(motion.sli_min[motion.id{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PARENT_PANEL{int}, _parent{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(motion.sli_max[motion.id{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_DEFAULT_VALUE{int}, get_control_par(ui_id{int}, CONTROL_PAR_DEFAULT_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par_str(motion.sli_max[motion.id{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, ""){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(motion.sli_max[motion.id{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_MOUSE_BEHAVIOUR{int}, - 1200){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(motion.sli_max[motion.id{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}, 15){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(motion.sli_max[motion.id{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT{int}, 100){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par_str(motion.sli_max[motion.id{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, "slider_fx_handles_right" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[active_slot{int}]{int}]{string}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(motion.sli_max[motion.id{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}, get_control_par(ui_id{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None} + (get_control_par(ui_id{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}){Builtin, None} / 2)){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(motion.sli_max[motion.id{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}, get_control_par(ui_id{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(motion.sli_max[motion.id{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PARENT_PANEL{int}, _parent{int}){Builtin, None}
		motion.update_visibility(ui_id{int}){UserDefined, Inlining}
	end if
end function

function motion.update_position.fader(ui_id : int){thread-unsafe}
	motion.id{int} := search[motion.ui_ids{int[]}, ui_id{int}]
	set_control_par(motion.btn_enable[motion.id{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}, (get_control_par(ui_id{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None} + (get_control_par(ui_id{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}){Builtin, None} / 2)) - (get_control_par(motion.btn_enable[motion.id{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}){Builtin, None} / 2)){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(motion.btn_enable[motion.id{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}, (get_control_par(ui_id{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}){Builtin, None} + get_control_par(ui_id{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT{int}){Builtin, None}) + 5){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(motion.lbl_enable_connect[motion.id{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}, get_control_par(motion.btn_enable[motion.id{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}){Builtin, None} + 3){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(motion.lbl_enable_connect[motion.id{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}, get_control_par(motion.btn_enable[motion.id{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None} + 23){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(motion.mnu_source[motion.id{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}, (get_control_par(ui_id{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None} + get_control_par(ui_id{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}){Builtin, None}) + 2){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(motion.mnu_source[motion.id{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}, (get_control_par(ui_id{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}){Builtin, None} + get_control_par(ui_id{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT{int}){Builtin, None}) - 1){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(motion.sli_min[motion.id{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}, (get_control_par(ui_id{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None} + (get_control_par(ui_id{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}){Builtin, None} / 2)) - 20){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(motion.sli_min[motion.id{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}, get_control_par(ui_id{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(motion.sli_max[motion.id{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}, (get_control_par(ui_id{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None} + (get_control_par(ui_id{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}){Builtin, None} / 2)) - 2){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(motion.sli_max[motion.id{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}, get_control_par(ui_id{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	motion.update{UserDefined, Call}
end function

function motion.update{thread-unsafe}
	declare local _type_str[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : string[] {Reuses: 0}
	_type_str[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{string} := ""
	declare local _curr_contr[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	_curr_contr[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} := 0
	if(motion.update_defense{int} = 0)
		motion.update_defense{int} := 1
		motion.iterator{int} := 0
		while(motion.iterator{int} <= (28 - 1)) 
			if(get_control_par(motion.btn_enable[motion.iterator{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None} = 1)
				if(get_control_par(motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}){Builtin, None} # HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int})
					set_control_par(motion.mnu_source[motion.iterator{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
					set_control_par(motion.lbl_enable_connect[motion.iterator{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
					set_control_par(motion.sli_min[motion.iterator{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
					set_control_par(motion.sli_max[motion.iterator{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
					set_control_par_str(motion.sli_min[motion.iterator{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, "slider_fx_handles_left" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[active_slot{int}]{int}]{string}){Builtin, None}
					set_control_par_str(motion.sli_max[motion.iterator{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, "slider_fx_handles_right" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[active_slot{int}]{int}]{string}){Builtin, None}
					set_control_par(motion.lbl_min[_curr_contr[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}, 60){Builtin, None}
					set_control_par(motion.lbl_min[_curr_contr[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT{int}, 20){Builtin, None}
					set_control_par(motion.lbl_min[_curr_contr[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}, (get_control_par(motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None} + (get_control_par(motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}){Builtin, None} / 2)) - 60){Builtin, None}
					set_control_par(motion.lbl_min[_curr_contr[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}, (get_control_par(motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}){Builtin, None} + get_control_par(motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT{int}){Builtin, None}) + 5){Builtin, None}
					set_control_par(motion.lbl_min[_curr_contr[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PARENT_PANEL{int}, get_control_par(motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PARENT_PANEL{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
					set_control_par(motion.lbl_max[_curr_contr[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}, 60){Builtin, None}
					set_control_par(motion.lbl_max[_curr_contr[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT{int}, 20){Builtin, None}
					set_control_par(motion.lbl_max[_curr_contr[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}, (get_control_par(motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None} + (get_control_par(motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}){Builtin, None} / 2)) - 60){Builtin, None}
					set_control_par(motion.lbl_max[_curr_contr[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}, (get_control_par(motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}){Builtin, None} + get_control_par(motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT{int}){Builtin, None}) + 5){Builtin, None}
					set_control_par(motion.lbl_max[_curr_contr[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PARENT_PANEL{int}, get_control_par(motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PARENT_PANEL{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
					inc(_curr_contr[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
					if(_curr_contr[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} > 4)
						message(" *** ERROR *** to many motion controls at the same time! Increase MOTION.MAX_CONCURRENT_CONTROLS! "){Builtin, None}
					end if
				end if
				set_control_par_str(motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, "slider_fx_modulation" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[active_slot{int}]{int}]{string}){Builtin, None}
				if(get_control_par(motion.mnu_source[motion.iterator{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None} = 0)
					set_control_par_str(motion.mnu_source[motion.iterator{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, "btn_fx_toggle_modwheel"){Builtin, None}
				else
					if(get_control_par(motion.mnu_source[motion.iterator{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None} = 1)
						set_control_par_str(motion.mnu_source[motion.iterator{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, "btn_fx_toggle_lfo"){Builtin, None}
					end if
				end if
			else
				set_control_par(motion.mnu_source[motion.iterator{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
				set_control_par(motion.lbl_enable_connect[motion.iterator{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
				set_control_par(motion.sli_min[motion.iterator{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
				set_control_par(motion.sli_max[motion.iterator{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
				set_control_par_str(motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, "slider_fx_handles" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[active_slot{int}]{int}]{string}){Builtin, None}
			end if
			inc(motion.iterator{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
		wait(10000){Builtin, None}
		motion.update_defense{int} := 0
	end if
end function

function motion.update_visibility(ui_id : int)
	motion.id{int} := search[motion.ui_ids{int[]}, ui_id{int}]
	if(motion.id{int} # - 1)
		if(get_control_par(ui_id{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}){Builtin, None} # HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int})
			set_control_par(motion.btn_enable[motion.id{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
			if(get_control_par(motion.btn_enable[motion.id{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None} = 1)
				set_control_par(motion.mnu_source[motion.id{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
				set_control_par(motion.sli_min[motion.id{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
				set_control_par(motion.sli_max[motion.id{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
			end if
		else
			set_control_par(motion.btn_enable[motion.id{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
			set_control_par(motion.mnu_source[motion.id{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
			set_control_par(motion.sli_min[motion.id{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
			set_control_par(motion.sli_max[motion.id{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
		end if
	end if
end function

function lfo.execute
	if(PLAYED_VOICES_INST{int} > 0)
		inc(lfo.counter{int}){Builtin, None}
		if(lfo.counter{int} >= LFO.UPDATE_RATE{int})
			lfo.counter{int} := 0
			idx{int} := 0
			while(idx{int} <= (1 - 1)) 
				if(get_control_par(btn_lfo_bypass[idx{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None} = 1)
					if(get_control_par(btn_lfo_sync[idx{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None} = 1)
						frequency[idx{int}]{real} := ((tempo{real} * 24) / 60) / real(ticks_durations[(((get_control_par(sli_lfo_freq[idx{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None} - 0) * ((num_elements[ticks_durations{int[]}] - 1) - 0)) / (1000000 - 0)) + 0]{int}){Builtin, None}
					else
						frequency[idx{int}]{real} := pow(10, (log(0.01){Builtin, None} / log(10){Builtin, None}) + (((real(get_control_par(sli_lfo_freq[idx{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None} - 0) / (1e+06 - 0)) * ((log(15.01){Builtin, None} / log(10){Builtin, None}) - (log(0.01){Builtin, None} / log(10){Builtin, None})))){Builtin, None}
					end if
					phi[idx{int}]{real} := phi[idx{int}]{real} + ((2 * NI_MATH_PI{real}) * (frequency[idx{int}]{real} / (1e+06 / int_to_real(1000 * LFO.UPDATE_RATE{int}){Builtin, None})))
					if(phi[idx{int}]{real} = (2 * NI_MATH_PI{real}))
						phi[idx{int}]{real} := 0
					end if
					select(get_control_par(mnu_lfo_type[idx{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None})
					case 0
						lfo[idx{int}]{real} := (lfo.A{real} * sin(phi[idx{int}]{real}){Builtin, None}) + lfo.A{real}
					case 1
						lfo[idx{int}]{real} := (2 * lfo.A{real}) * int_to_real(real_to_int(round((sin(phi[idx{int}]{real}){Builtin, None} + 1) / 2){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
					case 2
						lfo[idx{int}]{real} := (((2 * lfo.A{real}) / NI_MATH_PI{real}) * asin(sin(phi[idx{int}]{real}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}) + lfo.A{real}
					case 3
						lfo[idx{int}]{real} := (((- 2 * lfo.A{real}) / NI_MATH_PI{real}) * atan(cos(phi[idx{int}]{real} / 2){Builtin, None} / sin(phi[idx{int}]{real} / 2){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}) + lfo.A{real}
					end select
					motion.apply_lfo{UserDefined, Call}
				end if
				inc(idx{int}){Builtin, None}
			end while
			if(motion.once{int} = 0)
				motion.once{int} := 1
			end if
		end if
	else
		if(motion.once{int} = 1)
			idx{int} := 0
			while(idx{int} <= (1 - 1)) 
				phi[idx{int}]{real} := 0
				select(get_control_par(mnu_lfo_type[idx{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None})
				case 0
					lfo[idx{int}]{real} := (lfo.A{real} * sin(phi[idx{int}]{real}){Builtin, None}) + lfo.A{real}
				case 1
					lfo[idx{int}]{real} := (2 * lfo.A{real}) * int_to_real(real_to_int(round((sin(phi[idx{int}]{real}){Builtin, None} + 1) / 2){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
				case 2
					lfo[idx{int}]{real} := (((2 * lfo.A{real}) / NI_MATH_PI{real}) * asin(sin(phi[idx{int}]{real}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}) + lfo.A{real}
				case 3
					lfo[idx{int}]{real} := (((- 2 * lfo.A{real}) / NI_MATH_PI{real}) * atan(cos(phi[idx{int}]{real} / 2){Builtin, None} / sin(phi[idx{int}]{real} / 2){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}) + lfo.A{real}
				end select
				inc(idx{int}){Builtin, None}
			end while
			motion.apply_lfo{UserDefined, Call}
			motion.once{int} := 0
			message("stopped lfo"){Builtin, None}
		end if
	end if
end function

function fxRack.open{thread-unsafe}
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (3 - 1)) 
		xy_fxRack[_fx_slot_order[(active_slot{int} * 3) + i{int}]{int} + 1]{real} := abs(fx_slot_pos[i{int}]{real} - 1){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(lbl_fx[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}, lbl_fx_slot_pos[i{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	fxRack.update{UserDefined, Call}
	global_fx.close{UserDefined, Call}
	set_control_par(fx_display{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(fx_general_display{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_fxrack_bg{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_fxrack_top_line{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
end function

function fxRack.close
	set_control_par(fx_display{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(fx_general_display{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_fxrack_bg{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_fxrack_top_line{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
end function

function global_fx.open
	fxRack.close{UserDefined, Call}
	instrument_browser.close{UserDefined, Call}
	btn_global_fx{int} := 1
	set_control_par(global_fx_display{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(fx_general_display{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(lbl_fxrack_top_line{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, "lbl_bg_fx_panel_top_global"){Builtin, None}
	if(mnu_reverb_type{int} = 0)
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(mnu_ir{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_fxglobal_ir_previous{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_fxglobal_ir_next{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(sli_reverb_length{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_reverb_length{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(sli_reverb_predelay{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}, (get_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_fxglobal_reverb_symbol{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None} + (get_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_fxglobal_reverb_symbol{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}){Builtin, None} / 2)) - int(real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(sli_reverb_predelay{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None} * 1.5){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(sli_reverb_output{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}, (get_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_fxglobal_reverb_symbol{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None} + (get_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_fxglobal_reverb_symbol{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}){Builtin, None} / 2)) + int(real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(sli_reverb_predelay{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None} * 1){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	else
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(mnu_ir{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_fxglobal_ir_previous{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_fxglobal_ir_next{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(sli_reverb_length{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_reverb_length{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(sli_reverb_predelay{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}, ((get_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_fxglobal_reverb_symbol{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None} + (get_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_fxglobal_reverb_symbol{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}){Builtin, None} / 2)) - (get_control_par(get_ui_id(sli_reverb_predelay{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}){Builtin, None} / 2)) + 1){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(sli_reverb_output{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}, ((get_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_fxglobal_reverb_symbol{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None} + (get_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_fxglobal_reverb_symbol{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}){Builtin, None} / 2)) + (get_control_par(get_ui_id(sli_reverb_predelay{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}){Builtin, None} * 2)) + 1){Builtin, None}
	end if
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_reverb_predelay{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}, get_control_par(get_ui_id(sli_reverb_predelay{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None} - 17){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_reverb_output{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}, get_control_par(get_ui_id(sli_reverb_output{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None} - 19){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_fxrack_bg{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_fxrack_top_line{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
end function

	set_control_par(global_fx_display{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(fx_general_display{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_fxrack_bg{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_fxrack_top_line{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
end function

function global_fx.reload{thread-unsafe}
	if(mnu_reverb_type{int} = 0)
		wait_async(set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_TYPE{int}, EFFECT_TYPE_IRC{int}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
		load_ir_sample(ir_names[mnu_ir{int}]{string}, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_IRC_PREDELAY{int}, get_control_par(get_ui_id(sli_reverb_predelay{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int}){Builtin, None}
	else
		if(mnu_reverb_type{int} = 1)
			wait_async(set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_TYPE{int}, EFFECT_TYPE_PLATEREVERB{int}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
			set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_PR_DECAY{int}, get_control_par(get_ui_id(sli_reverb_length{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int}){Builtin, None}
			set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_PR_PREDELAY{int}, get_control_par(get_ui_id(sli_reverb_predelay{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int}){Builtin, None}
		else
			if(mnu_reverb_type{int} = 2)
				wait_async(set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_TYPE{int}, EFFECT_TYPE_RAUM{int}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_PREDELAY{int}, get_control_par(get_ui_id(sli_reverb_predelay{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int}){Builtin, None}
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_DECAY{int}, get_control_par(get_ui_id(sli_reverb_length{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int}){Builtin, None}
			else
				if(mnu_reverb_type{int} = 3)
					wait_async(set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_TYPE{int}, EFFECT_TYPE_REVERB2{int}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
					set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RV2_PREDELAY{int}, get_control_par(get_ui_id(sli_reverb_predelay{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int}){Builtin, None}
					set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RV2_TIME{int}, get_control_par(get_ui_id(sli_reverb_length{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int}){Builtin, None}
				end if
			end if
		end if
	end if
	if(mnu_reverb_type{int} = 0)
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_IRC_PREDELAY{int}, get_control_par(get_ui_id(sli_reverb_predelay{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int}){Builtin, None}
	else
		if(mnu_reverb_type{int} = 1)
			set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_PR_PREDELAY{int}, get_control_par(get_ui_id(sli_reverb_predelay{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int}){Builtin, None}
		else
			if(mnu_reverb_type{int} = 2)
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_PREDELAY{int}, get_control_par(get_ui_id(sli_reverb_predelay{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int}){Builtin, None}
			else
				if(mnu_reverb_type{int} = 3)
					set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RV2_PREDELAY{int}, get_control_par(get_ui_id(sli_reverb_predelay{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int}){Builtin, None}
				end if
			end if
		end if
	end if
	set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(lbl_reverb_length{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, "Time"){Builtin, None}
	if(mnu_reverb_type{int} = 0)
		set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(lbl_reverb_length{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, "N/A"){Builtin, None}
	else
		if(mnu_reverb_type{int} = 1)
			set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_PR_DECAY{int}, get_control_par(get_ui_id(sli_reverb_length{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int}){Builtin, None}
		else
			if(mnu_reverb_type{int} = 2)
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_DECAY{int}, get_control_par(get_ui_id(sli_reverb_length{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int}){Builtin, None}
			else
				if(mnu_reverb_type{int} = 3)
					set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RV2_TIME{int}, get_control_par(get_ui_id(sli_reverb_length{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int}){Builtin, None}
				end if
			end if
		end if
	end if
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_BYPASS{int}, abs(sh_right(abs(btn_comp_bypass{int}){Builtin, None} - 1, 31){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}, - 1, 0, NI_MAIN_BUS{int}){Builtin, None}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SCOMP_THRESHOLD{int}, sli_comp_threshold{int}, - 1, 0, NI_MAIN_BUS{int}){Builtin, None}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SCOMP_MAKEUP{int}, sli_comp_gain{int}, - 1, 0, NI_MAIN_BUS{int}){Builtin, None}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, get_control_par(get_ui_id(sli_reverb_output{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int}){Builtin, None}
end function

function fxRack.reorder_animation(direction : int){thread-unsafe}
	animation.position.start(fxRack.swapAnimation{int}, lbl_fx[current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int}, get_control_par(lbl_fx[current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} + direction{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None}, get_control_par(lbl_fx[current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} + direction{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}){Builtin, None}, get_control_par(lbl_fx[current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} + direction{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None}, lbl_fx_slot_pos[current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int}, 5, 1){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
	set_control_par(lbl_fx[current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} + direction{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}, get_control_par(lbl_fx[current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(lbl_fx[current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} + direction{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}, get_control_par(lbl_fx[current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (3 - 1)) 
		if(i{int} # current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int})
			xy_fxRack[_fx_slot_order[(active_slot{int} * 3) + i{int}]{int} + 1]{real} := abs(fx_slot_pos[i{int}]{real} - 1){Builtin, None}
		end if
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} := current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} + direction{int}
	fxRack.update{UserDefined, Call}
end function

function fxRack.update{thread-unsafe}
	declare local _slots[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _fx_slots[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _fx_id[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _num_fx_elements[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _fixed_parameters[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	while(fxRack.update_in_progress{int} = 1) 
		wait(100){Builtin, None}
	end while
	fxRack.update_in_progress{int} := 1
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_fxrack_top_line{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_fxrack_bg{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (3 - 1)) 
		set_control_par_str(lbl_fx[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, ""){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par_str(lbl_fx[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, fx_labels.pictures[_loaded_fx_types[(active_slot{int} * 3) + i{int}]{int}]{string}){Builtin, None}
		if(i{int} = current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int})
			set_control_par(lbl_fx[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE{int}, 2){Builtin, None}
		else
			set_control_par(lbl_fx[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE{int}, 1 - _fx_bypass[(active_slot{int} * 3) + i{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
		end if
		set_control_par(btn_fxrack_bypass[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, _fx_bypass[(active_slot{int} * 3) + i{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par_str(lbl_fxrack_type_side[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, fx_names_full[_loaded_fx_types[(active_slot{int} * 3) + i{int}]{int}]{string}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(lbl_fxrack_type_side[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE{int}, fonts.regular_white[_fx_bypass[(active_slot{int} * 3) + i{int}]{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
		if(_loaded_fx_types[(active_slot{int} * 3) + i{int}]{int} = 6)
			set_control_par(btn_fxrack_bypass[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, 0){Builtin, None}
			set_control_par(lbl_fxrack_type_side[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE{int}, fonts.regular_white[0]{int}){Builtin, None}
		end if
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_fxrack_instrument_settings{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE{int}, 0){Builtin, None}
	if((btn_fxrack_instrument_settings{int} = 0) and (current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} # - 1))
		if(current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} # - 1)
			set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(lbl_active_fx_overlay{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, get_control_par_str(lbl_fx[current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
			set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_active_fx_overlay{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}, get_control_par(lbl_fx[current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
