					set_control_par(_eq.sli_gain[(i{int} * 3) + ii{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
					set_control_par(_eq.sli_q[(i{int} * 3) + ii{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
				end if
				inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
			end while
			set_control_par(sli_attack[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
			set_control_par(sli_release[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
			if(i{int} = active_slot{int})
				set_control_par(sli_attack[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
				set_control_par(sli_release[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
				set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_attack{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
				set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_release{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
				set_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_attack_release_blocker{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} = 2)
					set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(btn_attack_release_blocker{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, "Unavailable for legato instruments."){Builtin, None}
					set_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_attack_release_blocker{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
					motion.btn_enable[search[motion.btn_enable{int[]}, sli_attack[i{int}]{int}]]{int} := 0
				else
					if(search[slot.loaded_sound{int[]}, slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}] # i{int})
						set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(btn_attack_release_blocker{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, "Only available in the first instance."){Builtin, None}
						set_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_attack_release_blocker{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
						motion.btn_enable[search[motion.btn_enable{int[]}, sli_attack[i{int}]{int}]]{int} := 0
					end if
				end if
			end if
			motion.update_visibility(sli_attack[i{int}]{int}){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
			motion.update_visibility(sli_release[i{int}]{int}){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
			inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
		update_eq_handles{UserDefined, Call}
	end if
	load_fx(active_slot{int}){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
	motion.update{UserDefined, Call}
	fxRack.update_in_progress{int} := 0
end function

function update_eq_handles
	xy_eq[0]{real} := real(get_control_par(_eq.sli_freq[active_slot{int} * 3]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None} / 1e+06
	xy_eq[1]{real} := real(get_control_par(_eq.sli_gain[active_slot{int} * 3]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None} / 1e+06
	xy_eq[2]{real} := real(get_control_par(_eq.sli_freq[(active_slot{int} * 3) + 1]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None} / 1e+06
	xy_eq[3]{real} := real(get_control_par(_eq.sli_gain[(active_slot{int} * 3) + 1]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None} / 1e+06
	xy_eq[4]{real} := real(get_control_par(_eq.sli_freq[(active_slot{int} * 3) + 2]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None} / 1e+06
	xy_eq[5]{real} := real(get_control_par(_eq.sli_gain[(active_slot{int} * 3) + 2]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None} / 1e+06
end function

function load_fx(sl : int){thread-unsafe}
	declare local _fx_slots[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _fx_id[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _num_fx_elements[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _fixed_parameters[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	if(get_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_TYPE{int}, - 1, eq_position[sl{int}]{int} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + sl{int}){Builtin, None} # EFFECT_TYPE_FILTER{int})
		wait_async(set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_TYPE{int}, EFFECT_TYPE_NONE{int}, - 1, abs(sh_right(abs(eq_position[sl{int}]{int}){Builtin, None} - 1, 31){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + sl{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
		wait_async(set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_TYPE{int}, EFFECT_TYPE_FILTER{int}, - 1, eq_position[sl{int}]{int} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + sl{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
		wait_async(set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_SUBTYPE{int}, FILTER_TYPE_EQ3BAND{int}, - 1, eq_position[sl{int}]{int} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + sl{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	end if
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_BYPASS{int}, abs(sh_right(abs(eq_bypass[sl{int}]{int}){Builtin, None} - 1, 31){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}, - 1, eq_position[sl{int}]{int} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + sl{int}){Builtin, None}
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (3 - 1)) 
		set_eq_freq(sl{int}, i{int}, get_control_par(_eq.sli_freq[(sl{int} * 3) + i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}){UserDefined, Inlining}
		set_eq_gain(sl{int}, i{int}, get_control_par(_eq.sli_gain[(sl{int} * 3) + i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}){UserDefined, Inlining}
		set_eq_q(sl{int}, i{int}, get_control_par(_eq.sli_q[(sl{int} * 3) + i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}){UserDefined, Inlining}
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	s{int} := search[_sli_fxrack_control{int[]}, sli_attack[sl{int}]{int}]
	if(s{int} # - 1)
		fxRack.value{int} := get_control_par(_sli_fxrack_control[s{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}
		fxRack.slot{int} := s{int} / (4 * 3)
		fxRack.fx_slot{int} := (s{int} / 4) mod 3
		fxRack.control{int} := s{int} mod 4
		fxRack.ui_id{int} := sli_attack[sl{int}]{int}
		if(_loaded_fx_types[(fxRack.slot{int} * 3) + fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int} # 6)
			fxRack.execute_slider{UserDefined, Call}
		end if
	end if
	string_buffer{string} := "N/A"
	s{int} := search[sli_attack{int[]}, sli_attack[sl{int}]{int}]
	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
		if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
				mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR"){Builtin, None}
				tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, get_control_par(sli_attack[sl{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}){Builtin, None}
				string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
				inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
			end while
		else
			if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
					mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
					tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}

					inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
				end while
			else
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
					i{int} := 0
					while(i{int} <= ((instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - (((instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - 0) .and. sh_right((instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - 0, 31){Builtin, None}))) 
						ii{int} := 0
						while(ii{int} <= ((instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - (((instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - 0) .and. sh_right((instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - 0, 31){Builtin, None}))) 
							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR"){Builtin, None}
							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
							set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, get_control_par(sli_attack[sl{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}){Builtin, None}
							string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
							inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
						end while
						inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
					end while
				end if
			end if
		end if
		if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
			set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(lbl_attack{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, string_buffer{string}){Builtin, None}
			timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_attack{int}){Builtin, None}, "Attack", 0){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
		end if
	end if
	s{int} := search[sli_release{int[]}, sli_attack[sl{int}]{int}]
	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
		if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
				mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR"){Builtin, None}
				tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}

				inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
			end while
		else
			if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
					mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
					tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
					set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, get_control_par(sli_attack[sl{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}){Builtin, None}
					string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
					inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
				end while
			else
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
					i{int} := 0
					while(i{int} <= ((instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - (((instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - 0) .and. sh_right((instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - 0, 31){Builtin, None}))) 
						ii{int} := 0
						while(ii{int} <= ((instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - (((instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - 0) .and. sh_right((instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - 0, 31){Builtin, None}))) 
							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR"){Builtin, None}
							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
							set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, get_control_par(sli_attack[sl{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}){Builtin, None}
							string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
							inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
						end while
						inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
					end while
				end if
			end if
		end if
		if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
			set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(lbl_release{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, string_buffer{string}){Builtin, None}
			timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_release{int}){Builtin, None}, "Release", 0){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
		end if
	end if
	set_control_par_str(sli_attack[sl{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_LABEL{int}, string_buffer{string}){Builtin, None}
	s{int} := search[_sli_fxrack_control{int[]}, sli_release[sl{int}]{int}]
	if(s{int} # - 1)
		fxRack.value{int} := get_control_par(_sli_fxrack_control[s{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}
		fxRack.slot{int} := s{int} / (4 * 3)
		fxRack.fx_slot{int} := (s{int} / 4) mod 3
		fxRack.control{int} := s{int} mod 4
		fxRack.ui_id{int} := sli_release[sl{int}]{int}
		if(_loaded_fx_types[(fxRack.slot{int} * 3) + fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int} # 6)
			fxRack.execute_slider{UserDefined, Call}
		end if
	end if
	string_buffer{string} := "N/A"
	s{int} := search[sli_attack{int[]}, sli_release[sl{int}]{int}]
	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
		if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
				mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR"){Builtin, None}
				tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, get_control_par(sli_release[sl{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}){Builtin, None}
				string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
				inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
			end while
		else

					mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
					tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
					set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, get_control_par(sli_release[sl{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}){Builtin, None}
					string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
					inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
				end while
			else
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
					i{int} := 0
					while(i{int} <= ((instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - (((instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - 0) .and. sh_right((instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - 0, 31){Builtin, None}))) 
						ii{int} := 0
						while(ii{int} <= ((instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - (((instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - 0) .and. sh_right((instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - 0, 31){Builtin, None}))) 
							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR"){Builtin, None}

						timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_release{int}){Builtin, None}, "Release", 0){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
					end if
				end if
				set_control_par_str(_sli_fxrack_control[(sl{int} * 12) + ((_fx_slots[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod 100]{int} * 4) + ii{int})]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_LABEL{int}, string_buffer{string}){Builtin, None}
			end if
			inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
		inc(_fx_slots[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function fxRack.update_allround{thread-unsafe}
	declare local _slots[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	_slots[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} := 0
	while(_slots[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} <= (2 - 1)) 
		load_fx(_slots[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
		inc(_slots[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function btn_fxrack_type.reset
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (7 - 2)) 
		set_control_par(btn_fxrack_type[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, 0){Builtin, None}
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function fxRack.execute_slider
	declare local _target : int := _all_fx_settings[all_fx_settings.pos[fx_list_ids[_loaded_fx_types[(fxRack.slot{int} * 3) + fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int}]{int} + _loaded_fx_subtypes[(fxRack.slot{int} * 3) + fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int}]{unknown} + (2 + (fxRack.control{int} * 2))]{unknown} {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _is_delay_sync : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	if(_fx_bypass[(fxRack.slot{int} * 3) + fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int} = 1)
		if(_target{int} = ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int})
			set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_DRY_LEVEL{int}, drywet[(1000000 - fxRack.value{int}) / 1000]{int}, - 1, fxRack.fx_slot{int} + 1, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + fxRack.slot{int}){Builtin, None}
			set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, drywet[fxRack.value{int} / 1000]{int}, - 1, fxRack.fx_slot{int} + 1, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + fxRack.slot{int}){Builtin, None}
		else
			if((((_target{int} = ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TIME{int}) or (_target{int} = ENGINE_PAR_DL_TIME{int})) or (_target{int} = ENGINE_PAR_PSYDL_TIME{int})) and (_delay_sync[(fxRack.slot{int} * 3) + fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int} = 1))
				set_engine_par(_all_fx_settings[all_fx_settings.pos[fx_list_ids[_loaded_fx_types[(fxRack.slot{int} * 3) + fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int}]{int} + _loaded_fx_subtypes[(fxRack.slot{int} * 3) + fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int}]{unknown} + 8]{unknown}, ni_sync_units[(((fxRack.value{int} - 0) * ((num_elements[ni_sync_units{int[]}] - 1) - 0)) / (1000000 - 0)) + 0]{int} + NI_SYNC_UNIT_ABS{int}, - 1, fxRack.fx_slot{int} + 1, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + fxRack.slot{int}){Builtin, None}
				_is_delay_sync{int} := 1
			else
				set_engine_par(_target{int}, fxRack.value{int}, - 1, fxRack.fx_slot{int} + 1, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + fxRack.slot{int}){Builtin, None}
			end if
		end if
		if(fxRack.do_not_trigger_label{int} = 0)
			if((active_slot{int} = fxRack.slot{int}) and (current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} = fxRack.fx_slot{int}))
				set_control_par_str(lbl_fxrack_control[fxRack.control{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, get_engine_par_disp(_target{int}, - 1, fxRack.fx_slot{int} + 1, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + fxRack.slot{int}){Builtin, None} & _all_fx_texts[all_fx_texts.pos[fx_list_ids[_loaded_fx_types[(fxRack.slot{int} * 3) + current_fx_slot[fxRack.slot{int}]{int}]{int}]{int} + _loaded_fx_subtypes[(fxRack.slot{int} * 3) + current_fx_slot[fxRack.slot{int}]{int}]{int}]{unknown} + (2 + (fxRack.control{int} * 2))]{unknown}){Builtin, None}
				if(_is_delay_sync{int} = 1)
					set_control_par_str(lbl_fxrack_control[fxRack.control{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, durations[(((fxRack.value{int} - 0) * ((num_elements[ni_sync_units{int[]}] - 1) - 0)) / (1000000 - 0)) + 0]{string}){Builtin, None}
				end if
				timed_display.trigger(lbl_fxrack_control[fxRack.control{int}]{int}, _all_fx_texts[all_fx_texts.pos[fx_list_ids[_loaded_fx_types[(fxRack.slot{int} * 3) + current_fx_slot[fxRack.slot{int}]{int}]{int}]{int} + _loaded_fx_subtypes[(fxRack.slot{int} * 3) + current_fx_slot[fxRack.slot{int}]{int}]{int}]{unknown} + (1 + (fxRack.control{int} * 2))]{unknown}, 0){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
			end if
		else
			fxRack.do_not_trigger_label{int} := 0
		end if
	end if
end function

function eq.curve
	eq.freq[0]{real} := (((real(get_control_par(_eq.sli_freq[active_slot{int} * 3]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None} - 0) * (real(50){Builtin, None} - 0)) / (1e+06 - 0)) + 0
	eq.freq[1]{real} := (((real(get_control_par(_eq.sli_freq[(active_slot{int} * 3) + 1]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None} - 0) * (real(50){Builtin, None} - 0)) / (1e+06 - 0)) + 0
	eq.freq[2]{real} := (((real(get_control_par(_eq.sli_freq[(active_slot{int} * 3) + 2]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None} - 0) * (real(50){Builtin, None} - 0)) / (1e+06 - 0)) + 0
	eq.gain[0]{real} := (((real(get_control_par(_eq.sli_gain[active_slot{int} * 3]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None} - 0) * (1000 - - 1000)) / (1e+06 - 0)) + - 1000
	eq.gain[1]{real} := (((real(get_control_par(_eq.sli_gain[(active_slot{int} * 3) + 1]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None} - 0) * (1000 - - 1000)) / (1e+06 - 0)) + - 1000
	eq.gain[2]{real} := (((real(get_control_par(_eq.sli_gain[(active_slot{int} * 3) + 2]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None} - 0) * (1000 - - 1000)) / (1e+06 - 0)) + - 1000
	eq.q[0]{real} := (((real(get_control_par(_eq.sli_q[active_slot{int} * 3]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None} - 0) * (18 - 2)) / (1e+06 - 0)) + 2
	eq.q[1]{real} := (((real(get_control_par(_eq.sli_q[(active_slot{int} * 3) + 1]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None} - 0) * (18 - 2)) / (1e+06 - 0)) + 2
	eq.q[2]{real} := (((real(get_control_par(_eq.sli_q[(active_slot{int} * 3) + 2]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None} - 0) * (18 - 2)) / (1e+06 - 0)) + 2
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (50 - 1)) 
		_eq.band[i{int}]{int} := int(eq.gain[0]{real} * exp(- 0.5 * pow((real(i{int}){Builtin, None} - eq.freq[0]{real}) / eq.q[0]{real}, 2){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
		_eq.band[50 + i{int}]{int} := int(eq.gain[1]{real} * exp(- 0.5 * pow((real(i{int}){Builtin, None} - eq.freq[1]{real}) / eq.q[1]{real}, 2){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
		_eq.band[100 + i{int}]{int} := int(eq.gain[2]{real} * exp(- 0.5 * pow((real(i{int}){Builtin, None} - eq.freq[2]{real}) / eq.q[2]{real}, 2){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(btn_eq_display[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT{int}, ((((((_eq.band[i{int}]{int} + _eq.band[50 + i{int}]{int}) + _eq.band[100 + i{int}]{int}) * (1 + (sh_right(1000 - ((_eq.band[i{int}]{int} + _eq.band[50 + i{int}]{int}) + _eq.band[100 + i{int}]{int}), 31){Builtin, None} .or. sh_right(((_eq.band[i{int}]{int} + _eq.band[50 + i{int}]{int}) + _eq.band[100 + i{int}]{int}) - - 1000, 31){Builtin, None}))) - (- 1000 * sh_right(((_eq.band[i{int}]{int} + _eq.band[50 + i{int}]{int}) + _eq.band[100 + i{int}]{int}) - - 1000, 31){Builtin, None})) - (1000 * sh_right(1000 - ((_eq.band[i{int}]{int} + _eq.band[50 + i{int}]{int}) + _eq.band[100 + i{int}]{int}), 31){Builtin, None})) + 1000) / 32){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(btn_eq_display[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}, (82 + 63) - get_control_par(btn_eq_display[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function set_eq_freq(slot : int, band : int, value : int)
	select(band{unknown})
	case 0
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_FREQ1{int}, value{int}, - 1, eq_position[slot{int}]{int} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + slot{int}){Builtin, None}
	case 1
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_FREQ2{int}, value{int}, - 1, eq_position[slot{int}]{int} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + slot{int}){Builtin, None}
	case 2
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_FREQ3{int}, value{int}, - 1, eq_position[slot{int}]{int} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + slot{int}){Builtin, None}
	end select
end function

function set_eq_gain(slot : int, band : int, value : int)
	select(band{unknown})
	case 0
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_GAIN1{int}, value{int}, - 1, eq_position[slot{int}]{int} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + slot{int}){Builtin, None}
	case 1
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_GAIN2{int}, value{int}, - 1, eq_position[slot{int}]{int} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + slot{int}){Builtin, None}
	case 2
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_GAIN3{int}, value{int}, - 1, eq_position[slot{int}]{int} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + slot{int}){Builtin, None}
	end select
end function

function set_eq_q(slot : int, band : int, value : int)
	select(band{unknown})
	case 0
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_BW1{int}, value{int}, - 1, eq_position[slot{int}]{int} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + slot{int}){Builtin, None}
	case 1
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_BW2{int}, value{int}, - 1, eq_position[slot{int}]{int} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + slot{int}){Builtin, None}
	case 2
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_BW3{int}, value{int}, - 1, eq_position[slot{int}]{int} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + slot{int}){Builtin, None}
	end select
end function

function fxRack.save{thread-unsafe}{restricted}
	declare local _inc[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} := 0
	fxRack.save_array[_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}]{int} := 1
	inc(_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (3 - 1)) 
		fxRack.save_array[_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}]{int} := _fx_bypass[(active_slot{int} * 3) + i{int}]{int}
		inc(_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (3 - 1)) 
		fxRack.save_array[_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}]{int} := _delay_sync[(active_slot{int} * 3) + i{int}]{int}
		inc(_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (3 - 1)) 
		fxRack.save_array[_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}]{int} := _loaded_fx_types[(active_slot{int} * 3) + i{int}]{int}
		inc(_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (3 - 1)) 
		fxRack.save_array[_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}]{int} := _loaded_fx_subtypes[(active_slot{int} * 3) + i{int}]{int}
		inc(_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (3 - 1)) 
		ii{int} := 0
		while(ii{int} <= (4 - 1)) 
			fxRack.save_array[_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}]{int} := get_control_par(_sli_fxrack_control[(active_slot{int} * 12) + ((i{int} * 4) + ii{int})]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}
			inc(_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
			fxRack.save_array[_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}]{int} := get_control_par(motion.sli_min[search[motion.ui_ids{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[(active_slot{int} * 12) + ((i{int} * 4) + ii{int})]{int}]]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}
			inc(_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
			fxRack.save_array[_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}]{int} := get_control_par(motion.sli_max[search[motion.ui_ids{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[(active_slot{int} * 12) + ((i{int} * 4) + ii{int})]{int}]]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}
			inc(_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
			fxRack.save_array[_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}]{int} := get_control_par(motion.btn_enable[search[motion.ui_ids{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[(active_slot{int} * 12) + ((i{int} * 4) + ii{int})]{int}]]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}
			inc(_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
			fxRack.save_array[_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}]{int} := get_control_par(motion.mnu_source[search[motion.ui_ids{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[(active_slot{int} * 12) + ((i{int} * 4) + ii{int})]{int}]]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}
			inc(_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
			inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	fxRack.save_array[_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}]{int} := get_control_par(sli_attack[active_slot{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}
	inc(_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
	fxRack.save_array[_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}]{int} := get_control_par(motion.sli_min[search[motion.ui_ids{int[]}, sli_attack[active_slot{int}]{int}]]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}
	inc(_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
	fxRack.save_array[_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}]{int} := get_control_par(motion.sli_max[search[motion.ui_ids{int[]}, sli_attack[active_slot{int}]{int}]]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}
	inc(_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
	fxRack.save_array[_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}]{int} := get_control_par(motion.btn_enable[search[motion.ui_ids{int[]}, sli_attack[active_slot{int}]{int}]]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}
	inc(_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
	fxRack.save_array[_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}]{int} := get_control_par(motion.mnu_source[search[motion.ui_ids{int[]}, sli_attack[active_slot{int}]{int}]]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}
	inc(_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
	fxRack.save_array[_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}]{int} := get_control_par(sli_release[active_slot{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}
	inc(_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
	fxRack.save_array[_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}]{int} := get_control_par(motion.sli_min[search[motion.ui_ids{int[]}, sli_release[active_slot{int}]{int}]]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}
	inc(_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
	fxRack.save_array[_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}]{int} := get_control_par(motion.sli_max[search[motion.ui_ids{int[]}, sli_release[active_slot{int}]{int}]]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}
	inc(_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
	fxRack.save_array[_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}]{int} := get_control_par(motion.btn_enable[search[motion.ui_ids{int[]}, sli_release[active_slot{int}]{int}]]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}
	inc(_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
	fxRack.save_array[_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}]{int} := get_control_par(motion.mnu_source[search[motion.ui_ids{int[]}, sli_release[active_slot{int}]{int}]]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}
	inc(_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= 2) 
		fxRack.save_array[_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}]{int} := get_control_par(_eq.sli_freq[(active_slot{int} * 3) + i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}
		inc(_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= 2) 
		fxRack.save_array[_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}]{int} := get_control_par(_eq.sli_gain[(active_slot{int} * 3) + i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}
		inc(_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= 2) 
		fxRack.save_array[_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}]{int} := get_control_par(_eq.sli_q[(active_slot{int} * 3) + i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}
		inc(_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	fxRack.save_array[_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}]{int} := eq_position[active_slot{int}]{int}
	inc(_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
	fxRack.save_array[_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}]{int} := eq_bypass[active_slot{int}]{int}
	wait_async(save_array_str(fxRack.save_array{int[]}, get_folder(GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR{int}){Builtin, None} & "../fx-presets/fxpreset" & slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int} & ".nka"){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	fxRack.save_array[0]{int} := 0
end function

function fxRack.load{thread-unsafe}
	declare local _inc[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} := 0
	if(fxRack.save_array[_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
		fxRack.save_array[0]{int} := 0
		inc(_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (3 - 1)) 
			_fx_bypass[(active_slot{int} * 3) + i{int}]{int} := fxRack.save_array[_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}]{int}
			inc(_inc[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
			inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (3 - 1))
