					while(i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
						mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
						tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
						set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, get_control_par(sli_release[active_slot{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}){Builtin, None}
						string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
						inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
					end while
				else
					if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
						i{int} := 0
						while(i{int} <= ((instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - (((instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - 0) .and. sh_right((instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - 0, 31){Builtin, None}))) 
							ii{int} := 0
							while(ii{int} <= ((instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - (((instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - 0) .and. sh_right((instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - 0, 31){Builtin, None}))) 
								mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR"){Builtin, None}
								tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
								set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, get_control_par(sli_release[active_slot{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}){Builtin, None}
								string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
								inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
							end while
							inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
						end while
					end if
				end if
			end if
			if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
				set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(lbl_attack{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, string_buffer{string}){Builtin, None}
				timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_attack{int}){Builtin, None}, "Attack", 0){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
			end if
		end if
		s{int} := search[sli_release{int[]}, sli_release[active_slot{int}]{int}]
		if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
			if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
					mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR"){Builtin, None}
					tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
					set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, get_control_par(sli_release[active_slot{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}){Builtin, None}
					string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
					inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
				end while
			else
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
					i{int} := 0
					while(i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
						mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
						tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
						set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, get_control_par(sli_release[active_slot{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}){Builtin, None}
						string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
						inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
					end while
				else
					if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
						i{int} := 0
						while(i{int} <= ((instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - (((instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - 0) .and. sh_right((instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - 0, 31){Builtin, None}))) 
							ii{int} := 0
							while(ii{int} <= ((instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - (((instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - 0) .and. sh_right((instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - 0, 31){Builtin, None}))) 
								mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR"){Builtin, None}
								tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
								set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, get_control_par(sli_release[active_slot{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}){Builtin, None}
								string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
								inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
							end while
							inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
						end while
					end if
				end if
			end if
			if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
				set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(lbl_release{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, string_buffer{string}){Builtin, None}
				timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_release{int}){Builtin, None}, "Release", 0){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
			end if
		end if
		set_control_par_str(sli_release[active_slot{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_LABEL{int}, string_buffer{string}){Builtin, None}
	else
		message("INSTRUMENT FX PRESET OF " & slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int} & " NOT FOUND"){Builtin, None}
	end if
end function

function single_nki.gui_update
	if(show_fx_rack{int} = 0)
		set_control_par(eq_display{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_fxrack_top_line{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_fxrack_bg{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
		btn_fxrack_instrument_settings{int} := 0
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_fxrack_instrument_settings{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE{int}, 0){Builtin, None}
	else
		set_control_par(eq_display{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
	end if
end function

function read_slot_colors
	declare local _idx : int {Reuses: 0}
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (2 - 1)) 
		_idx{int} := search[_instrument_browser.structure{int[]}, slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]
		if(slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int} # - 1)
			slot_colors[i{int}]{int} := ((_idx{int} / 16) / 11) + 1
		else
			slot_colors[i{int}]{int} := 0
		end if
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function motion.mw_animation
	declare local pic_state : int {Reuses: 0}
	pic_state{int} := int(126 * (real(motion.modwheel{int}){Builtin, None} / 127)){Builtin, None}
	if(btn_midi_mode{int} = 1)
		pic_state{int} := 126
	end if
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(anim.mw_lightstrip{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE{int}, pic_state{int}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(anim.mw_fingertouch{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE{int}, pic_state{int}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(anim.bg_top_left{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE{int}, pic_state{int}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(anim.bg_top_right{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE{int}, pic_state{int}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(anim.bg_side_left{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE{int}, pic_state{int}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(anim.bg_side_right{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE{int}, pic_state{int}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(anim.bg_bottom{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE{int}, pic_state{int}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(anim.bg_score_title{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE{int}, pic_state{int}){Builtin, None}
	if(NI_CALLBACK_TYPE{int} # NI_CB_TYPE_PERSISTENCE_CHANGED{int})
		motion.modwheel_show_glow(1){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
	end if
	mw_active{int} := 1
end function

function motion.modwheel_show_glow(bool : int)
	if((mw_active{int} = 0) and (bool{int} = 1))
		animation.abort(mw_fade_animation{int}){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
		animation.picture.start(mw_fade_animation{int}, get_ui_id(anim.mw_fade{int}){Builtin, None}, 29, 0, 5, 2){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
	else
		if((mw_active{int} = 1) and (bool{int} = 0))
			animation.abort(mw_fade_animation{int}){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
			animation.picture.start(mw_fade_animation{int}, get_ui_id(anim.mw_fade{int}){Builtin, None}, 0, 29, 15, 3){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
		end if
	end if
	if((mw_active{int} = 1) and (bool{int} = 1))
		mw_touched_counter{int} := 0
	end if
end function

function gui_animation.show_side_panels(bool : int)
	if(bool{int} = 1)
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(anim.mw_fingertouch{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(anim.mw_fade{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_mw_bg{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_global_fx_bg{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(anim.mw_lightstrip{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
	else
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(anim.mw_fingertouch{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(anim.mw_fade{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_mw_bg{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_global_fx_bg{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(anim.mw_lightstrip{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
	end if
end function

function set_title_colors(offset : int)
	declare local _num_slots : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _color : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _idx : int {Reuses: 0}
	_num_slots{int} := 2 - ((2 - 5) .and. sh_right(5 - 2, 31){Builtin, None})
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= 4) 
		set_control_par(anim.bg_score_title.colors[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
		_color{int} := slot_colors[((i{int} * _num_slots{int}) / 5) + offset{int}]{int} - 1
		if(_color{int} >= 0)
			set_control_par(anim.bg_score_title.colors[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE{int}, _color{int}){Builtin, None}
		else
			set_control_par(anim.bg_score_title.colors[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
		end if
		if(_num_slots{int} = 2)
			set_control_par(anim.bg_score_title.colors[2]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
		end if
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function nks.update_all_labels
	nks.update_shape_slider{UserDefined, Call}
	nks.update_attack_release_labels{UserDefined, Call}
	nks.update_global_fx_labels{UserDefined, Call}
end function

function nks.update_shape_slider
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (2 - 1)) 
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, get_control_par(sli_volume_min[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + i{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par_str(sli_volume_min[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_LABEL{int}, get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + i{int}){Builtin, None} & " dB"){Builtin, None}
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, get_control_par(sli_volume_max[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + i{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par_str(sli_volume_max[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_LABEL{int}, get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + i{int}){Builtin, None} & " dB"){Builtin, None}
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	execute_morph_faders{UserDefined, Call}
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (2 - 1)) 
		set_control_par_str(sli_pan[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_LABEL{int}, get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_PAN{int}, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + i{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par_str(sli_rev_send[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_LABEL{int}, get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_SENDLEVEL_0{int}, - 1, 7, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + i{int}){Builtin, None} & " dB"){Builtin, None}
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function nks.update_attack_release_labels
	s{int} := 0
	while(s{int} <= (2 - 1)) 
		string_buffer{string} := "N/A"
		if(slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1)
			if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
					mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR"){Builtin, None}
					tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
					string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
					inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
				end while
			else
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
					i{int} := 0
					while(i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
						mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
						tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
						string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
						inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
					end while
				else
					if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
						i{int} := 0
						while(i{int} <= ((instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - (((instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - 0) .and. sh_right((instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - 0, 31){Builtin, None}))) 
							ii{int} := 0
							while(ii{int} <= ((instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - (((instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - 0) .and. sh_right((instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - 0, 31){Builtin, None}))) 
								mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR"){Builtin, None}
								tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
								string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
								inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
							end while
							inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
						end while
					end if
				end if
			end if
		end if
		set_control_par_str(sli_attack[s{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_LABEL{int}, string_buffer{string}){Builtin, None}
		message("label set - " & get_control_par_str(sli_attack[s{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_LABEL{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
		inc(s{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	s{int} := 0
	while(s{int} <= (2 - 1)) 
		string_buffer{string} := "N/A"
		if(slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1)
			if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
					mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR"){Builtin, None}
					tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
					string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
					inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
				end while
			else
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
					i{int} := 0
					while(i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
						mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
						tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
						string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
						inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
					end while
				else
					if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
						i{int} := 0
						while(i{int} <= ((instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - (((instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - 0) .and. sh_right((instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - 0, 31){Builtin, None}))) 
							ii{int} := 0
							while(ii{int} <= ((instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - (((instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - 0) .and. sh_right((instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1) - 0, 31){Builtin, None}))) 
								mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR"){Builtin, None}
								tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
								string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
								inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
							end while
							inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
						end while
					end if
				end if
			end if
		end if
		set_control_par_str(sli_release[s{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_LABEL{int}, string_buffer{string}){Builtin, None}
		inc(s{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function nks.update_global_fx_labels
	set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(sli_comp_threshold{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_LABEL{int}, get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_SCOMP_THRESHOLD{int}, - 1, 0, NI_MAIN_BUS{int}){Builtin, None} & " dB"){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(sli_comp_gain{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_LABEL{int}, get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_SCOMP_MAKEUP{int}, - 1, 0, NI_MAIN_BUS{int}){Builtin, None} & " dB"){Builtin, None}
	if(mnu_reverb_type{int} = 0)
		set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(sli_reverb_length{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_LABEL{int}, "N/A"){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(sli_reverb_predelay{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_LABEL{int}, ((real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(sli_reverb_predelay{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None} / 10000){Builtin, None} / 100) * 300) & " ms"){Builtin, None}
	else
		if(mnu_reverb_type{int} = 1)
			set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(sli_reverb_predelay{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_LABEL{int}, get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_PR_PREDELAY{int}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int}){Builtin, None} & " ms"){Builtin, None}
			set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(sli_reverb_length{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_LABEL{int}, get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_PR_DECAY{int}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int}){Builtin, None} & " ms"){Builtin, None}
		else
			if(mnu_reverb_type{int} = 2)
				set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(sli_reverb_predelay{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_LABEL{int}, get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_PREDELAY{int}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int}){Builtin, None} & " ms"){Builtin, None}
				set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(sli_reverb_length{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_LABEL{int}, get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_DECAY{int}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int}){Builtin, None} & " ms"){Builtin, None}
			else
				if(mnu_reverb_type{int} = 3)
					set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(sli_reverb_predelay{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_LABEL{int}, get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RV2_PREDELAY{int}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int}){Builtin, None} & " ms"){Builtin, None}
					set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(sli_reverb_length{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_LABEL{int}, get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RV2_TIME{int}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int}){Builtin, None} & " ms"){Builtin, None}
				end if
			end if
		end if
	end if
	set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(sli_reverb_output{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_LABEL{int}, get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int}){Builtin, None} & " dB"){Builtin, None}
	if(get_control_par(btn_lfo_sync[0]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None} = 1)
		frequency[0]{real} := ((tempo{real} * 24) / 60) / real(ticks_durations[(((get_control_par(sli_lfo_freq[0]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None} - 0) * ((num_elements[ticks_durations{int[]}] - 1) - 0)) / (1000000 - 0)) + 0]{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par_str(sli_lfo_freq[0]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_LABEL{int}, durations[(((get_control_par(sli_lfo_freq[0]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None} - 0) * ((num_elements[ticks_durations{int[]}] - 1) - 0)) / (1000000 - 0)) + 0]{string}){Builtin, None}
	else
		frequency[0]{real} := pow(10, (log(0.01){Builtin, None} / log(10){Builtin, None}) + (((real(get_control_par(sli_lfo_freq[0]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None} - 0) / (1e+06 - 0)) * ((log(15.01){Builtin, None} / log(10){Builtin, None}) - (log(0.01){Builtin, None} / log(10){Builtin, None})))){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par_str(sli_lfo_freq[0]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_LABEL{int}, (int_to_real(real_to_int(frequency[0]{real} * 100){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None} / 100) & " Hz"){Builtin, None}
	end if
	set_control_par_str(sli_lfo_type[0]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_LABEL{int}, lfo_type_strings[get_control_par(mnu_lfo_type[0]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}]{string}){Builtin, None}
end function

function version.update
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
		if(version[i{int}]{int} # - 1)
			LIB_VERSION_NUM{string} := LIB_VERSION_NUM{string} & version[i{int}]{int}
			if(version[i{int} + 1]{int} # - 1)
				LIB_VERSION_NUM{string} := LIB_VERSION_NUM{string} & "."
			end if
		end if
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function undo.create
	declare local _difference : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	array.cascade(undo.valid{int[]}, 1){UserDefined, Inlining}
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (12 - 2)) 
		ii{int} := 0
		while(ii{int} <= (((8 * 7) * 4) - 1)) 
			iii{int} := 0
			while(iii{int} <= (3 - 1)) 
				_melody.undo[((11 - i{int}) * 672) + ((ii{int} * 3) + iii{int})]{int} := _melody.undo[((10 - i{int}) * 672) + ((ii{int} * 3) + iii{int})]{int}
				inc(iii{int}){Builtin, None}
			end while
			inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
		ii{int} := 0
		while(ii{int} <= (8 - 1)) 
			iii{int} := 0
			while(iii{int} <= (7 - 1)) 
				_melody_rates.undo[((11 - i{int}) * 56) + ((ii{int} * 7) + iii{int})]{int} := _melody_rates.undo[((10 - i{int}) * 56) + ((ii{int} * 7) + iii{int})]{int}
				inc(iii{int}){Builtin, None}
			end while
			inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	ii{int} := 0
	while(ii{int} <= (((8 * 7) * 4) - 1)) 
		iii{int} := 0
		while(iii{int} <= (3 - 1)) 
			if(_melody.undo[(ii{int} * 3) + iii{int}]{int} # _melody[(ii{int} * 3) + iii{int}]{int})
				_difference{int} := 1
			end if
			_melody.undo[(ii{int} * 3) + iii{int}]{int} := _melody[(ii{int} * 3) + iii{int}]{int}
			inc(iii{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
		inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	ii{int} := 0
	while(ii{int} <= (8 - 1)) 
		iii{int} := 0
		while(iii{int} <= (7 - 1)) 
			if(_melody_rates.undo[(ii{int} * 7) + iii{int}]{int} # _melody_rates[(ii{int} * 7) + iii{int}]{int})
				_difference{int} := 1
			end if
			_melody_rates.undo[(ii{int} * 7) + iii{int}]{int} := _melody_rates[(ii{int} * 7) + iii{int}]{int}
			inc(iii{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
		inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(btn_undo{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, "btn_chordstudio_undo"){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(btn_edit_undo{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, "btn_chordstudio_undo"){Builtin, None}
	undo.active{int} := 1
	if(_difference{int} = 0)
		undo.load{UserDefined, Call}
	end if
end function

function undo.load
	ii{int} := 0
	while(ii{int} <= (((8 * 7) * 4) - 1)) 
		iii{int} := 0
		while(iii{int} <= (3 - 1)) 
			_melody.redo[(ii{int} * 3) + iii{int}]{int} := _melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((ii{int} * 3) + iii{int})]{int}
			inc(iii{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
		inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	ii{int} := 0
	while(ii{int} <= (8 - 1)) 
		iii{int} := 0
		while(iii{int} <= (7 - 1)) 
			_melody_rates.redo[(ii{int} * 7) + iii{int}]{int} := _melody_rates[(ii{int} * 7) + iii{int}]{int}
			inc(iii{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
		inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(btn_redo{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, "btn_chordstudio_redo"){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(btn_edit_redo{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, "btn_chordstudio_redo"){Builtin, None}
	redo.active{int} := 1
	array.cascade_inv(undo.valid{int[]}, 0){UserDefined, Inlining}
	ii{int} := 0
	while(ii{int} <= (((8 * 7) * 4) - 1)) 
		iii{int} := 0
		while(iii{int} <= (3 - 1)) 
			_melody[(ii{int} * 3) + iii{int}]{int} := _melody.undo[(ii{int} * 3) + iii{int}]{int}
			inc(iii{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
		inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	ii{int} := 0
	while(ii{int} <= (8 - 1)) 
		iii{int} := 0
		while(iii{int} <= (7 - 1)) 
			_melody_rates[(ii{int} * 7) + iii{int}]{int} := _melody_rates.undo[(ii{int} * 7) + iii{int}]{int}
			inc(iii{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
		inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	i{int} := 1
	while(i{int} <= (12 - 1)) 
		ii{int} := 0
		while(ii{int} <= (((8 * 7) * 4) - 1)) 
			iii{int} := 0
			while(iii{int} <= (3 - 1)) 
				_melody.undo[((i{int} - 1) * 672) + ((ii{int} * 3) + iii{int})]{int} := _melody.undo[(i{int} * 672) + ((ii{int} * 3) + iii{int})]{int}
				inc(iii{int}){Builtin, None}
			end while
			inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
		ii{int} := 0
		while(ii{int} <= (8 - 1)) 
			iii{int} := 0
			while(iii{int} <= (7 - 1)) 
				_melody_rates.undo[((i{int} - 1) * 56) + ((ii{int} * 7) + iii{int})]{int} := _melody_rates.undo[(i{int} * 56) + ((ii{int} * 7) + iii{int})]{int}
				inc(iii{int}){Builtin, None}
			end while
			inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	if(undo.valid[0]{int} # 1)
		set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(btn_undo{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, "btn_chordstudio_undo_disabled"){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(btn_edit_undo{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, "btn_chordstudio_undo_disabled"){Builtin, None}
		undo.active{int} := 0
	end if
	midi_main_display.update_notes{UserDefined, Call}
	midi_edit_display.update_allround{UserDefined, Call}
	midi_edit_display.update_bars{UserDefined, Call}
	midi_edit_display.update_notes{UserDefined, Call}
end function

function redo.load
	undo.create{UserDefined, Call}
	ii{int} := 0
	while(ii{int} <= (((8 * 7) * 4) - 1)) 
		iii{int} := 0
		while(iii{int} <= (3 - 1)) 
			_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((ii{int} * 3) + iii{int})]{int} := _melody.redo[(ii{int} * 3) + iii{int}]{int}
			inc(iii{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
		inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	ii{int} := 0
	while(ii{int} <= (8 - 1)) 
		iii{int} := 0
		while(iii{int} <= (7 - 1)) 
			_melody_rates[(ii{int} * 7) + iii{int}]{int} := _melody_rates.redo[(ii{int} * 7) + iii{int}]{int}
			inc(iii{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
		inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(btn_redo{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, "btn_chordstudio_redo_disabled"){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(btn_edit_redo{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, "btn_chordstudio_redo_disabled"){Builtin, None}
	redo.active{int} := 0
	midi_main_display.update_notes{UserDefined, Call}
	midi_edit_display.update_allround{UserDefined, Call}
	midi_edit_display.update_bars{UserDefined, Call}
	midi_edit_display.update_notes{UserDefined, Call}
end function

function undo.flush
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (12 - 1)) 
		undo.valid[i{int}]{int} := 0
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(btn_undo{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, "btn_chordstudio_undo_disabled"){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(btn_edit_undo{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, "btn_chordstudio_undo_disabled"){Builtin, None}
	undo.active{int} := 0
	set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(btn_redo{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, "btn_chordstudio_redo_disabled"){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(btn_edit_redo{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, "btn_chordstudio_redo_disabled"){Builtin, None}
	redo.active{int} := 0
end function

function empty_unused_values
	declare local _before : int := - 1 {Reuses: 0}
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (8 - 1)) 
		ii{int} := 0
		while(ii{int} <= (beats_per_bar{int} - 1)) 
			iii{int} := 0
			while(iii{int} <= (4 - 1)) 
				if(iii{int} >= _melody_rates[(i{int} * 7) + ii{int}]{int})
					_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((((((i{int} * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) + (ii{int} * 4)) + iii{int}) * 3) + 1)]{int} := - 1
					_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((((((i{int} * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) + (ii{int} * 4)) + iii{int}) * 3) + 2)]{int} := 0
					_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + (((((i{int} * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) + (ii{int} * 4)) + iii{int}) * 3)]{int} := 1
					_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((((i{int} * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) + ((ii{int} + 1) * 4)) * 3)]{int} := 0
				end if
				inc(iii{int}){Builtin, None}
			end while
			inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	if(beats_per_bar{int} # 7)
		_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((((8 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) * 3) + 1)]{int} := - 1
		_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + (((8 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) * 3)]{int} := 0
	end if
end function

function identify_chord
	declare local _iterator : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _oct : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _bool : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _num_results : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _is_this_chord : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= 11) 
		if(pressed_notes[i{int}]{int} = 1)
			ii{int} := 0
			while(ii{int} <= (17 - 1)) 
				iii{int} := 0
				while(iii{int} <= (15 - 1)) 
					_is_this_chord{int} := 1
					j{int} := 0
					while(j{int} <= 11) 
						_iterator{int} := 0
						_bool{int} := 0
						while((_iterator{int} < 7) and (_chord.types[(ii{int} * 7) + _iterator{int}]{int} # - 1)) 
							if(((i{int} + _modes[(iii{int} * 8) + (_chord.types[(ii{int} * 7) + _iterator{int}]{int} mod 7)]{int}) mod 12) = ((i{int} + j{int}) mod 12))
								_bool{int} := 1
								_iterator{int} := 7
							end if
							inc(_iterator{int}){Builtin, None}
						end while
						if(pressed_notes[(i{int} + j{int}) mod 12]{int} = 1)
							if(_bool{int} = 0)
								_is_this_chord{int} := 0
							end if
						else
							if(_bool{int} = 1)
								_is_this_chord{int} := 0
							end if
						end if
						inc(j{int}){Builtin, None}
					end while
					if(_is_this_chord{int} = 1)
						j{int} := 0
						while(j{int} <= (32 - 1)) 
							if((chord_modes_scale[j{int}]{int} = iii{int}) and (chord_modes_tones[j{int}]{int} = ii{int}))
								_all_results[_num_results{int} * 2]{int} := i{int}
								_all_results[(_num_results{int} * 2) + 1]{int} := j{int}
								inc(_num_results{int}){Builtin, None}
							end if
							inc(j{int}){Builtin, None}
						end while
					end if
					inc(iii{int}){Builtin, None}
				end while
				inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
			end while
		end if
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	if(_num_results{int} = 1)
		message(_root_notes[_all_results[0]{int}]{string} & " " & chord_type_names[_all_results[1]{int}]{string}){Builtin, None}
		chord.print(_root_notes[_all_results[0]{int}]{string} & " " & chord_type_names[_all_results[1]{int}]{string}){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
		resulting_root{int} := _all_results[0]{int}
		resulting_scale{int} := chord_modes_scale[_all_results[1]{int}]{int}
	else
		if(_num_results{int} > 1)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (_num_results{int} - 1)) 
				if(_all_results[i{int} * 2]{int} = (lowest_note{int} mod 12))
					message(_root_notes[_all_results[i{int} * 2]{int}]{string} & " " & chord_type_names[_all_results[(i{int} * 2) + 1]{int}]{string}){Builtin, None}
					chord.print(_root_notes[_all_results[i{int} * 2]{int}]{string} & " " & chord_type_names[_all_results[(i{int} * 2) + 1]{int}]{string}){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
					resulting_root{int} := _all_results[i{int} * 2]{int}
					resulting_scale{int} := _all_results[(i{int} * 2) + 1]{int}
				end if
				inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
			end while
		end if
	end if
end function

function remote(array : int[], except : int)
	declare local _iterator : int {Reuses: 0}
	_iterator{int} := 0
	while(_iterator{int} <= (num_elements[array{[]}] - 1)) 
		set_control_par(array[_iterator{int}]{unknown}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, 0){Builtin, None}
		if(except{int} = _iterator{int})
			set_control_par(array[_iterator{int}]{unknown}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, 1){Builtin, None}
		end if
		inc(_iterator{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function midi_export.update
	declare local _len : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _res : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _bar : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _beat : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _prev_pitch : int := - 1 {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _start_offset : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _event_start : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _event_end : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _idx : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _mix : real {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _dyn_value : int := dynamic_positions[0]{int} {Reuses: 0}
	mf_remove_event(by_track(1){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	mf_set_buffer_size((((8 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) * (960 / 4)) + (8 * 96)){Builtin, None}
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (((8 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) - 1)) 
		_bar{int} := i{int} / (beats_per_bar{int} * 4)
		_beat{int} := (i{int} / 4) mod beats_per_bar{int}
		if((_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((i{int} * 3) + 1)]{int} # - 1) and (_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + (i{int} * 3)]{int} = 0))
			_start_offset{int} := 0
			if(((_prev_pitch{int} # - 1) and (_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((i{int} * 3) + 1)]{int} # _prev_pitch{int})) and (highest_delay{int} > 0))
				_start_offset{int} := int(round(960 / (((1000 / real(highest_delay{int}){Builtin, None}) * 60) / tempo{real})){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
			end if
			if(btn_dynamics_active{int} = 1)
				_idx{int} := i{int} / ((beats_per_bar{int} * 4) / 2)
				_mix{real} := real(i{int} mod ((beats_per_bar{int} * 4) / 2)){Builtin, None} / real((beats_per_bar{int} * 4) / 2){Builtin, None}
				if(line_mode[_idx{int}]{int} = 0)
					velocity_offset{int} := dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int} + int(_mix{real} * real(dynamic_positions[_idx{int} + 1]{int} - dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
				else
					if(line_mode[_idx{int}]{int} = 1)
						velocity_offset{int} := dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int} + int((- (cos(NI_MATH_PI{real} * _mix{real}){Builtin, None} - 1) / 2) * real(dynamic_positions[_idx{int} + 1]{int} - dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
					else
						if(line_mode[_idx{int}]{int} = 2)
							velocity_offset{int} := dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int} + int(1 - (cos((_mix{real} * NI_MATH_PI{real}) / 2){Builtin, None} * real(dynamic_positions[_idx{int} + 1]{int} - dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int}){Builtin, None})){Builtin, None}
						else
							if(line_mode[_idx{int}]{int} = 3)
								velocity_offset{int} := dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int} + int(sin((_mix{real} * NI_MATH_PI{real}) / 2){Builtin, None} * real(dynamic_positions[_idx{int} + 1]{int} - dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
							end if
						end if
					end if
				end if
				velocity_offset{int} := int(round(real(velocity_offset{int} - sli_dynamics{int}){Builtin, None} * (real(sli_velocity_influence{int}){Builtin, None} / 100)){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
			else
				velocity_offset{int} := 0
			end if
			_event_start{int} := mf_insert_event(1, ((((i{int} / 4) * _melody_rates[(_bar{int} * 7) + _beat{int}]{int}) + (i{int} mod 4)) * (960 / _melody_rates[(_bar{int} * 7) + _beat{int}]{int})) - _start_offset{int}, MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON{int}, _melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((i{int} * 3) + 1)]{int}, ((((sli_dynamics{int} + velocity_offset{int}) + _melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((i{int} * 3) + 2)]{int}) * (1 + (sh_right(127 - ((sli_dynamics{int} + velocity_offset{int}) + _melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((i{int} * 3) + 2)]{int}), 31){Builtin, None} .or. sh_right(((sli_dynamics{int} + velocity_offset{int}) + _melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((i{int} * 3) + 2)]{int}) - 1, 31){Builtin, None}))) - (1 * sh_right(((sli_dynamics{int} + velocity_offset{int}) + _melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((i{int} * 3) + 2)]{int}) - 1, 31){Builtin, None})) - (127 * sh_right(127 - ((sli_dynamics{int} + velocity_offset{int}) + _melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((i{int} * 3) + 2)]{int}), 31){Builtin, None})){Builtin, None}
			_prev_pitch{int} := _melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((i{int} * 3) + 1)]{int}
			note.get_length(_len{int}, _melody{int[]}, current_segment{int}, i{int}, ((8 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) - 1){UserDefined, Inlining}
			_event_end{int} := mf_insert_event(1, (((((i{int} / 4) * _melody_rates[(_bar{int} * 7) + _beat{int}]{int}) + (i{int} mod 4)) + _len{int}) * (960 / _melody_rates[(_bar{int} * 7) + _beat{int}]{int})) - 1, MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_OFF{int}, _melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((i{int} * 3) + 1)]{int}, 0){Builtin, None}
		else
			if(_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + (i{int} * 3)]{int} = 0)
				_prev_pitch{int} := - 1
			end if
		end if
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	if(btn_dynamics_active{int} = 1)
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= ((8 * 96) - 1)) 
			_idx{int} := i{int} / 48
			_mix{real} := real(i{int} mod 48){Builtin, None} / 48
			if((dynamic_positions[_idx{int} + 1]{int} - dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int}) # 0)
				if(line_mode[_idx{int}]{int} = 0)
					_dyn_value{int} := (((dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int} + int(_mix{real} * real(dynamic_positions[_idx{int} + 1]{int} - dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}) * (1 + (sh_right(127 - (dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int} + int(_mix{real} * real(dynamic_positions[_idx{int} + 1]{int} - dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}), 31){Builtin, None} .or. sh_right((dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int} + int(_mix{real} * real(dynamic_positions[_idx{int} + 1]{int} - dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}) - 0, 31){Builtin, None}))) - (0 * sh_right((dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int} + int(_mix{real} * real(dynamic_positions[_idx{int} + 1]{int} - dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}) - 0, 31){Builtin, None})) - (127 * sh_right(127 - (dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int} + int(_mix{real} * real(dynamic_positions[_idx{int} + 1]{int} - dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}), 31){Builtin, None})
				else
					if(line_mode[_idx{int}]{int} = 1)
						_dyn_value{int} := (((dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int} + int((- (cos(NI_MATH_PI{real} * _mix{real}){Builtin, None} - 1) / 2) * real(dynamic_positions[_idx{int} + 1]{int} - dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}) * (1 + (sh_right(127 - (dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int} + int((- (cos(NI_MATH_PI{real} * _mix{real}){Builtin, None} - 1) / 2) * real(dynamic_positions[_idx{int} + 1]{int} - dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}), 31){Builtin, None} .or. sh_right((dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int} + int((- (cos(NI_MATH_PI{real} * _mix{real}){Builtin, None} - 1) / 2) * real(dynamic_positions[_idx{int} + 1]{int} - dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}) - 0, 31){Builtin, None}))) - (0 * sh_right((dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int} + int((- (cos(NI_MATH_PI{real} * _mix{real}){Builtin, None} - 1) / 2) * real(dynamic_positions[_idx{int} + 1]{int} - dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}) - 0, 31){Builtin, None})) - (127 * sh_right(127 - (dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int} + int((- (cos(NI_MATH_PI{real} * _mix{real}){Builtin, None} - 1) / 2) * real(dynamic_positions[_idx{int} + 1]{int} - dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}), 31){Builtin, None})
					else
						if(line_mode[_idx{int}]{int} = 2)
							_dyn_value{int} := (((dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int} + int(1 - (cos((_mix{real} * NI_MATH_PI{real}) / 2){Builtin, None} * real(dynamic_positions[_idx{int} + 1]{int} - dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int}){Builtin, None})){Builtin, None}) * (1 + (sh_right(127 - (dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int} + int(1 - (cos((_mix{real} * NI_MATH_PI{real}) / 2){Builtin, None} * real(dynamic_positions[_idx{int} + 1]{int} - dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int}){Builtin, None})){Builtin, None}), 31){Builtin, None} .or. sh_right((dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int} + int(1 - (cos((_mix{real} * NI_MATH_PI{real}) / 2){Builtin, None} * real(dynamic_positions[_idx{int} + 1]{int} - dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int}){Builtin, None})){Builtin, None}) - 0, 31){Builtin, None}))) - (0 * sh_right((dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int} + int(1 - (cos((_mix{real} * NI_MATH_PI{real}) / 2){Builtin, None} * real(dynamic_positions[_idx{int} + 1]{int} - dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int}){Builtin, None})){Builtin, None}) - 0, 31){Builtin, None})) - (127 * sh_right(127 - (dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int} + int(1 - (cos((_mix{real} * NI_MATH_PI{real}) / 2){Builtin, None} * real(dynamic_positions[_idx{int} + 1]{int} - dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int}){Builtin, None})){Builtin, None}), 31){Builtin, None})
						else
							if(line_mode[_idx{int}]{int} = 3)
								_dyn_value{int} := (((dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int} + int(sin((_mix{real} * NI_MATH_PI{real}) / 2){Builtin, None} * real(dynamic_positions[_idx{int} + 1]{int} - dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}) * (1 + (sh_right(127 - (dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int} + int(sin((_mix{real} * NI_MATH_PI{real}) / 2){Builtin, None} * real(dynamic_positions[_idx{int} + 1]{int} - dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}), 31){Builtin, None} .or. sh_right((dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int} + int(sin((_mix{real} * NI_MATH_PI{real}) / 2){Builtin, None} * real(dynamic_positions[_idx{int} + 1]{int} - dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}) - 0, 31){Builtin, None}))) - (0 * sh_right((dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int} + int(sin((_mix{real} * NI_MATH_PI{real}) / 2){Builtin, None} * real(dynamic_positions[_idx{int} + 1]{int} - dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}) - 0, 31){Builtin, None})) - (127 * sh_right(127 - (dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int} + int(sin((_mix{real} * NI_MATH_PI{real}) / 2){Builtin, None} * real(dynamic_positions[_idx{int} + 1]{int} - dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}), 31){Builtin, None})
							end if
						end if
					end if
				end if
				mf_insert_event(1, (i{int} * 10) * beats_per_bar{int}, MIDI_COMMAND_CC{int}, 1, _dyn_value{int}){Builtin, None}
			else
				if((i{int} mod 48) = 0)
					mf_insert_event(1, (i{int} * 10) * beats_per_bar{int}, MIDI_COMMAND_CC{int}, 1, ((dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int} * (1 + (sh_right(127 - dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int}, 31){Builtin, None} .or. sh_right(dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int} - 0, 31){Builtin, None}))) - (0 * sh_right(dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int} - 0, 31){Builtin, None})) - (127 * sh_right(127 - dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int}, 31){Builtin, None})){Builtin, None}
				end if
			end if
			inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
	end if
	_res{int} := mf_set_export_area("The Score - Theme", - 1, - 1, 1, 1){Builtin, None}
	if(_res{int} = 0)
		console.print("Export ready"){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
	else
		console.print("Error at " & _res{int}){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
		message("Error at " & _res{int}){Builtin, None}
	end if
end function

function main_display.open
	btn_main_view{int} := 1
	previous_page{int} := 0
	set_control_par(main_display{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(shape_controls{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
	gui_animation.show_side_panels(1){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
	main_display.update{UserDefined, Call}
	keycolor.update{UserDefined, Call}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(UI_presetStrip{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
end function

function main_display.close
	set_control_par(main_display{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
	btn_main_view{int} := 0
end function

function main_display.update
	read_slot_colors{UserDefined, Call}
	set_title_colors(0){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (2 - 1)) 
		set_control_par_str(lbl_slot[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, slot_icons[(instrument_browser.section_order[(0 - ((0 - search[_instrument_browser.structure{int[]}, slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]) .and. sh_right(0 - search[_instrument_browser.structure{int[]}, slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}], 31){Builtin, None})) / 16]{int} + (- sh_right(abs(search[_instrument_browser.structure{int[]}, slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}] - - 1){Builtin, None} - 1, 31){Builtin, None} * (num_elements[slot_icons{string[]}] - 1))) + (- sh_right(abs(slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int} - - 1){Builtin, None} - 1, 31){Builtin, None} * (num_elements[slot_icons{string[]}] - 1))]{string}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(btn_octave_doubling[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
		if(slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int} # - 1)
			if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} = 2)
				set_control_par(btn_octave_doubling[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
			end if
		end if
		set_control_par(lbl_volume[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE{int}, fonts.regular_colors[slot_colors[i{int}]{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(lbl_volume_max[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE{int}, fonts.regular_colors[slot_colors[i{int}]{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(lbl_volume_min[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE{int}, fonts.regular_colors[slot_colors[i{int}]{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(mnu_output[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE{int}, fonts.regular_white[1]{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par_str(btn_solo[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, "btn_solo" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[i{int}]{int}]{string}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par_str(btn_mute[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, "btn_mute" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[i{int}]{int}]{string}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par_str(btn_open_fx[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, "btn_fx" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[i{int}]{int}]{string}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par_str(btn_octave_doubling[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, "btn_8" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[i{int}]{int}]{string}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par_str(sli_volume_min[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, "slider_mix_handle_left" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[i{int}]{int}]{string}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par_str(sli_volume_max[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, "slider_mix_handle_right" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[i{int}]{int}]{string}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par_str(sli_volume[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, "slider_mix_mod" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[i{int}]{int}]{string}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par_str(sli_volume_disp[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, "slider_mix_strip" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[i{int}]{int}]{string}){Builtin, None}
		if(btn_output_section{int} = 1)
			set_control_par(sli_oct[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
			set_control_par(sli_pan[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
			set_control_par(sli_rev_send[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
			set_control_par(lbl_oct[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
			set_control_par(lbl_pan[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
			set_control_par(lbl_rev_send[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}

		else
			set_control_par(sli_oct[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
			set_control_par(sli_pan[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
			set_control_par(sli_rev_send[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
			set_control_par(lbl_oct[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
			set_control_par(lbl_pan[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
			set_control_par(lbl_rev_send[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
			set_control_par(mnu_output[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
			set_control_par(lbl_output_connector[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
