		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function execute_morph_faders
	declare local _offset : int {Reuses: 0}
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (2 - 1)) 
		_offset{int} := int((real(CC[1]{int}){Builtin, None} / 127) * real(get_control_par(sli_volume_max[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None} - get_control_par(sli_volume_min[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, get_control_par(sli_volume_min[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None} + _offset{int}, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + i{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(sli_volume[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, get_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + i{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (2 - 1)) 
		if(sli_volume.previous[i{int}]{int} # get_control_par(sli_volume[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None})
			set_control_par_str(lbl_volume[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + i{int}){Builtin, None} & "dB"){Builtin, None}
			timed_display.trigger(lbl_volume[i{int}]{int}, "Vol", 0){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
		end if
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (2 - 1)) 
		sli_volume.previous[i{int}]{int} := get_control_par(sli_volume[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(sli_volume_disp[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, get_control_par(sli_volume_max[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None} - ((get_control_par(sli_volume_max[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None} - get_control_par(sli_volume_min[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}) .and. sh_right(get_control_par(sli_volume_max[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None} - get_control_par(sli_volume_min[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}, 31){Builtin, None})){Builtin, None}
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function execute_shape_controls
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (2 - 1)) 
		slot.note_offset[i{int}]{int} := get_control_par(sli_oct[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None} * 12
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_PAN{int}, get_control_par(sli_pan[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + i{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SENDLEVEL_0{int}, get_control_par(sli_rev_send[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}, - 1, 7, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + i{int}){Builtin, None}
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function hide_shape_controls
	set_control_par(shape_controls{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
end function

function unhide_shape_controls
	set_control_par(shape_controls{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
end function

function set_solo_mute
	declare local i : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare local set_value : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare local solo_active : int {Reuses: 0}
	solo_active{int} := 0
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (2 - 1)) 
		if(_solo_mute_states[i{int}]{int} = 1)
			solo_active{int} := 1
		end if
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (2 - 1)) 
		if(solo_active{int} = 1)
			if(_solo_mute_states[i{int}]{int} = 1)
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, 397100, - 1, 5, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + i{int}){Builtin, None}
			else
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, 0, - 1, 5, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + i{int}){Builtin, None}
			end if
		else
			if(_solo_mute_states[2 + i{int}]{int} = 1)
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, 0, - 1, 5, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + i{int}){Builtin, None}
			else
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, 397100, - 1, 5, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + i{int}){Builtin, None}
			end if
		end if
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function theme_display.open
	set_control_par(theme_display{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(transport_display{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
	gui_animation.show_side_panels(0){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
	if(btn_tab_main{int} = 1)
		theme_main_display.open{UserDefined, Call}
		theme_edit_display.close{UserDefined, Call}
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_tab_main{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_tab_edit{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
	else
		theme_edit_display.open{UserDefined, Call}
		theme_main_display.close{UserDefined, Call}
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_tab_main{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_tab_edit{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
	end if
	gui_animation.show_side_panels(0){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
	btn_theme_view{int} := 1
end function

function theme_display.close
	set_control_par(theme_display{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(transport_display{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(structure_selection_display{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(theme_main_display.time_selection{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
	btn_theme_view{int} := 0
end function

function theme_main_display.open
	set_control_par(theme_main_display{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(transport_display{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
	keycolor.update{UserDefined, Call}
	midi_main_display.update_bars{UserDefined, Call}
	midi_main_display.update_notes{UserDefined, Call}
	dynamics.update{UserDefined, Call}
	structure_selection_display.open{UserDefined, Call}
end function

function theme_main_display.close
	set_control_par(theme_main_display{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(structure_selection_display{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(theme_main_display.time_selection{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
	keycolor.update{UserDefined, Call}
end function

function structure_selection_display.open
	remote(btn_structure{int[]}, structure_array[current_structure_part{int}]{int}){UserDefined, Inlining}
	set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(btn_regenerate_theme{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, "Generate New " & structure_names[structure_array[current_structure_part{int}]{int}]{string} & " Theme"){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(structure_selection_display{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(lbl_selected_region[0]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}, 113 + (((current_structure_part{int} mod 2) * 624) / 2)){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(lbl_selected_region[0]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}, 301 + ((current_structure_part{int} / 2) * (40 + 30))){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(lbl_selected_region[0]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
end function

function midi_main_display.update_bars
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (8 - 1)) 
		ii{int} := 0
		while(ii{int} <= ((7 * 4) - 1)) 
			set_control_par(_lbl_midi_notes[(i{int} * 28) + ii{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}, 113 + int((real(i{int} mod 4){Builtin, None} * (real(624){Builtin, None} / real(4){Builtin, None})) + ((real(((ii{int} / 4) * _melody_rates[(i{int} * 7) + (ii{int} / 4)]{int}) + (ii{int} mod 4)){Builtin, None} * (real((850 - 113) - 113){Builtin, None} / real(4){Builtin, None})) / real(beats_per_bar{int} * _melody_rates[(i{int} * 7) + (ii{int} / 4)]{int}){Builtin, None})){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
			set_control_par(_lbl_midi_notes[(i{int} * 28) + ii{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}, 100 + ((i{int} / 4) * 200)){Builtin, None}
			set_control_par(_lbl_midi_notes[(i{int} * 28) + ii{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}, 8){Builtin, None}
			set_control_par(_lbl_midi_notes[(i{int} * 28) + ii{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT{int}, int(real(40){Builtin, None} / real((range.high{int} - range.low{int}) + 1){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
			inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (2 - 1)) 
		ii{int} := 0
		while(ii{int} <= 4) 
			iii{int} := 0
			while(iii{int} <= (7 - 1)) 
				set_control_par(_lbl_midi_main_display.barlines[(i{int} * 35) + ((ii{int} * 7) + iii{int})]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
				set_control_par(_lbl_midi_main_display.barlines[(i{int} * 35) + ((ii{int} * 7) + iii{int})]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}, 113 + int((real(ii{int}){Builtin, None} * (real(624){Builtin, None} / real(4){Builtin, None})) + (real(iii{int}){Builtin, None} * ((real(624){Builtin, None} / real(4){Builtin, None}) / real(beats_per_bar{int}){Builtin, None}))){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
				set_control_par(_lbl_midi_main_display.barlines[(i{int} * 35) + ((ii{int} * 7) + iii{int})]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}, 301 + (i{int} * (40 + 30))){Builtin, None}
				set_control_par(_lbl_midi_main_display.barlines[(i{int} * 35) + ((ii{int} * 7) + iii{int})]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT{int}, 40){Builtin, None}
				if(((ii{int} = 4) and (iii{int} > 0)) or (iii{int} >= beats_per_bar{int}))
					set_control_par(_lbl_midi_main_display.barlines[(i{int} * 35) + ((ii{int} * 7) + iii{int})]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
				end if
				if(iii{int} = 0)
					set_control_par_str(_lbl_midi_main_display.barlines[(i{int} * 35) + ((ii{int} * 7) + iii{int})]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, ""){Builtin, None}
					set_control_par_str(_lbl_midi_main_display.barlines[(i{int} * 35) + ((ii{int} * 7) + iii{int})]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, "lbl_line_vertical"){Builtin, None}
					set_control_par(_lbl_midi_main_display.barlines[(i{int} * 35) + ((ii{int} * 7) + iii{int})]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}, 2){Builtin, None}
					set_control_par(_lbl_midi_main_display.barlines[(i{int} * 35) + ((ii{int} * 7) + iii{int})]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT{int}, get_control_par(_lbl_midi_main_display.barlines[(i{int} * 35) + ((ii{int} * 7) + iii{int})]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT{int}){Builtin, None} + 16){Builtin, None}
					set_control_par(_lbl_midi_main_display.barlines[(i{int} * 35) + ((ii{int} * 7) + iii{int})]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}, get_control_par(_lbl_midi_main_display.barlines[(i{int} * 35) + ((ii{int} * 7) + iii{int})]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}){Builtin, None} - 16){Builtin, None}
				else
					set_control_par_str(_lbl_midi_main_display.barlines[(i{int} * 35) + ((ii{int} * 7) + iii{int})]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, ""){Builtin, None}
					set_control_par_str(_lbl_midi_main_display.barlines[(i{int} * 35) + ((ii{int} * 7) + iii{int})]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, "lbl_line_vertical_0.25"){Builtin, None}
					set_control_par(_lbl_midi_main_display.barlines[(i{int} * 35) + ((ii{int} * 7) + iii{int})]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}, 1){Builtin, None}
				end if
				inc(iii{int}){Builtin, None}
			end while
			inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (2 - 1)) 
		ii{int} := 0
		while(ii{int} <= ((4 * 2) - 1)) 
			if((ii{int} mod 2) = 0)
				set_control_par(_btn_chord[(i{int} * 8) + ii{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}, get_control_par(_lbl_midi_main_display.barlines[(i{int} * 35) + ((ii{int} / 2) * 7)]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
				if(ii{int} < ((4 * 2) - 1))
					set_control_par(_btn_chord[(i{int} * 8) + ii{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}, get_control_par(_lbl_midi_main_display.barlines[(i{int} * 35) + (((ii{int} / 2) * 7) + (meters.2nd_chord_position[mnu_beats_per_bar{int}]{int} - 1))]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None} - get_control_par(_btn_chord[(i{int} * 8) + ii{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
				else
					set_control_par(_btn_chord[(i{int} * 8) + ii{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}, (113 + 624) - get_control_par(_btn_chord[(i{int} * 8) + ii{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
				end if
			else
				set_control_par(_btn_chord[(i{int} * 8) + ii{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}, get_control_par(_lbl_midi_main_display.barlines[(i{int} * 35) + (((ii{int} / 2) * 7) + (meters.2nd_chord_position[mnu_beats_per_bar{int}]{int} - 1))]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
				if(ii{int} < ((4 * 2) - 1))
					set_control_par(_btn_chord[(i{int} * 8) + ii{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}, get_control_par(_lbl_midi_main_display.barlines[(i{int} * 35) + (((ii{int} + 1) / 2) * 7)]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None} - get_control_par(_btn_chord[(i{int} * 8) + ii{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
				else
					set_control_par(_btn_chord[(i{int} * 8) + ii{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}, (113 + 624) - get_control_par(_btn_chord[(i{int} * 8) + ii{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
				end if
			end if
			inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function midi_main_display.update_chords
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (2 - 1)) 
		ii{int} := 0
		while(ii{int} <= ((4 * 2) - 1)) 
			if(_chords[((i{int} * 8) + ii{int}) * 6]{int} # - 1)
				set_control_par_str(_btn_chord[(i{int} * 8) + ii{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, _root_notes[(accidental{int} * 12) + _chords[((i{int} * 8) + ii{int}) * 6]{int}]{string} & chord_type_string[_chords[(((i{int} * 8) + ii{int}) * 6) + 4]{int}]{string}){Builtin, None}
				if((_chords[(((i{int} * 8) + ii{int}) * 6) + 2]{int} # - 1) and (_chords[(((i{int} * 8) + ii{int}) * 6) + 2]{int} # _chords[((i{int} * 8) + ii{int}) * 6]{int}))
					set_control_par_str(_btn_chord[(i{int} * 8) + ii{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, get_control_par_str(_btn_chord[(i{int} * 8) + ii{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}){Builtin, None} & "/" & _root_notes[(accidental{int} * 12) + _chords[(((i{int} * 8) + ii{int}) * 6) + 2]{int}]{string}){Builtin, None}
				end if
			else
				set_control_par_str(_btn_chord[(i{int} * 8) + ii{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, "-"){Builtin, None}
			end if
			inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function midi_main_display.update_notes
	declare local _counter : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _iterator : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _before_break : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _before_break2 : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _bar : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _data : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _prev_id[2] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _prev_pitch : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _note_width : real := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare local __use_virtual : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare local __bar : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare local __data : int {Reuses: 0}
	_prev_pitch{int} := - 1
	_prev_id[0]{int} := - 1
	_prev_id[1]{int} := - 1
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (((8 * 7) * 4) - 1)) 
		_bar{int} := i{int} / (7 * 4)
		_data{int} := i{int} mod (7 * 4)
		set_control_par(_lbl_midi_notes[(_bar{int} * 28) + _data{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (((8 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) - 1)) 
		_bar{int} := i{int} / (beats_per_bar{int} * 4)
		_data{int} := i{int} mod (beats_per_bar{int} * 4)
		if(((_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((i{int} * 3) + 1)]{int} >= range.low{int}) and (_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((i{int} * 3) + 1)]{int} <= range.high{int})) and (_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + (i{int} * 3)]{int} # 1))
			set_control_par(_lbl_midi_notes[(_bar{int} * 28) + _data{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
			melody.exists{int} := 1
			set_control_par(_lbl_midi_notes[(_bar{int} * 28) + _data{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}, (301 + 40) - int((real((_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((i{int} * 3) + 1)]{int} - range.low{int}) + 1){Builtin, None} * (real(40){Builtin, None} / real((range.high{int} - range.low{int}) + 1){Builtin, None})) - (real(_bar{int} / 4){Builtin, None} * real(40 + 30){Builtin, None})){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
			while(_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + (((i{int} + _iterator{int}) + 1) * 3)]{int} = 1) 
				if(((((i{int} + _iterator{int}) + 1) mod (beats_per_bar{int} * 4)) mod 4) < _melody_rates[((((i{int} + _iterator{int}) + 1) / (beats_per_bar{int} * 4)) * 7) + ((((i{int} + _iterator{int}) + 1) mod (beats_per_bar{int} * 4)) / 4)]{int})
					inc(_counter{int}){Builtin, None}
				end if
				inc(_iterator{int}){Builtin, None}
				if((i{int} + _iterator{int}) = ((4 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4))
					__use_virtual{int} := 1
					__bar{int} := (i{int} + _iterator{int}) / (beats_per_bar{int} * 4)
					__data{int} := (i{int} + _iterator{int}) mod (beats_per_bar{int} * 4)
					_before_break{int} := _counter{int}
					_before_break2{int} := _iterator{int}
					set_control_par(_lbl_midi_notes[(__bar{int} * 28) + __data{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
					set_control_par(_lbl_midi_notes[(__bar{int} * 28) + __data{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}, get_control_par(_lbl_midi_notes[(_bar{int} * 28) + _data{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}){Builtin, None} + (40 + 30)){Builtin, None}
				end if
			end while
			set_control_par(_lbl_midi_notes[(_bar{int} * 28) + _data{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}, 0){Builtin, None}
			_note_width{real} := 0
			if(__use_virtual{int} = 1)
				set_control_par(_lbl_midi_notes[(_bar{int} * 28) + _data{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}, int((real(1 + _before_break{int}){Builtin, None} * (real((850 - 113) - 113){Builtin, None} / real(4){Builtin, None})) / real(beats_per_bar{int} * _melody_rates[(_bar{int} * 7) + (_data{int} / 4)]{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
				_i{int} := 0
				while(_i{int} <= (_counter{int} - _before_break{int})) 
					int_buffer{int} := _i{int}
					while(((((i{int} + int_buffer{int}) + _before_break2{int}) mod (beats_per_bar{int} * 4)) mod 4) >= _melody_rates[((((i{int} + int_buffer{int}) + _before_break2{int}) / (beats_per_bar{int} * 4)) * 7) + ((((i{int} + int_buffer{int}) + _before_break2{int}) mod (beats_per_bar{int} * 4)) / 4)]{int}) 
						int_buffer{int} := int_buffer{int} + 1
					end while
					_note_width{real} := _note_width{real} + ((real(624){Builtin, None} / real(4){Builtin, None}) / int_to_real(beats_per_bar{int} * _melody_rates[((((i{int} + int_buffer{int}) + _before_break2{int}) / (beats_per_bar{int} * 4)) * 7) + ((((i{int} + int_buffer{int}) + _before_break2{int}) mod (beats_per_bar{int} * 4)) / 4)]{int}){Builtin, None})
					inc(_i{int}){Builtin, None}
				end while
				set_control_par(_lbl_midi_notes[(__bar{int} * 28) + __data{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}, int(round(_note_width{real}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
			else
				_i{int} := 0
				while(_i{int} <= _counter{int}) 
					int_buffer{int} := _i{int}
					while((((i{int} + int_buffer{int}) mod (beats_per_bar{int} * 4)) mod 4) >= _melody_rates[(((i{int} + int_buffer{int}) / (beats_per_bar{int} * 4)) * 7) + (((i{int} + int_buffer{int}) mod (beats_per_bar{int} * 4)) / 4)]{int}) 
						int_buffer{int} := int_buffer{int} + 1
					end while
					_note_width{real} := _note_width{real} + ((real(624){Builtin, None} / real(4){Builtin, None}) / real(beats_per_bar{int} * _melody_rates[(((i{int} + int_buffer{int}) / (beats_per_bar{int} * 4)) * 7) + (((i{int} + int_buffer{int}) mod (beats_per_bar{int} * 4)) / 4)]{int}){Builtin, None})
					inc(_i{int}){Builtin, None}
				end while
				set_control_par(_lbl_midi_notes[(_bar{int} * 28) + _data{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}, int(round(_note_width{real}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
			end if
			if((get_control_par(_lbl_midi_notes[(_bar{int} * 28) + _data{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None} + get_control_par(_lbl_midi_notes[(_bar{int} * 28) + _data{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}){Builtin, None}) > (850 - 113))
				set_control_par(_lbl_midi_notes[(_bar{int} * 28) + _data{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}, (850 - 113) - get_control_par(_lbl_midi_notes[(_bar{int} * 28) + _data{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
			end if
			_counter{int} := 0
			_iterator{int} := 0
			__use_virtual{int} := 0
			if(_prev_pitch{int} = _melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((i{int} * 3) + 1)]{int})
				set_control_par(_lbl_midi_notes[(_prev_id[0]{int} * 28) + _prev_id[1]{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}, get_control_par(_lbl_midi_notes[(_prev_id[0]{int} * 28) + _prev_id[1]{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}){Builtin, None} - 2){Builtin, None}
			end if
			_prev_id[0]{int} := _bar{int}
			_prev_id[1]{int} := _data{int}
			_prev_pitch{int} := _melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((i{int} * 3) + 1)]{int}
		end if
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	midi_update_flag{int} := 1
end function

function dynamics.update
	declare local _difference : int {Reuses: 0}
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= ((8 * 2) + 1)) 
		set_control_par(sli_dynamic_handle[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par_str(sli_dynamic_handle[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, "slider_dynamics_unselected"){Builtin, None}
		if(btn_show_dynamics{int} = 1)
			set_control_par(sli_dynamic_handle[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
		end if
		set_control_par(sli_dynamic_handle[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, dynamic_positions[i{int} - (i{int} / (8 + 1))]{int}){Builtin, None}
		if((i{int} > 0) and (i{int} # (8 + 1)))
			_difference{int} := get_control_par(sli_dynamic_handle[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None} - get_control_par(sli_dynamic_handle[i{int} - 1]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}
			set_control_par_str(sli_line[(i{int} - 1) - (i{int} / (8 + 1))]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, "dynamics-line-up-linear"){Builtin, None}
			set_control_par(sli_line[(i{int} - 1) - (i{int} / (8 + 1))]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}, (301 + ((((i{int} - 1) - (i{int} / (8 + 1))) / (4 * 2)) * (40 + 30))) + (40 - int((((real(get_control_par(sli_dynamic_handle[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None} - 0) * (40 - 0)) / (127 - 0)) + 0){Builtin, None})){Builtin, None}
			if(_difference{int} > 0)
				if(line_mode[(i{int} - 1) - (i{int} / (8 + 1))]{int} = 0)
					set_control_par_str(sli_line[(i{int} - 1) - (i{int} / (8 + 1))]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, "dynamics-line-up-linear"){Builtin, None}
				else
					if(line_mode[(i{int} - 1) - (i{int} / (8 + 1))]{int} = 1)
						set_control_par_str(sli_line[(i{int} - 1) - (i{int} / (8 + 1))]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, "dynamics-line-up-eased"){Builtin, None}
					else
						if(line_mode[(i{int} - 1) - (i{int} / (8 + 1))]{int} = 2)
							set_control_par_str(sli_line[(i{int} - 1) - (i{int} / (8 + 1))]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, "dynamics-line-up-eased-in"){Builtin, None}
						else
							if(line_mode[(i{int} - 1) - (i{int} / (8 + 1))]{int} = 3)
								set_control_par_str(sli_line[(i{int} - 1) - (i{int} / (8 + 1))]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, "dynamics-line-up-eased-out"){Builtin, None}
							end if
						end if
					end if
				end if
			else
				if(_difference{int} < 0)
					if(line_mode[(i{int} - 1) - (i{int} / (8 + 1))]{int} = 0)
						set_control_par_str(sli_line[(i{int} - 1) - (i{int} / (8 + 1))]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, "dynamics-line-down-linear"){Builtin, None}
					else
						if(line_mode[(i{int} - 1) - (i{int} / (8 + 1))]{int} = 1)
							set_control_par_str(sli_line[(i{int} - 1) - (i{int} / (8 + 1))]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, "dynamics-line-down-eased"){Builtin, None}
						else
							if(line_mode[(i{int} - 1) - (i{int} / (8 + 1))]{int} = 2)
								set_control_par_str(sli_line[(i{int} - 1) - (i{int} / (8 + 1))]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, "dynamics-line-down-eased-in"){Builtin, None}
							else
								if(line_mode[(i{int} - 1) - (i{int} / (8 + 1))]{int} = 3)
									set_control_par_str(sli_line[(i{int} - 1) - (i{int} / (8 + 1))]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, "dynamics-line-down-eased-out"){Builtin, None}
								end if
							end if
						end if
					end if
					set_control_par(sli_line[(i{int} - 1) - (i{int} / (8 + 1))]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}, (301 + ((((i{int} - 1) - (i{int} / (8 + 1))) / (4 * 2)) * (40 + 30))) + (40 - int((((real(get_control_par(sli_dynamic_handle[i{int} - 1]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None} - 0) * (40 - 0)) / (127 - 0)) + 0){Builtin, None})){Builtin, None}
				end if
			end if
			set_control_par(sli_line[(i{int} - 1) - (i{int} / (8 + 1))]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, abs(_difference{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
			set_control_par(sli_line[(i{int} - 1) - (i{int} / (8 + 1))]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
			if(btn_show_dynamics{int} = 1)
				set_control_par(sli_line[(i{int} - 1) - (i{int} / (8 + 1))]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
			end if
		end if
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(mnu_line_mode{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
	if((last_touched_handle{int} # - 1) and (btn_show_dynamics{int} = 1))
		set_control_par_str(sli_dynamic_handle[last_touched_handle{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, "slider_dynamics_selected"){Builtin, None}
		if(last_touched_handle{int} < 17)
			set_control_par(get_ui_id(mnu_line_mode{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
			set_control_par(get_ui_id(mnu_line_mode{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, line_mode[last_touched_handle{int} - (last_touched_handle{int} / (8 + 1))]{int}){Builtin, None}
		end if
	end if
	midi_update_flag{int} := 1
	if(btn_show_dynamics{int} = 1)
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(sli_velocity_influence{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_velocity_influence{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_velocity_influence_display{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_velocity_influence_connector{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
	else
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(sli_velocity_influence{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_velocity_influence{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_velocity_influence_display{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_velocity_influence_connector{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
	end if
end function

function btn_chord.special_functions
	declare local _offset : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	if(btn_chord.key_shift{int} = 1)
		if(chord_selector.current_chord{int} > 0)
			_offset{int} := - 1
		else
			console.print("No previous chord available"){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
		end if
	else
		if(btn_chord.key_control{int} = 1)
			if(chord_selector.current_chord{int} < ((2 * 8) - 1))
				_offset{int} := 1
			else
				console.print("No next chord available"){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
			end if
		end if
	end if
	_chords[(chord_selector.current_chord{int} * 6) + 1]{int} := _chords[((chord_selector.current_chord{int} + _offset{int}) * 6) + 1]{int}
	_chords[chord_selector.current_chord{int} * 6]{int} := _chords[(chord_selector.current_chord{int} + _offset{int}) * 6]{int}
	_chords[(chord_selector.current_chord{int} * 6) + 2]{int} := _chords[((chord_selector.current_chord{int} + _offset{int}) * 6) + 2]{int}
	_chords[(chord_selector.current_chord{int} * 6) + 3]{int} := _chords[((chord_selector.current_chord{int} + _offset{int}) * 6) + 3]{int}
	_chords[(chord_selector.current_chord{int} * 6) + 4]{int} := _chords[((chord_selector.current_chord{int} + _offset{int}) * 6) + 4]{int}
	if(btn_chord.key_alt{int} = 1)
		_chords[chord_selector.current_chord{int} * 6]{int} := - 1
	end if
	midi_main_display.update_chords{UserDefined, Call}
end function

function btn_chord_front.show
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (2 - 1)) 
		ii{int} := 0
		while(ii{int} <= ((4 * 2) - 1)) 
			set_control_par(_btn_chord_front[(i{int} * 8) + ii{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}, get_control_par(_btn_chord[(i{int} * 8) + ii{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
			set_control_par(_btn_chord_front[(i{int} * 8) + ii{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}, get_control_par(_btn_chord[(i{int} * 8) + ii{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
			set_control_par(_btn_chord_front[(i{int} * 8) + ii{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}, get_control_par(_btn_chord[(i{int} * 8) + ii{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
			set_control_par(_btn_chord_front[(i{int} * 8) + ii{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT{int}, get_control_par(_btn_chord[(i{int} * 8) + ii{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
			set_control_par_str(_btn_chord_front[(i{int} * 8) + ii{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, ""){Builtin, None}
			set_control_par(_btn_chord_front[(i{int} * 8) + ii{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
			inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function btn_chord_front.hide
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (2 - 1)) 
		ii{int} := 0
		while(ii{int} <= ((4 * 2) - 1)) 
			set_control_par(_btn_chord_front[(i{int} * 8) + ii{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
			inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function theme_edit_display.open
	midi_edit_display.update_allround{UserDefined, Call}
	midi_edit_display.update_bars{UserDefined, Call}
	midi_edit_display.update_notes{UserDefined, Call}
	scroll_handle.update{UserDefined, Call}
	header.update{UserDefined, Call}
	set_control_par(edit_display{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
	previous_page{int} := 1
end function

function theme_edit_display.close
	set_control_par(edit_display{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
end function

function midi_edit_display.update_zoom
	set_control_par(lbl_edit_scroll_handle{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}, 66){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(lbl_edit_scroll_handle{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}, get_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_edit_scroller{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}){Builtin, None} + 1){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(lbl_edit_scroll_handle{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}, 698 / (8 / edit.zoom{int})){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(lbl_edit_scroll_handle{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT{int}, 5 - 2){Builtin, None}
	edit_display.offset{int} := 0
end function

function midi_edit_display.update_allround
	declare local _chord_offset : int {Reuses: 0}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(xy_edit_scroller{real[]}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_BG{int}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_edit_scroller{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_edit_scroll_handle{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
	if(mnu_edit_source{int} # 0)
		edit.zoom{int} := 2
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(xy_edit_scroller{real[]}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_edit_scroller{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_edit_scroll_handle{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
		edit_display.offset{int} := 0
	end if
	mnu_edit_zoom{int} := edit.zoom{int}
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= ((8 * 2) - 1)) 
		set_control_par_str(btn_edit_chord[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, get_control_par_str(_btn_chord[((i{int} / 8) * 8) + (i{int} mod 8)]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= ((8 * 7) - 1)) 
		set_control_par(btn_edit_subbeat[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
		hide_triplet(i{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
		set_control_par(btn_edit_subbeat[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, 0){Builtin, None}
		if(i{int} < ((8 * beats_per_bar{int}) - 1))
			if(_melody_rates[((i{int} / beats_per_bar{int}) * 7) + (i{int} mod beats_per_bar{int})]{int} = 3)
				set_control_par(btn_edit_subbeat[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, 1){Builtin, None}
			end if
			set_control_par(btn_edit_subbeat[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
			hide_triplet(i{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
		end if
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	if(mnu_edit_source{int} # 0)
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= ((2 * 2) - 1)) 
			_chord_offset{int} := (search[structure_array{int[]}, mnu_edit_source{int} - 1] * 2) * 2
			if(_chord_offset{int} < 0)
				_chord_offset{int} := 0
			end if
			set_control_par_str(btn_edit_chord[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, get_control_par_str(_btn_chord[(((i{int} + _chord_offset{int}) / 8) * 8) + ((i{int} + _chord_offset{int}) mod 8)]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
			inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
	end if
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (8 - 1)) 
		ii{int} := 0
		while(ii{int} <= (7 - 1)) 
			iii{int} := 0
			while(iii{int} <= (4 / 2)) 
				set_control_par(_lbl_midi_edit_display.barlines[(i{int} * 21) + ((ii{int} * 3) + iii{int})]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}, 1){Builtin, None}
				set_control_par(_lbl_midi_edit_display.barlines[(i{int} * 21) + ((ii{int} * 3) + iii{int})]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT{int}, 280){Builtin, None}
				if(((ii{int} mod beats_per_bar{int}) = 0) and (iii{int} = 0))
					set_control_par_str(_lbl_midi_edit_display.barlines[(i{int} * 21) + ((ii{int} * 3) + iii{int})]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, ""){Builtin, None}
					set_control_par_str(_lbl_midi_edit_display.barlines[(i{int} * 21) + ((ii{int} * 3) + iii{int})]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, "lbl_line_vertical"){Builtin, None}
					set_control_par(_lbl_midi_edit_display.barlines[(i{int} * 21) + ((ii{int} * 3) + iii{int})]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT{int}, 280 + 15){Builtin, None}
				else
					if(iii{int} = 0)
						set_control_par_str(_lbl_midi_edit_display.barlines[(i{int} * 21) + ((ii{int} * 3) + iii{int})]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, ""){Builtin, None}
						set_control_par_str(_lbl_midi_edit_display.barlines[(i{int} * 21) + ((ii{int} * 3) + iii{int})]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, "lbl_line_vertical_0.25"){Builtin, None}
					else
						set_control_par_str(_lbl_midi_edit_display.barlines[(i{int} * 21) + ((ii{int} * 3) + iii{int})]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, ""){Builtin, None}
						set_control_par_str(_lbl_midi_edit_display.barlines[(i{int} * 21) + ((ii{int} * 3) + iii{int})]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, "lbl_line_vertical_0.10"){Builtin, None}
					end if
				end if
				inc(iii{int}){Builtin, None}
			end while
			inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	set_control_par_str(_lbl_midi_edit_display.barlines[147 + (((beats_per_bar{int} - 1) * 3) + 2)]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, "lbl_line_vertical"){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(_lbl_midi_edit_display.barlines[(i{int} * 21) + ((ii{int} * 3) + iii{int})]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT{int}, 280 + 15){Builtin, None}
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (8 - 1)) 
		ii{int} := 0
		while(ii{int} <= (7 - 1)) 
			iii{int} := 0
			while(iii{int} <= (4 - 1)) 
				set_control_par(_btn_midi_notes_edit[(i{int} * 28) + ((ii{int} * 4) + iii{int})]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT{int}, int(real(280){Builtin, None} / real((range.high{int} - range.low{int}) + 1){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
				inc(iii{int}){Builtin, None}
			end while
			inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (24 - 1)) 
		set_control_par(lbl_midi_edit_display.highlights[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}, (130 + 280) - int(real(i{int} + 1){Builtin, None} * (real(280){Builtin, None} / real((range.high{int} - range.low{int}) + 1){Builtin, None})){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(lbl_midi_edit_display.highlights[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT{int}, int(real(280){Builtin, None} / real((range.high{int} - range.low{int}) + 1){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (24 - 1)) 
		set_control_par(lbl_midi_edit_display.key_colors[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
		if(i{int} <= (range.high{int} - range.low{int}))
			set_control_par_str(lbl_edit_note_name[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, _midi_notes[(accidental{int} * 127) + (range.high{int} - i{int})]{string}){Builtin, None}
			set_control_par(lbl_edit_note_name[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}, ((130 + int(real(i{int}){Builtin, None} * (real(280){Builtin, None} / real((range.high{int} - range.low{int}) + 1){Builtin, None})){Builtin, None}) + int((real(280){Builtin, None} / real((range.high{int} - range.low{int}) + 1){Builtin, None}) / 2){Builtin, None}) - 9){Builtin, None}
			set_control_par(lbl_edit_note_name[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_BG{int}){Builtin, None}
			if(search[midi.black_notes{int[]}, (i{int} + range.low{int}) mod 12] # - 1)
				set_control_par(lbl_midi_edit_display.key_colors[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
				set_control_par(lbl_midi_edit_display.key_colors[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}, (130 + 280) - int(real(i{int} + 1){Builtin, None} * (real(280){Builtin, None} / real((range.high{int} - range.low{int}) + 1){Builtin, None})){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
				set_control_par(lbl_midi_edit_display.key_colors[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT{int}, int(real(280){Builtin, None} / real((range.high{int} - range.low{int}) + 1){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
			end if
		else
			set_control_par(lbl_edit_note_name[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
		end if
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	apply_note_colors{UserDefined, Call}
end function

function midi_edit_display.update_bars
	declare local _barwidth : real {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _new_chord : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _show_scale_notes : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _found_note_in_key : int {Reuses: 0}
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (8 - 1)) 
		ii{int} := 0
		while(ii{int} <= (7 - 1)) 
			iii{int} := 0
			while(iii{int} <= (4 / 2)) 
				set_control_par(_lbl_midi_edit_display.barlines[(i{int} * 21) + ((ii{int} * 3) + iii{int})]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
				_barwidth{real} := real(698){Builtin, None} / real(edit.zoom{int}){Builtin, None}
				set_control_par(_lbl_midi_edit_display.barlines[(i{int} * 21) + ((ii{int} * 3) + iii{int})]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}, (66 + int(((real(i{int}){Builtin, None} * _barwidth{real}) + ((real(ii{int}){Builtin, None} * _barwidth{real}) / real(beats_per_bar{int}){Builtin, None})) + (((real(iii{int}){Builtin, None} * _barwidth{real}) / real(beats_per_bar{int}){Builtin, None}) / real(4 / 2){Builtin, None})){Builtin, None}) - edit_display.offset{int}){Builtin, None}
				if((((get_control_par(_lbl_midi_edit_display.barlines[(i{int} * 21) + ((ii{int} * 3) + iii{int})]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None} > ((66 + 698) + 2)) or (get_control_par(_lbl_midi_edit_display.barlines[(i{int} * 21) + ((ii{int} * 3) + iii{int})]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None} < (66 - 2))) or (ii{int} > (beats_per_bar{int} - 1))) or (iii{int} > (_melody_rates[(i{int} * 7) + ii{int}]{int} - 1)))
					set_control_par(_lbl_midi_edit_display.barlines[(i{int} * 21) + ((ii{int} * 3) + iii{int})]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
				end if
				inc(iii{int}){Builtin, None}
			end while
			inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= ((8 * 2) - 1)) 
		if((i{int} mod 2) = 0)
			set_control_par(btn_edit_chord[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}, get_control_par(_lbl_midi_edit_display.barlines[(i{int} / 2) * 21]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
			if(get_control_par(btn_edit_chord[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None} < 66)
				set_control_par(btn_edit_chord[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}, 66){Builtin, None}
			end if
			if(i{int} < ((8 * 2) - 1))
				set_control_par(btn_edit_chord[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}, get_control_par(_lbl_midi_edit_display.barlines[(((i{int} + 1) / 2) * 21) + ((meters.2nd_chord_position[mnu_beats_per_bar{int}]{int} - 1) * 3)]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None} - get_control_par(btn_edit_chord[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
			else
				set_control_par(btn_edit_chord[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}, get_control_par(_lbl_midi_edit_display.barlines[147 + (((beats_per_bar{int} - 1) * 3) + _melody_rates[49 + (beats_per_bar{int} - 1)]{int})]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None} - get_control_par(btn_edit_chord[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
			end if
		else
			set_control_par(btn_edit_chord[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}, get_control_par(_lbl_midi_edit_display.barlines[((i{int} / 2) * 21) + ((meters.2nd_chord_position[mnu_beats_per_bar{int}]{int} - 1) * 3)]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
			if(get_control_par(btn_edit_chord[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None} < 66)
				set_control_par(btn_edit_chord[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}, 66){Builtin, None}
			end if
			if(i{int} < ((8 * 2) - 1))
				set_control_par(btn_edit_chord[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}, get_control_par(_lbl_midi_edit_display.barlines[((i{int} + 1) / 2) * 21]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None} - get_control_par(btn_edit_chord[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
			else
				set_control_par(btn_edit_chord[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}, get_control_par(_lbl_midi_edit_display.barlines[147 + (((beats_per_bar{int} - 1) * 3) + 2)]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None} - get_control_par(btn_edit_chord[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
			end if
		end if
		if((get_control_par(btn_edit_chord[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None} + get_control_par(btn_edit_chord[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}){Builtin, None}) > (66 + 698))
			set_control_par(btn_edit_chord[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}, (66 + 698) - get_control_par(btn_edit_chord[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
		end if
		if(get_control_par(btn_edit_chord[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}){Builtin, None} < 30)
			set_control_par(btn_edit_chord[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
		else
			set_control_par(btn_edit_chord[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
		end if
		ii{int} := 0
		while(ii{int} <= (24 - 1)) 
			_found_note_in_key{int} := 0
			if(get_control_par(btn_edit_chord[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None} = 1)
				_show_scale_notes{int} := 1
				if(_chords[i{int} * 6]{int} # - 1)
					_new_chord{int} := i{int}
				end if
				iii{int} := 0
				while(iii{int} <= 7) 
					if(((_modes[(_chords[(_new_chord{int} * 6) + 1]{int} * 8) + iii{int}]{int} + _chords[_new_chord{int} * 6]{int}) mod 12) = ((range.low{int} + ii{int}) mod 12))
						_found_note_in_key{int} := 1
					end if
					inc(iii{int}){Builtin, None}
				end while
				if((ii{int} <= (range.high{int} - range.low{int})) and (_found_note_in_key{int} = 1))
					set_control_par(lbl_midi_edit_display.highlights[ii{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}, get_control_par(btn_edit_chord[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
					set_control_par(lbl_midi_edit_display.highlights[ii{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}, get_control_par(btn_edit_chord[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
					set_control_par(lbl_midi_edit_display.highlights[ii{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, get_control_par(btn_edit_chord[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
				end if
			end if
			if(_show_scale_notes{int} = 0)
				set_control_par(lbl_midi_edit_display.highlights[ii{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
			end if
			inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= ((8 * beats_per_bar{int}) - 1)) 
		set_control_par(btn_edit_subbeat[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}, get_control_par(_lbl_midi_edit_display.barlines[((i{int} / beats_per_bar{int}) * 21) + ((i{int} mod beats_per_bar{int}) * 3)]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
		if(get_control_par(btn_edit_subbeat[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None} < 66)
			set_control_par(btn_edit_subbeat[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}, 66){Builtin, None}
		end if
		if(i{int} < ((8 * beats_per_bar{int}) - 1))
			set_control_par(btn_edit_subbeat[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}, get_control_par(_lbl_midi_edit_display.barlines[(((i{int} + 1) / beats_per_bar{int}) * 21) + (((i{int} + 1) mod beats_per_bar{int}) * 3)]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None} - get_control_par(btn_edit_subbeat[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
		else
			set_control_par(btn_edit_subbeat[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}, get_control_par(_lbl_midi_edit_display.barlines[147 + ((beats_per_bar{int} - 1) * 3)]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None} - get_control_par(btn_edit_subbeat[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
		end if
		if((get_control_par(btn_edit_subbeat[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None} + get_control_par(btn_edit_subbeat[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}){Builtin, None}) > (66 + 698))
			set_control_par(btn_edit_subbeat[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}, (66 + 698) - get_control_par(btn_edit_subbeat[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
		end if
		if(get_control_par(btn_edit_subbeat[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}){Builtin, None} < 5)
			set_control_par(btn_edit_subbeat[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
		else
			set_control_par(btn_edit_subbeat[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
		end if
		if(get_control_par(btn_edit_subbeat[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None} = 1)
			update_triplet_pos(i{int}){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
			hide_triplet(i{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
		else
			hide_triplet(i{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
		end if
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function midi_edit_display.update_notes
	declare local _counter : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _iterator : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _before_break : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _note_width : real {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _bar : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _data : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _prev_id[2] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _prev_pitch : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _xpos : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (((8 * 7) * 4) - 1)) 
		_bar{int} := i{int} / (7 * 4)
		_data{int} := i{int} mod (7 * 4)
		set_control_par(_btn_midi_notes_edit[(_bar{int} * 28) + _data{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	if(mnu_edit_source{int} = 0)
		_prev_pitch{int} := - 1
		_prev_id[0]{int} := - 1
		_prev_id[1]{int} := - 1
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (((8 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) - 1)) 
			edit.note_lengths[i{int}]{int} := - 1
			_bar{int} := i{int} / (beats_per_bar{int} * 4)
			_data{int} := i{int} mod (beats_per_bar{int} * 4)
			if(((_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((i{int} * 3) + 1)]{int} >= range.low{int}) and (_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((i{int} * 3) + 1)]{int} <= range.high{int})) and (_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + (i{int} * 3)]{int} # 1))
				set_control_par(_btn_midi_notes_edit[(_bar{int} * 28) + _data{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
				_xpos{int} := ((66 + (_bar{int} * (698 / edit.zoom{int}))) + real_to_int(round((int_to_real(((_data{int} / 4) * _melody_rates[(_bar{int} * 7) + (_data{int} / 4)]{int}) + (_data{int} mod 4)){Builtin, None} * (int_to_real(698){Builtin, None} / int_to_real(edit.zoom{int}){Builtin, None})) / int_to_real(beats_per_bar{int} * _melody_rates[(_bar{int} * 7) + (_data{int} / 4)]{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}) - edit_display.offset{int}
				note.x[i{int}]{int} := _xpos{int}
				set_control_par(_btn_midi_notes_edit[(_bar{int} * 28) + _data{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}, _xpos{int}){Builtin, None}
				set_control_par(_btn_midi_notes_edit[(_bar{int} * 28) + _data{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}, (130 + 280) - int(real((_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((i{int} * 3) + 1)]{int} - range.low{int}) + 1){Builtin, None} * (real(280){Builtin, None} / real((range.high{int} - range.low{int}) + 1){Builtin, None})){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
				while(_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + (((i{int} + _iterator{int}) + 1) * 3)]{int} = 1) 
					if(((((i{int} + _iterator{int}) + 1) mod (beats_per_bar{int} * 4)) mod 4) < _melody_rates[((((i{int} + _iterator{int}) + 1) / (beats_per_bar{int} * 4)) * 7) + ((((i{int} + _iterator{int}) + 1) mod (beats_per_bar{int} * 4)) / 4)]{int})
						inc(_counter{int}){Builtin, None}
					end if
					inc(_iterator{int}){Builtin, None}
				end while
				_note_width{real} := 0
				_i{int} := 0
				while(_i{int} <= _counter{int}) 
					int_buffer{int} := _i{int}
					while((((i{int} + int_buffer{int}) mod (beats_per_bar{int} * 4)) mod 4) >= _melody_rates[(((i{int} + int_buffer{int}) / (beats_per_bar{int} * 4)) * 7) + (((i{int} + int_buffer{int}) mod (beats_per_bar{int} * 4)) / 4)]{int}) 
						int_buffer{int} := int_buffer{int} + 1
					end while
					_note_width{real} := _note_width{real} + ((int_to_real(698){Builtin, None} / int_to_real(edit.zoom{int}){Builtin, None}) / int_to_real(beats_per_bar{int} * _melody_rates[(((i{int} + int_buffer{int}) / (beats_per_bar{int} * 4)) * 7) + (((i{int} + int_buffer{int}) mod (beats_per_bar{int} * 4)) / 4)]{int}){Builtin, None})
					inc(_i{int}){Builtin, None}
				end while
				set_control_par(_btn_midi_notes_edit[(_bar{int} * 28) + _data{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}, int(round(_note_width{real}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
				edit.note_lengths[i{int}]{int} := _iterator{int} + 1
				_counter{int} := 0
				_iterator{int} := 0
				if(_xpos{int} > ((66 + 698) - 1))
					set_control_par(_btn_midi_notes_edit[(_bar{int} * 28) + _data{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
				else
					if((_xpos{int} + get_control_par(_btn_midi_notes_edit[(_bar{int} * 28) + _data{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}){Builtin, None}) > (66 + 698))
						set_control_par(_btn_midi_notes_edit[(_bar{int} * 28) + _data{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}, (66 + 698) - get_control_par(_btn_midi_notes_edit[(_bar{int} * 28) + _data{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
					else
						if((_xpos{int} + get_control_par(_btn_midi_notes_edit[(_bar{int} * 28) + _data{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}){Builtin, None}) < 66)
							set_control_par(_btn_midi_notes_edit[(_bar{int} * 28) + _data{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
						else
							if(_xpos{int} < 66)
								set_control_par(_btn_midi_notes_edit[(_bar{int} * 28) + _data{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}, get_control_par(_btn_midi_notes_edit[(_bar{int} * 28) + _data{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}){Builtin, None} - (66 - _xpos{int})){Builtin, None}
								set_control_par(_btn_midi_notes_edit[(_bar{int} * 28) + _data{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}, 66){Builtin, None}
							end if
						end if
					end if
				end if
				if(_prev_pitch{int} = _melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((i{int} * 3) + 1)]{int})
					set_control_par(_btn_midi_notes_edit[(_prev_id[0]{int} * 28) + _prev_id[1]{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}, get_control_par(_btn_midi_notes_edit[(_prev_id[0]{int} * 28) + _prev_id[1]{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}){Builtin, None} - 2){Builtin, None}
				end if
				if(btn_show_velocities{int} = 1)
					set_control_par_str(_btn_midi_notes_edit[(_bar{int} * 28) + _data{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, _melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((i{int} * 3) + 2)]{int}){Builtin, None}
				else
					set_control_par_str(_btn_midi_notes_edit[(_bar{int} * 28) + _data{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, ""){Builtin, None}
				end if
				_prev_id[0]{int} := _bar{int}
				_prev_id[1]{int} := _data{int}
				_prev_pitch{int} := _melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((i{int} * 3) + 1)]{int}
			end if
			inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
	end if
end function

function scroll_handle.update
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_edit_scroll_handle{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}, 66 + int(round(real((edit_display.offset{int} * edit.zoom{int}) * beats_per_bar{int}){Builtin, None} / real(beats_per_bar{int} * 8){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
end function

function header.update
	declare local _x_pos : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _width : int {Reuses: 0}
	if(playing{int} = 0)
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_header_playhead{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}, get_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_edit_cursor{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None} - 4){Builtin, None}
	else
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_header_playhead{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}, ((66 + int(round((real(starting_pos{int} * (8 / edit.zoom{int})){Builtin, None} * real(698){Builtin, None}) / (midi_steps{real} * real((beats_per_bar{int} * 4) * 8){Builtin, None})){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}) - edit_display.offset{int}) - 4){Builtin, None}
	end if
	if(in_range(get_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_header_playhead{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None}, 66 - 4, (66 + 698) - 4){Builtin, None})
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_header_playhead{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
	else

	end if
end function

								legato_release(inst.slot{int}, instrument.last_played_note[inst.slot{int}]{int}, none{int}, leg.note_id[inst.slot{int}]{int}, leg.release_id{int}, instrument.start_group[inst.id{int}]{int}, instrument.dynamic_layers[inst.id{int}]{int}, instrument.rr_nums[inst.id{int}]{int}, instrument.trans_groups[inst.id{int}]{int}){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
								instrument.trigger_transition[inst.slot{int}]{int} := 0
							end if
						end if
					end if
				end if
			end if
		end if
		inc(inst.slot{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	midi_edit_display.update_notes{UserDefined, Call}
end function

function reset_selection
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (8 - 1)) 
		ii{int} := 0
		while(ii{int} <= ((beats_per_bar{int} * 4) - 1)) 
			multiselection{int} := - 1
			selected_notes[((i{int} * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) + ii{int}]{int} := - 1
			inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	apply_note_colors{UserDefined, Call}
	selected_note_before{int} := - 1
end function

function apply_note_colors
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (8 - 1)) 
		ii{int} := 0
		while(ii{int} <= ((beats_per_bar{int} * 4) - 1)) 
			set_control_par_str(_btn_midi_notes_edit[(i{int} * 28) + ii{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, "lbl_melody_note"){Builtin, None}
			if(search[selected_notes{int[]}, ((i{int} * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) + ii{int}] # - 1)
				set_control_par_str(_btn_midi_notes_edit[(i{int} * 28) + ii{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, "lbl_melody_note_selected"){Builtin, None}
			end if
			inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function move_selection(steps : int)
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= multiselection{int}) 
		selected_notes[i{int}]{int} := selected_notes[i{int}]{int} + steps{int}
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function play_pos_from_cursor
	play_pos{int} := int(round(((real(((get_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_header_playhead{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None} + 4) - 66) + edit_display.offset{int}){Builtin, None} / (real(698){Builtin, None} * (real(8 + 2){Builtin, None} / real(edit.zoom{int}){Builtin, None}))) * midi_steps{real}) * real((beats_per_bar{int} * (4 + 1)) * 8){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	starting_pos{int} := play_pos{int}
end function

function hide_triplet(idx : int, hide : int)
	set_control_par(lbl_subbeat_txt[idx{unknown}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, hide{int}){Builtin, None}
end function

function update_triplet_pos(idx : int)
	set_control_par(lbl_subbeat_txt[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}, get_control_par(btn_edit_subbeat[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(lbl_subbeat_txt[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}, get_control_par(btn_edit_subbeat[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}){Builtin, None} - 3){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(lbl_subbeat_txt[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}, get_control_par(btn_edit_subbeat[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(lbl_subbeat_txt[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT{int}, 18){Builtin, None}
end function

function multiselection.sort
	sort[selected_notes{int[]}, 0, 0, multiselection{int}]
end function

function chord_selector.close{thread-unsafe}
	btn_chord_front.hide{UserDefined, Call}
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (2 - 1)) 
		ii{int} := 0
		while(ii{int} <= ((4 * 2) - 1)) 
			set_control_par(_btn_chord[(i{int} * 8) + ii{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, 0){Builtin, None}
			set_control_par(_btn_chord_front[(i{int} * 8) + ii{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, 0){Builtin, None}
			inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(UI_chord_selector{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}){Builtin, None} # HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int})
		animation.position.start(i{int}, parent.chord_selector{int}, get_control_par(get_ui_id(UI_chord_selector{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None}, get_control_par(get_ui_id(UI_chord_selector{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}){Builtin, None}, get_control_par(get_ui_id(UI_chord_selector{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None}, get_control_par(get_ui_id(UI_chord_selector{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}){Builtin, None} - 10, 5, 2){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
		wait((5 * 50) * 1000){Builtin, None}
	end if
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(UI_chord_selector{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_backdrop{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
end function

function chord_selector.set_current_chord{thread-unsafe}
	declare local _is_in_root[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	_is_in_root[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} := 0
	declare local _pos[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	_pos[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} := 0
	declare local _chord_note[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	_chord_note[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} := 0
	_chords[(chord_selector.current_chord{int} * 6) + 1]{int} := chord_modes_scale[chord_selector.current_mode{int}]{int}
	_chords[chord_selector.current_chord{int} * 6]{int} := chord_selector.current_root{int}
	_chords[(chord_selector.current_chord{int} * 6) + 2]{int} := chord_selector.current_bass{int}
	_chords[(chord_selector.current_chord{int} * 6) + 3]{int} := chord_modes_tones[chord_selector.current_mode{int}]{int}
	_chords[(chord_selector.current_chord{int} * 6) + 4]{int} := chord_selector.current_mode{int}
	apply_root_key_to_chords{UserDefined, Call}
	midi_main_display.update_chords{UserDefined, Call}
	chord_selector.open{UserDefined, Call}
end function

function chord_selector.update_roots_list
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (12 - 2)) 
		set_control_par_str(btn_chromatic[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, _root_notes[(accidental{int} * 12) + i{int}]{string}){Builtin, None}
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function save_chords
	chords.save_array[0]{int} := root_key[0]{int}
	chords.save_array[1]{int} := root_key[1]{int}
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[_chords{int[]}] - 1)) 
		chords.save_array[i{int} + 2]{int} := _chords[i{int}]{int}
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function load_chords
	root_key[0]{int} := chords.save_array[0]{int}
	mnu_root_key.key{int} := root_key[0]{int}
	root_key[1]{int} := chords.save_array[1]{int}
	mnu_root_key.mode{int} := root_key[1]{int}
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[_chords{int[]}] - 1)) 
		_chords[i{int}]{int} := chords.save_array[i{int} + 2]{int}
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	get_accidental_from_root_key{UserDefined, Call}
end function

function apply_root_key_to_chords
	declare local _pos : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _is_in_root : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _chord : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _chord_note : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _chord.mode : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _chord.root : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _next_chord.root : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _next_chord.mode : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _iterator : int {Reuses: 0}
	_chord{int} := 0
	while(_chord{int} <= ((2 * 8) - 1)) 
		_chord.mode{int} := _chords[(_chord{int} * 6) + 4]{int}
		_chord.root{int} := _chords[_chord{int} * 6]{int}
		if(_chord.root{int} # - 1)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= 7) 
				if(_chord.root{int} = ((all_root_note_nums[root_key[0]{int}]{int} + _modes[(root_key[1]{int} * 8) + i{int}]{int}) mod 12))
					_pos{int} := search[mode_positions{int[]}, abs(_chord.root{int} - (all_root_note_nums[root_key[0]{int}]{int} - mode_positions[root_key[1]{int}]{int})){Builtin, None} mod 12]
					if(_pos{int} # - 1)
						_is_in_root{int} := 1
						ii{int} := 0
						while(ii{int} <= (7 - 1)) 
							_chord_note{int} := _chord.types[(chord_modes_tones[_chord.mode{int}]{int} * 7) + ii{int}]{int}
							if(_chord_note{int} # - 1)
								if(_modes[(chord_modes_scale[_chord.mode{int}]{int} * 8) + (_chord_note{int} mod 7)]{int} # _modes[(_pos{int} * 8) + _chord_note{int}]{int})
									_is_in_root{int} := 0
								end if
							end if
							inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
						end while
						if((_chord.mode{int} = search[chord_modes_tones{int[]}, 4]) or (_chord.mode{int} = search[chord_modes_tones{int[]}, 5]))
							_next_chord.root{int} := - 1
							_iterator{int} := 0
							while((_next_chord.root{int} = - 1) and ((_chord{int} + _iterator{int}) < (2 * 8))) 
								inc(_iterator{int}){Builtin, None}
								_next_chord.root{int} := _chords[(_chord{int} + _iterator{int}) * 6]{int}
								_next_chord.mode{int} := _chords[((_chord{int} + _iterator{int}) * 6) + 4]{int}
							end while
							if(_next_chord.root{int} = _chord.root{int})
								_chords[(_chord{int} * 6) + 1]{int} := _chords[((_chord{int} + _iterator{int}) * 6) + 1]{int}
								_is_in_root{int} := 1
								ii{int} := 0
								while(ii{int} <= (7 - 1)) 
									_chord_note{int} := _chord.types[(chord_modes_tones[_next_chord.mode{int}]{int} * 7) + ii{int}]{int}
									if(_chord_note{int} # - 1)
										if(_modes[(chord_modes_scale[_next_chord.mode{int}]{int} * 8) + (_chord_note{int} mod 7)]{int} # _modes[(_pos{int} * 8) + _chord_note{int}]{int})
											_is_in_root{int} := 0
										end if
									end if
									inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
								end while
							end if
						end if
					end if
					i{int} := 7
				end if
				inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
			end while
			if(_is_in_root{int} = 1)
				message("changed scale of " & _chord{int} & " from " & _chords[(_chord{int} * 6) + 1]{int} & " to " & _pos{int}){Builtin, None}
				_chords[(_chord{int} * 6) + 1]{int} := _pos{int}
			end if
		end if
		inc(_chord{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function guess_root_key_from_chords
	declare local _notes[12] : int[] := [0] {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _chord : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _idx : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _value : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _str : string := "" {Reuses: 0}
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= 11) 
		_notes[i{int}]{int} := 0
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	_chord{int} := 0
	while(_chord{int} <= ((2 * 8) - 1)) 
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (7 - 1)) 
			if((_chords[_chord{int} * 6]{int} # - 1) and (_chord.types[(_chords[(_chord{int} * 6) + 3]{int} * 7) + i{int}]{int} # - 1))
				inc(_notes[(_chords[_chord{int} * 6]{int} + _modes[(_chords[(_chord{int} * 6) + 1]{int} * 8) + _chord.types[(_chords[(_chord{int} * 6) + 3]{int} * 7) + i{int}]{int}]{int}) mod 12]{int}){Builtin, None}
			end if
			inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
		inc(_chord{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= 11) 
		_str{string} := _str{string} & _root_notes[i{int}]{string} & ": " & _notes[i{int}]{int} & " | "
		pressed_notes[i{int}]{int} := 0
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	message(_str{string}){Builtin, None}
	lowest_note{int} := - 1
	_i{int} := 0
	while(_i{int} <= (3 - 1)) 
		array.max(_value{int}, _notes{int[]}){UserDefined, Inlining}
		_idx{int} := search[_notes{int[]}, _value{int}]
		_notes[_idx{int}]{int} := 0
		pressed_notes[_idx{int}]{int} := 1
		if(lowest_note{int} = - 1)
			lowest_note{int} := _idx{int}
		end if
		inc(_i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	identify_chord{UserDefined, Call}
	message("root = " & resulting_root{int}){Builtin, None}
	message("scale = " & resulting_scale{int}){Builtin, None}
	mnu_root_key.key{int} := search[all_root_note_nums{int[]}, resulting_root{int}]
	mnu_root_key.mode{int} := chord_modes_scale[resulting_scale{int}]{int}
	if((resulting_scale{int} = 5) or (resulting_scale{int} = 4))
		mnu_root_key.key{int} := _chords[0]{int}
		mnu_root_key.mode{int} := _chords[1]{int}
	end if
end function

function ui.update_next_prev_group_buttons
	set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(btn_chord_type_prev_group{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, btn_chord_type_prev_group_picture{string}){Builtin, None}
	if(active_chord_type_group{int} = 0)
		set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(btn_chord_type_prev_group{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, btn_chord_type_prev_group_picture{string} & "_disabled"){Builtin, None}
	end if
	set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(btn_chord_type_next_group{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, btn_chord_type_next_group_picture{string}){Builtin, None}
	if(active_chord_type_group{int} = 3)
		set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(btn_chord_type_next_group{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int}, btn_chord_type_next_group_picture{string} & "_disabled"){Builtin, None}
	end if
end function

function update_type_buttons
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[btn_chord_type{int[]}] - 1)) 
		set_control_par(btn_chord_type[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, 0){Builtin, None}
		if((i{int} + chord_type_group_offset{int}) < num_elements[chord_type_names{string[]}])
			if((i{int} + chord_type_group_offset{int}) = search[chord_type_order{int[]}, chord_selector.current_mode{int}])
				set_control_par(btn_chord_type[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, 1){Builtin, None}
			end if
			set_control_par(btn_chord_type[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
			set_control_par_str(btn_chord_type[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, chord_type_names[chord_type_order[i{int} + chord_type_group_offset{int}]{int}]{string}){Builtin, None}
		else
			set_control_par(btn_chord_type[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
		end if
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function get_accidental_from_root_key
	declare local _key : int := all_root_note_nums[mnu_root_key.key{int}]{int} {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _mode : int := mnu_root_key.mode{int} {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _pos : int {Reuses: 0}
	Co5.get_pos(_pos{int}, _key{int}, _mode{int}){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
	if(_pos{int} > 5)
		accidental{int} := 1
	else
		accidental{int} := 0
	end if
	if((mnu_root_key.key{int} > 0) and (mnu_root_key.key{int} < (num_elements[all_root_note_nums{int[]}] - 1)))
		if(_key{int} = all_root_note_nums[mnu_root_key.key{int} - 1]{int})
			accidental{int} := 1
		else
			if(_key{int} = all_root_note_nums[mnu_root_key.key{int} + 1]{int})
				accidental{int} := 0
			end if
		end if
	end if
	midi_main_display.update_chords{UserDefined, Call}
	chord_selector.update_roots_list{UserDefined, Call}
end function

function Co5.get_pos(result : int, key : int, mode : int)
	declare local _mover : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _counter : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	while(_mover{int} # key{int}) 
		inc(_counter{int}){Builtin, None}
		_mover{int} := (_mover{int} + 7) mod 12
	end while
	result{int} := ((_counter{int} - root_key.mode_shifts[mode{unknown}]{int}) + 12) mod 12
end function

function engine.reset{thread-unsafe}
	playing{int} := 0
	play_pos{int} := starting_pos{int}
	if(play_pos{int} < int(midi_steps{real}){Builtin, None})
		play_pos{int} := 0
	end if
	cursor.update{UserDefined, Call}
	if(edit_suggestion.play_pos_buffer{int} # - 1)
		play_pos{int} := edit_suggestion.play_pos_buffer{int}
	end if
	btn_play{int} := 0
	legato.stop_all{UserDefined, Call}
end function

function cursor.update
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_edit_cursor{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}, (66 + int(round((real(play_pos{int} * (8 / edit.zoom{int})){Builtin, None} * real(698){Builtin, None}) / (midi_steps{real} * real((beats_per_bar{int} * 4) * 8){Builtin, None})){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}) - edit_display.offset{int}){Builtin, None}
	if(in_range(get_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_edit_cursor{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None}, 66, 66 + 698){Builtin, None})
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_edit_cursor{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
	else
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_edit_cursor{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
		if(btn_follow_mode{int} = 1)
			if((get_control_par(edit_display{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}){Builtin, None} = HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}) and (playing{int} = 1))
				if((play_pos{int} > 0) and ((real(play_pos{int}){Builtin, None} / midi_steps{real}) < real(((4 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 8) - 1){Builtin, None}))
					edit_display.offset{int} := ((get_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_edit_cursor{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None} - 66) + edit_display.offset{int}) - 1
					scroll_handle.update{UserDefined, Call}
					if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_edit_scroll_handle{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None} < 66)
						set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_edit_scroll_handle{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}, 66){Builtin, None}
					else
						if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_edit_scroll_handle{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None} > ((66 + 698) - get_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_edit_scroll_handle{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}){Builtin, None}))
							set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_edit_scroll_handle{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}, (66 + 698) - get_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_edit_scroll_handle{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
						end if
					end if
					edit_display.offset{int} := real_to_int(round((int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_edit_scroll_handle{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None} - 66){Builtin, None} / int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_edit_scroller{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}){Builtin, None} - get_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_edit_scroll_handle{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}) * int_to_real(((8 / edit.zoom{int}) - 1) * 698){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
					midi_edit_display.update_bars{UserDefined, Call}
					midi_edit_display.update_notes{UserDefined, Call}
					header.update{UserDefined, Call}
				end if
			end if
		end if
	end if
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_main_cursor{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}, (113 - 2) + int(round(((real(play_pos{int} + 1){Builtin, None} mod (midi_steps{real} * real((4 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4){Builtin, None})) * real(624){Builtin, None}) / (midi_steps{real} * real((beats_per_bar{int} * 4) * 4){Builtin, None})){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_main_cursor{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}, 301 + ((play_pos{int} / (((int(midi_steps{real}){Builtin, None} * 4) * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4)) * (40 + 30))){Builtin, None}
end function

function transport_settings_display.open{thread-unsafe}
