	animation.position.start(none{int}, transport_settings_display{int}, get_control_par(transport_settings_display{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None}, 435 - 120, get_control_par(transport_settings_display{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None}, 435 - 100, 5, 3){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
	animation.picture.start(none{int}, get_ui_id(lbl_transport_settings.bg{int}){Builtin, None}, 1, 99, 5, 3){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
	wait(50 * 1000){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(transport_settings_display{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_backdrop{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
end function

function transport_settings_display.close{thread-unsafe}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_transport_settings{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, 0){Builtin, None}
	if(get_control_par(transport_settings_display{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}){Builtin, None} # HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int})
		animation.position.start(none{int}, transport_settings_display{int}, get_control_par(transport_settings_display{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None}, 435 - 100, get_control_par(transport_settings_display{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None}, 435 - 120, 5, 2){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
		animation.picture.start(none{int}, get_ui_id(lbl_transport_settings.bg{int}){Builtin, None}, 99, 1, 5, 2){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
		wait((250 * 1000) + 1){Builtin, None}
	end if
	set_control_par(transport_settings_display{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_backdrop{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
end function

function set_chord_playback_volume
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, get_control_par(get_ui_id(sli_chords_preview_vol{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None}, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + 15){Builtin, None}
end function

function pitch.generate_next(result : int, prev3 : int, prev2 : int, prev1 : int)
	declare local _rand : int {Reuses: 0}
	Rand(_rand{int}, 1, 1000){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
	declare local _total : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	result{int} := 0
	i0{int} := 0
	while(i0{int} <= (7 - 1)) 
		_total{int} := _total{int} + _pitch.transition_matrix[(((prev3{int} * (1 + (sh_right(6 - prev3{int}, 31){Builtin, None} .or. sh_right(prev3{int}, 31){Builtin, None}))) - (6 * sh_right(6 - prev3{int}, 31){Builtin, None})) * 343) + ((((prev2{int} * (1 + (sh_right(6 - prev2{int}, 31){Builtin, None} .or. sh_right(prev2{int}, 31){Builtin, None}))) - (6 * sh_right(6 - prev2{int}, 31){Builtin, None})) * 49) + ((((prev1{int} * (1 + (sh_right(6 - prev1{int}, 31){Builtin, None} .or. sh_right(prev1{int}, 31){Builtin, None}))) - (6 * sh_right(6 - prev1{int}, 31){Builtin, None})) * 7) + i0{int}))]{int}
		if(_rand{int} <= _total{int})
			result{int} := i0{int}
			i0{int} := 7
		end if
		inc(i0{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function rhythm.generate_next(result : int, prev3 : int, prev2 : int, prev1 : int)
	declare local _rand : int {Reuses: 0}
	Rand(_rand{int}, 1, 1000){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
	declare local _total : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	result{int} := 6
	i0{int} := 0
	while(i0{int} <= (9 - 1)) 
		_total{int} := _total{int} + _rhythm.transition_matrix[(((prev3{int} * (1 + (sh_right(8 - prev3{int}, 31){Builtin, None} .or. sh_right(prev3{int}, 31){Builtin, None}))) - (8 * sh_right(8 - prev3{int}, 31){Builtin, None})) * 729) + ((((prev2{int} * (1 + (sh_right(8 - prev2{int}, 31){Builtin, None} .or. sh_right(prev2{int}, 31){Builtin, None}))) - (8 * sh_right(8 - prev2{int}, 31){Builtin, None})) * 81) + ((((prev1{int} * (1 + (sh_right(8 - prev1{int}, 31){Builtin, None} .or. sh_right(prev1{int}, 31){Builtin, None}))) - (8 * sh_right(8 - prev1{int}, 31){Builtin, None})) * 9) + i0{int}))]{int}
		if(_rand{int} <= _total{int})
			result{int} := i0{int}
			i0{int} := 9
		end if
		inc(i0{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	if(_total{int} = 0)
		message("zero frequency at " & prev3{int} & "|" & prev2{int} & "|" & prev1{int}){Builtin, None}
	end if
end function

function generate_suggestions{thread-unsafe}
	declare local _next_pitch[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	declare local __last_pitches[100 * 3] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	ndarray$dim2<-init[int](__last_pitches{int[]}, - 1, NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}){UserDefined, None}
	declare local _next_note[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _next_rhythm[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	declare local __last_rhythms[100 * 3] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	ndarray$dim2<-init[int](__last_rhythms{int[]}, - 1, NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}){UserDefined, None}
	declare local _offset[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	_offset[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} := 0
	declare local _note_len_counter[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _prev_pitch[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _seed[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _current_key.root[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	_current_key.root[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} := root_key[0]{int}
	declare local _current_key.mode[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	_current_key.mode[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} := root_key[1]{int}
	declare local _chord_offset[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _velocity_addition[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	_velocity_addition[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} := 0
	declare local _failsafe_counter[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	_failsafe_counter[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} := 0
	declare local _sum_breaks[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	_sum_breaks[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} := 0
	declare local _sum_empty_beats[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	_sum_empty_beats[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} := 0
	declare local _len[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	_len[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} := 0
	declare local _len_before[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	_len_before[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} := 0
	declare local _total_silence[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	_total_silence[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} := 0
	declare local _sum_syncopations[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	_sum_syncopations[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} := 0
	declare local _syncopation_difference[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	_syncopation_difference[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} := 0
	declare local _syncopation_after_break[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	_syncopation_after_break[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} := 0
	declare local _sum_notes[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	_sum_notes[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} := 0
	declare local _sum_different_pitches[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	_sum_different_pitches[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} := 0
	declare local __used_pitches[100 * 12] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	ndarray$dim2<-init[int](__used_pitches{int[]}, - 1, NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}){UserDefined, None}
	declare local __pitch_before[100 * 4] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	ndarray$dim2<-init[int](__pitch_before{int[]}, - 1, NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}){UserDefined, None}
	declare local _too_many_double_notes[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	_too_many_double_notes[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} := 0

					_redo[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} := 1
				end if
				if(((_sum_notes[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} < 3) or (_sum_different_pitches[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} < 3)) or (_sum_notes_bar[i{int} * 2]{int} < 2))
					_redo[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} := 1
				end if
				_i{int} := 0
				while(_i{int} <= (4 - 1)) 
					if(search[structure_array{int[]}, _i{int}] # - 1)
						_ii{int} := 0
						while(_ii{int} <= (2 - 1)) 
							if(abs(_sum_notes_bar[(i{int} * 2) + _ii{int}]{int} - _sum_notes_bar[(_i{int} * 2) + _ii{int}]{int}){Builtin, None} > 3)
								_redo[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} := 1
							end if
							inc(_ii{int}){Builtin, None}
						end while
					end if
					inc(_i{int}){Builtin, None}
				end while
				if((((mnu_syncopation{int} = 1) and (_sum_syncopations[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} > 0)) or (_suggestions[(i{int} * 168) + ((4 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 3)]{int} = 1)) or ((mnu_syncopation{int} = 2) and (_sum_syncopations[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} <= 4)))
					_redo[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} := 1
				end if
				if(((_too_many_double_notes[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} = 1) or (_disallow_rhythm[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} = 1)) or (_single_16th_on_1[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} = 1))
					_redo[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} := 1
				end if
				if((_syncopation_difference[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} = 1) or (_syncopation_after_break[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} = 1))
					_redo[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} := 1
				end if
				_note_len_counter[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} := 0
				if(structure_array[0]{int} # i{int})
					ii{int} := 0
					while(ii{int} <= (((2 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) - 1)) 
						if((_suggestions[(i{int} * 168) + (ii{int} * 3)]{int} = 0) and (_suggestions[(i{int} * 168) + ((ii{int} * 3) + 1)]{int} = - 1))
							_suggestions[(i{int} * 168) + (ii{int} * 3)]{int} := 1
						end if
						inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
					end while
				end if
				if(_redo[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} = 1)
					if(_redo_counter[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} < 128)
						console.print("Suggestion " & i{int} & " redo"){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
						dec(i{int}){Builtin, None}
						inc(_redo_counter[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
						wait(10){Builtin, None}
					else
						console.print(i{int} & " reached redo limit"){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
						_redo_counter[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} := 0
					end if
				else
					_redo_counter[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} := 0
				end if
			end if
		end if
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (4 - 1)) 
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function melody.quantize(_array : int[], subarray : int, start : int, max : int)
	ii{int} := start{int}
	while(ii{int} <= (max{int} - 1)) 
		if((_array[(subarray{unknown} * (num_elements[_array{int[]}, 2] * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3])) + ((ii{int} * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3]) + 1)]{int} = - 1) and ((ii{int} mod 4) = 0))
			if(_array[(subarray{unknown} * (num_elements[_array{int[]}, 2] * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3])) + (((ii{int} - 1) * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3]) + 1)]{int} # - 1)
				_array[(subarray{unknown} * (num_elements[_array{int[]}, 2] * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3])) + ((ii{int} * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3]) + 1)]{int} := _array[(subarray{unknown} * (num_elements[_array{int[]}, 2] * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3])) + (((ii{int} - 1) * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3]) + 1)]{int}
				_array[(subarray{unknown} * (num_elements[_array{int[]}, 2] * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3])) + (ii{int} * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3])]{int} := 0
				_array[(subarray{unknown} * (num_elements[_array{int[]}, 2] * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3])) + (((ii{int} - 1) * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3]) + 1)]{int} := - 1
				_array[(subarray{unknown} * (num_elements[_array{int[]}, 2] * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3])) + ((ii{int} - 1) * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3])]{int} := 1
			else
				if(_array[(subarray{unknown} * (num_elements[_array{int[]}, 2] * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3])) + (((ii{int} + 1) * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3]) + 1)]{int} # - 1)
					_array[(subarray{unknown} * (num_elements[_array{int[]}, 2] * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3])) + ((ii{int} * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3]) + 1)]{int} := _array[(subarray{unknown} * (num_elements[_array{int[]}, 2] * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3])) + (((ii{int} + 1) * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3]) + 1)]{int}
					_array[(subarray{unknown} * (num_elements[_array{int[]}, 2] * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3])) + (ii{int} * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3])]{int} := 0
					_array[(subarray{unknown} * (num_elements[_array{int[]}, 2] * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3])) + (((ii{int} + 1) * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3]) + 1)]{int} := - 1
					_array[(subarray{unknown} * (num_elements[_array{int[]}, 2] * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3])) + ((ii{int} + 1) * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3])]{int} := 1
				end if
			end if
		end if
		inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function generate_melody
	declare local _iterator : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _seed : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _is_in_a : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _is_in_b : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _first_appearance : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _position : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _len : int {Reuses: 0}
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (8 - 1)) 
		if((current_structure_part{int} = - 1) or (structure_array[current_structure_part{int}]{int} = structure_array[i{int} / 2]{int}))
			ii{int} := 0
			while(ii{int} <= (beats_per_bar{int} - 1)) 
				_melody_rates[(i{int} * 7) + ii{int}]{int} := 4
				inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
			end while
		end if
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (((8 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) - 1)) 
		_i{int} := 0
		while(_i{int} <= (4 - 1)) 
			if((current_structure_part{int} = - 1) or (((structure_array[current_structure_part{int}]{int} = _i{int}) and (structure_array[i{int} / ((2 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4)]{int} = _i{int})) and (((i{int} / ((2 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4)) = current_structure_part{int}) or (btn_regenerate_theme{int} = 1))))
				_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + (i{int} * 3)]{int} := _suggestions[(structure_array[i{int} / ((2 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4)]{int} * 168) + ((i{int} mod ((2 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4)) * 3)]{int}
				_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((i{int} * 3) + 1)]{int} := _suggestions[(structure_array[i{int} / ((2 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4)]{int} * 168) + (((i{int} mod ((2 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4)) * 3) + 1)]{int}
				_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((i{int} * 3) + 2)]{int} := _suggestions[(structure_array[i{int} / ((2 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4)]{int} * 168) + (((i{int} mod ((2 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4)) * 3) + 2)]{int}
				_first_appearance{int} := search[structure_array{int[]}, structure_array[i{int} / ((2 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4)]{int}]
				if(_first_appearance{int} = (i{int} / ((2 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4)))
					if(((_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + (i{int} * 3)]{int} = 0) and ((i{int} mod 4) # 0)) and (int(tempo.internal_multiplier{real}){Builtin, None} = 1))
						Rand(_seed{int}, 0, 99){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
						if(sli_triplets{int} > _seed{int})
							_melody_rates[((i{int} / (beats_per_bar{int} * 4)) * 7) + ((i{int} mod (beats_per_bar{int} * 4)) / 4)]{int} := 3
						end if
					end if
				else
					_position{int} := (_first_appearance{int} * ((2 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4)) + (i{int} mod ((2 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4))
					_melody_rates[((i{int} / (beats_per_bar{int} * 4)) * 7) + ((i{int} mod (beats_per_bar{int} * 4)) / 4)]{int} := _melody_rates[((_position{int} / (beats_per_bar{int} * 4)) * 7) + ((_position{int} mod (beats_per_bar{int} * 4)) / 4)]{int}
				end if
			end if
			inc(_i{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	if(int(tempo.internal_multiplier{real}){Builtin, None} = 1)
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (((8 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) - 1)) 
			if((((i{int} mod 4) = 0) and (_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + (i{int} * 3)]{int} = 0)) and (i{int} < (((8 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) - 4)))
				if((((beats_per_bar{int} = 4) and ((((i{int} / 4) mod beats_per_bar{int}) = 0) or (((i{int} / 4) mod beats_per_bar{int}) = 2))) or ((beats_per_bar{int} = 3) and (((i{int} / 4) mod beats_per_bar{int}) = 0))) or ((beats_per_bar{int} = 5) and ((((i{int} / 4) mod beats_per_bar{int}) = 0) or (((i{int} / 4) mod beats_per_bar{int}) = 3))))
					if((((_melody_rates[((i{int} / (beats_per_bar{int} * 4)) * 7) + ((i{int} mod (beats_per_bar{int} * 4)) / 4)]{int} = 3) and (_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((i{int} + 1) * 3)]{int} = 1)) and (_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((i{int} + 2) * 3)]{int} = 0)) and (_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((i{int} + 4) * 3)]{int} = 0))
						if((((_melody_rates[(((i{int} + 4) / (beats_per_bar{int} * 4)) * 7) + (((i{int} + 4) mod (beats_per_bar{int} * 4)) / 4)]{int} = 4) and (_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + (((i{int} + 4) + 1) * 3)]{int} = 1)) and (_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + (((i{int} + 4) + 2) * 3)]{int} = 1)) and (_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + (((i{int} + 4) + 3) * 3)]{int} = 1))
							_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + (((i{int} + 4) + 1) * 3)]{int} := 0
							_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((((i{int} + 4) + 1) * 3) + 1)]{int} := _melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + (((i{int} + 4) * 3) + 1)]{int}
							_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((((i{int} + 4) + 1) * 3) + 2)]{int} := _melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + (((i{int} + 4) * 3) + 2)]{int}
							_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((i{int} + 4) * 3)]{int} := 1
							_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + (((i{int} + 4) * 3) + 1)]{int} := - 1
							_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + (((i{int} + 4) * 3) + 2)]{int} := 0
							_melody_rates[(((i{int} + 4) / (beats_per_bar{int} * 4)) * 7) + (((i{int} + 4) mod (beats_per_bar{int} * 4)) / 4)]{int} := 3
						end if
					end if
					if(((((_melody_rates[((i{int} / (beats_per_bar{int} * 4)) * 7) + ((i{int} mod (beats_per_bar{int} * 4)) / 4)]{int} = 4) and (_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((i{int} + 1) * 3)]{int} = 1)) and (_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((i{int} + 2) * 3)]{int} = 1)) and (_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((i{int} + 3) * 3)]{int} = 1)) and (_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((i{int} + 4) * 3)]{int} = 0))
						if(((_melody_rates[(((i{int} + 4) / (beats_per_bar{int} * 4)) * 7) + (((i{int} + 4) mod (beats_per_bar{int} * 4)) / 4)]{int} = 3) and (_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + (((i{int} + 4) + 1) * 3)]{int} = 1)) and (_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + (((i{int} + 4) + 2) * 3)]{int} = 0))
							_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((i{int} + 2) * 3)]{int} := 0
							_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + (((i{int} + 2) * 3) + 1)]{int} := _melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + (((i{int} + 4) * 3) + 1)]{int}
							_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + (((i{int} + 2) * 3) + 2)]{int} := _melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + (((i{int} + 4) * 3) + 2)]{int}
							_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((i{int} + 4) * 3)]{int} := 1
							_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + (((i{int} + 4) * 3) + 1)]{int} := - 1
							_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + (((i{int} + 4) * 3) + 2)]{int} := 0
							_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + (((i{int} + 4) + 1) * 3)]{int} := 0
							_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((((i{int} + 4) + 1) * 3) + 1)]{int} := _melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((((i{int} + 4) + 2) * 3) + 1)]{int}
							_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((((i{int} + 4) + 1) * 3) + 2)]{int} := _melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((((i{int} + 4) + 2) * 3) + 2)]{int}
							_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + (((i{int} + 4) + 2) * 3)]{int} := 1
							_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((((i{int} + 4) + 2) * 3) + 1)]{int} := - 1
							_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((((i{int} + 4) + 2) * 3) + 2)]{int} := 0
							_melody_rates[((i{int} / (beats_per_bar{int} * 4)) * 7) + ((i{int} mod (beats_per_bar{int} * 4)) / 4)]{int} := 3
						end if
					end if
				end if
			end if
			inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
	end if
	if(current_structure_part{int} = - 1)
		melody.adapt_to_chords(0, _melody{int[]}, current_segment{int}, ((8 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) - 1, 0){UserDefined, Inlining}
		melody.remove_jumps(0, _melody{int[]}, current_segment{int}, ((8 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) - 2){UserDefined, Inlining}
		melody.make_mid_ending{UserDefined, Call}
		melody.make_ending{UserDefined, Call}
	else
		_iterator{int} := 0
		while(_iterator{int} <= ((8 / 2) - 1)) 
			_i{int} := 0
			while(_i{int} <= (4 - 1)) 
				if(((structure_array[current_structure_part{int}]{int} = _i{int}) and (structure_array[_iterator{int}]{int} = _i{int})) and (((_iterator{int} = current_structure_part{int}) or (current_structure_part{int} = - 1)) or (btn_regenerate_theme{int} = 1)))
					melody.adapt_to_chords((_iterator{int} * 2) * beats_per_bar{int}, _melody{int[]}, current_segment{int}, ((((_iterator{int} + 1) * 2) * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) - 1, 0){UserDefined, Inlining}
					if(_iterator{int} = 1)
						melody.make_mid_ending{UserDefined, Call}
					else
						if(_iterator{int} = 3)
							melody.make_ending{UserDefined, Call}
						end if
					end if
					melody.remove_jumps((_iterator{int} * 2) * beats_per_bar{int}, _melody{int[]}, current_segment{int}, ((((_iterator{int} + 1) * 2) * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) - 2){UserDefined, Inlining}
				end if
				inc(_i{int}){Builtin, None}
			end while
			inc(_iterator{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
	end if
	melody.put_in_range(_melody{int[]}, current_segment{int}, ((8 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) - 1){UserDefined, Inlining}
	empty_unused_values{UserDefined, Call}
	midi_export.update{UserDefined, Call}
end function

function melody.adapt_to_chords(start : int, _array : int[], subarray : int, max : int, chord_offset : int)
	declare local _root_pos : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _chord_pos : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _current_key.root : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _current_key.mode : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _current_key.tones : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _chord_hit : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _key_by_root : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _is_in_root : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _is_out_of_scale : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _random_dir : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _seed : int {Reuses: 0}
	Rand(_seed{int}, 0, 1000){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
	declare local _last_pitch : int := - 1 {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _last_chord.root : int := all_root_note_nums[root_key[0]{int}]{int} {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _last_chord.mode : int := all_root_note_nums[root_key[1]{int}]{int} {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _last_chord.tones : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _next_chord.mode : int := all_root_note_nums[root_key[1]{int}]{int} {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _in_key : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _note_len : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _previously_dissonant : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _is_dissonant : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _jump_to_next_note : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _resolution_step : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _dissonances_in_theme : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	Co5.get_pos(_root_pos{int}, all_root_note_nums[mnu_root_key.key{int}]{int}, mnu_root_key.mode{int}){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
	_i{int} := start{int} * 4
	while(_i{int} <= max{int}) 
		if((_array[(subarray{unknown} * (num_elements[_array{int[]}, 2] * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3])) + ((_i{int} * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3]) + 1)]{int} # - 1) and (_array[(subarray{unknown} * (num_elements[_array{int[]}, 2] * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3])) + (_i{int} * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3])]{int} = 0))
			_chord_hit{int} := 0
			_chord_pos{int} := - 1
			_key_by_root{int} := 0
			note.get_length(_note_len{int}, _array{int[]}, subarray{unknown}, _i{int}, max{int}){UserDefined, Inlining}
			_current_key.root{int} := _chords[((_i{int} + chord_offset{int}) / ((4 * beats_per_bar{int}) / 2)) * 6]{int}
			_current_key.mode{int} := _chords[(((_i{int} + chord_offset{int}) / ((4 * beats_per_bar{int}) / 2)) * 6) + 1]{int}
			_current_key.tones{int} := _chords[(((_i{int} + chord_offset{int}) / ((4 * beats_per_bar{int}) / 2)) * 6) + 3]{int}
			if((((_i{int} + chord_offset{int}) mod ((4 * beats_per_bar{int}) / 2)) = 0) and (_current_key.root{int} # - 1))
				_chord_hit{int} := 1
			end if
			if(_current_key.root{int} = - 1)
				_current_key.root{int} := _last_chord.root{int}
				_current_key.mode{int} := _last_chord.mode{int}
				_current_key.tones{int} := _last_chord.tones{int}
			end if
			_last_chord.root{int} := _current_key.root{int}
			_last_chord.mode{int} := _current_key.mode{int}
			_last_chord.tones{int} := _current_key.tones{int}
			Co5.get_pos(_chord_pos{int}, _current_key.root{int}, _current_key.mode{int}){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
			if((((_chord_pos{int} = _root_pos{int}) or (((_chord_pos{int} + 1) mod 12) = _root_pos{int})) or (((_chord_pos{int} - 1) mod 12) = _root_pos{int})) and (_chord_pos{int} # - 1))
				_key_by_root{int} := 1
			end if
			_in_key{int} := 0
			_is_out_of_scale{int} := 0
			Rand(_seed{int}, 0, 1000){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
			if(((_seed{int} > sli_prefer_scale_notes{int}) and (_previously_dissonant{int} = 0)) and (_note_len{int} <= 8))
				_is_out_of_scale{int} := 1
			end if
			Rand(_seed{int}, 0, 1){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
			if(_seed{int} = 1)
				_random_dir{int} := 1
			else
				_random_dir{int} := - 1
			end if
			error.counter{int} := 0
			while(_in_key{int} = 0) 
				inc(error.counter{int}){Builtin, None}
				ii{int} := 0
				while(ii{int} <= 7) 
					_is_dissonant{int} := 1
					_jump_to_next_note{int} := 0
					_resolution_step{int} := 0
					iii{int} := 0
					while(iii{int} <= 5) 
						if(ii{int} = _chord.types[(_current_key.tones{int} * 7) + (iii{int} mod 7)]{int})
							_is_dissonant{int} := 0
							_previously_dissonant{int} := 0

function melody.put_in_range(_array : int[], subarray : int, max : int)
	message("exec range"){Builtin, None}
	declare local _error_protection : int {Reuses: 0}
	_i{int} := 0
	while(_i{int} <= max{unknown}) 
		_error_protection{int} := 8
		if((_array[(subarray{unknown} * (num_elements[_array{int[]}, 2] * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3])) + ((_i{int} * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3]) + 1)]{int} # - 1) and ((_array[(subarray{unknown} * (num_elements[_array{int[]}, 2] * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3])) + ((_i{int} * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3]) + 1)]{int} < range.low{int}) or (_array[(subarray{unknown} * (num_elements[_array{int[]}, 2] * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3])) + ((_i{int} * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3]) + 1)]{int} > range.high{int})))
			while((_array[(subarray{unknown} * (num_elements[_array{int[]}, 2] * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3])) + ((_i{int} * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3]) + 1)]{int} < range.low{int}) and (_error_protection{int} > 0)) 
				_array[(subarray{unknown} * (num_elements[_array{int[]}, 2] * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3])) + ((_i{int} * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3]) + 1)]{int} := _array[(subarray{unknown} * (num_elements[_array{int[]}, 2] * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3])) + ((_i{int} * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3]) + 1)]{int} + 12
				message("range pitched up " & _i{int}){Builtin, None}
				dec(_error_protection{int}){Builtin, None}
			end while
			while((_array[(subarray{unknown} * (num_elements[_array{int[]}, 2] * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3])) + ((_i{int} * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3]) + 1)]{int} > range.high{int}) and (_error_protection{int} > 0)) 
				_array[(subarray{unknown} * (num_elements[_array{int[]}, 2] * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3])) + ((_i{int} * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3]) + 1)]{int} := _array[(subarray{unknown} * (num_elements[_array{int[]}, 2] * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3])) + ((_i{int} * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3]) + 1)]{int} - 12
				message("range pitched down " & _i{int}){Builtin, None}
				dec(_error_protection{int}){Builtin, None}
			end while
			if(_error_protection{int} < 1)
				message("error in array[" & i{int} & " | " & _i{int} & "]"){Builtin, None}
				console.print0("error in array[" & i{int} & " | " & _i{int} & "]"){UserDefined, ParameterStack}

		end if

	end while
end function

function melody.remove_jumps(start : int, _array : int[], subarray : int, max : int)
	declare local _prev_pitch : int := - 1 {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _dist : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _seed : int {Reuses: 0}
	_i{int} := start{int} * 4
	while(_i{int} <= max{unknown}) 
		if((_array[(subarray{unknown} * (num_elements[_array{int[]}, 2] * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3])) + ((_i{int} * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3]) + 1)]{int} # - 1) and (sli_max_interval{int} < 13))
			_dist{int} := _array[(subarray{unknown} * (num_elements[_array{int[]}, 2] * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3])) + ((_i{int} * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3]) + 1)]{int} - _prev_pitch{int}
			if((abs(_dist{int}){Builtin, None} > sli_max_interval{int}) and (_prev_pitch{int} # - 1))
				if((_dist{int} < 0) and (abs((_array[(subarray{unknown} * (num_elements[_array{int[]}, 2] * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3])) + ((_i{int} * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3]) + 1)]{int} + 12) - _prev_pitch{int}){Builtin, None} < _dist{int}))
					_array[(subarray{unknown} * (num_elements[_array{int[]}, 2] * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3])) + ((_i{int} * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3]) + 1)]{int} := _array[(subarray{unknown} * (num_elements[_array{int[]}, 2] * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3])) + ((_i{int} * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3]) + 1)]{int} + 12
				else
					if(abs((_array[(subarray{unknown} * (num_elements[_array{int[]}, 2] * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3])) + ((_i{int} * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3]) + 1)]{int} - 12) - _prev_pitch{int}){Builtin, None} < _dist{int})
						_array[(subarray{unknown} * (num_elements[_array{int[]}, 2] * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3])) + ((_i{int} * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3]) + 1)]{int} := _array[(subarray{unknown} * (num_elements[_array{int[]}, 2] * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3])) + ((_i{int} * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3]) + 1)]{int} - 12
					end if
				end if
				_dist{int} := _array[(subarray{unknown} * (num_elements[_array{int[]}, 2] * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3])) + ((_i{int} * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3]) + 1)]{int} - _prev_pitch{int}
				if(abs(_dist{int}){Builtin, None} > sli_max_interval{int})
					_seed{int} := 0
					if(_seed{int} <= sli_double_notes{int})

					end if
				end if
			end if
			_prev_pitch{int} := _array[(subarray{unknown} * (num_elements[_array{int[]}, 2] * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3])) + ((_i{int} * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3]) + 1)]{int}
		end if
		inc(_i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function melody.make_ending
	declare local _offset : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _offset_breaker : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _octified : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _dist : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _note_before : int := 1 {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _pitch_before : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _oct_offset : int {Reuses: 0}
	_offset_breaker{int} := 0
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (beats_per_bar{int} * 4)) 
		if(_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((((((8 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) - 1) - i{int}) * 3) + 1)]{int} # - 1)
			if(i{int} < 7)
				_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((((((8 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) - 1) - i{int}) * 3) + 1)]{int} := - 1
				_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + (((((8 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) - 1) - i{int}) * 3)]{int} := 1
			else
				while((_chords[((((((8 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) - 1) - i{int}) - _offset{int}) / ((4 * beats_per_bar{int}) / 2)) * 6]{int} = - 1) and (_offset_breaker{int} = 0)) 
					inc(_offset{int}){Builtin, None}
					if((((((8 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) - 1) - i{int}) - _offset{int}) < 0)
						_offset_breaker{int} := 1
					end if
				end while
				if(_offset_breaker{int} = 0)
					_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((((((8 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) - 1) - i{int}) * 3) + 1)]{int} := ((range.low{int} / 12) * 12) + _chords[((((((8 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) - 1) - i{int}) - _offset{int}) / ((4 * beats_per_bar{int}) / 2)) * 6]{int}
					while(_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((((((8 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) - 1) - i{int}) - _note_before{int}) * 3)]{int} = 1) 
						inc(_note_before{int}){Builtin, None}
					end while
					_oct_offset{int} := 0
					_pitch_before{int} := _melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + (((((((8 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) - 1) - i{int}) - _note_before{int}) * 3) + 1)]{int}
					if((_pitch_before{int} - _melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((((((8 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) - 1) - i{int}) * 3) + 1)]{int}) > 19)
						_oct_offset{int} := 12
					end if
					_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((((((8 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) - 1) - i{int}) * 3) + 1)]{int} := (_pitch_before{int} - ((_pitch_before{int} - _melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((((((8 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) - 1) - i{int}) * 3) + 1)]{int}) mod 12)) + _oct_offset{int}
					_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((((((8 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) - 1) - i{int}) * 3) + 2)]{int} := 5
					if(_chords[90]{int} # - 1)
						_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((((8 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) - 8) * 3)]{int} := 0
						_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + (((((8 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) - 8) * 3) + 1)]{int} := (((range.low{int} / 12) * 12) + _chords[90]{int}) + _modes[_chords[49]{int} * 8]{int}
						_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + (((((8 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) - 8) * 3) + 1)]{int} := (_pitch_before{int} - ((_pitch_before{int} - _melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + (((((8 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) - 8) * 3) + 1)]{int}) mod 12)) + _oct_offset{int}
					end if
					if(_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((((((8 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) - 1) - i{int}) * 3) + 1)]{int} # _pitch_before{int})
						_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + (((((8 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) - 1) - i{int}) * 3)]{int} := 0
					end if
				end if
				i{int} := beats_per_bar{int} * 4
			end if
		end if
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function melody.make_mid_ending
	declare local _offset : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _offset_breaker : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _note_before : int := 1 {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _pitch_before : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _oct_offset : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare local rand_mid_ending_note : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	_offset_breaker{int} := 0
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (beats_per_bar{int} * 4)) 
		if(_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((((((4 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) - 1) - i{int}) * 3) + 1)]{int} # - 1)
			if(i{int} < 7)
				_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((((((4 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) - 1) - i{int}) * 3) + 1)]{int} := - 1
				_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + (((((4 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) - 1) - i{int}) * 3)]{int} := 1
			else
				while(((_chords[((((((4 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) - 1) - i{int}) - _offset{int}) / ((4 * beats_per_bar{int}) / 2)) * 6]{int} = - 1) or (_offset{int} > ((4 * beats_per_bar{int}) / 2))) and (_offset_breaker{int} = 0)) 
					inc(_offset{int}){Builtin, None}
					if(((((((8 / 2) * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) - 1) - i{int}) - _offset{int}) < 0)
						_offset_breaker{int} := 1
					end if
				end while
				if(_offset_breaker{int} = 0)
					Rand(rand_mid_ending_note{int}, 0, 2){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
					_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((((((4 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) - 1) - i{int}) * 3) + 1)]{int} := (((range.low{int} / 12) * 12) + _chords[((((((4 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) - 1) - i{int}) - _offset{int}) / ((4 * beats_per_bar{int}) / 2)) * 6]{int}) + _modes[(_chords[(((((((4 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) - 1) - i{int}) - _offset{int}) / ((4 * beats_per_bar{int}) / 2)) * 6) + 1]{int} * 8) + (rand_mid_ending_note{int} * 2)]{int}
					while(_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((((((4 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) - 1) - i{int}) - _note_before{int}) * 3)]{int} = 1) 
						inc(_note_before{int}){Builtin, None}
					end while
					_pitch_before{int} := _melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + (((((((4 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) - 1) - i{int}) - _note_before{int}) * 3) + 1)]{int}
					_oct_offset{int} := 0
					if((_pitch_before{int} - _melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((((((4 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) - 1) - i{int}) * 3) + 1)]{int}) > 19)
						_oct_offset{int} := 12
					end if
					_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((((((4 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) - 1) - i{int}) * 3) + 1)]{int} := (_pitch_before{int} - ((_pitch_before{int} - _melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((((((4 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) - 1) - i{int}) * 3) + 1)]{int}) mod 12)) + _oct_offset{int}
					_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((((((4 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) - 1) - i{int}) * 3) + 2)]{int} := 5
					if(_chords[42]{int} # - 1)
						_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((((4 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) - 8) * 3)]{int} := 0
						_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + (((((4 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) - 8) * 3) + 1)]{int} := (((range.low{int} / 12) * 12) + _chords[42]{int}) + _modes[(_chords[43]{int} * 8) + (rand_mid_ending_note{int} * 2)]{int}
						_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + (((((4 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) - 8) * 3) + 1)]{int} := (_pitch_before{int} - ((_pitch_before{int} - _melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + (((((4 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) - 8) * 3) + 1)]{int}) mod 12)) + _oct_offset{int}
					end if
					if(_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((((((4 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) - 1) - i{int}) * 3) + 1)]{int} # _pitch_before{int})
						_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + (((((4 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) - 1) - i{int}) * 3)]{int} := 0
					end if
				end if
				i{int} := beats_per_bar{int} * 4
			end if
		end if
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function note.get_length(result : int, _array : int[], subarray : int, note : int, max_notes : int)
	result{int} := 0
	declare local _iterator : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	if(_array[(subarray{unknown} * (num_elements[_array{int[]}, 2] * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3])) + (note{int} * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3])]{int} = 0)
		while((result{int} = 0) and ((note{int} + _iterator{int}) <= max_notes{int})) 
			inc(_iterator{int}){Builtin, None}
			if(_array[(subarray{unknown} * (num_elements[_array{int[]}, 2] * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3])) + ((note{int} + _iterator{int}) * num_elements[_array{int[]}, 3])]{int} = 0)
				result{int} := _iterator{int}
			end if
		end while
		result{int} := _iterator{int}
	else
		message("invalid note value to get length from. " & subarray{unknown} & " - " & note{int}){Builtin, None}
	end if
end function

function octify(result : int, note : int)
	if(note{int} = 0)
		result{int} := 0
	else
		result{int} := octified_root_note_nums[note{int}]{int} + 1
	end if
end function

function mtx.normalize(_mtx : int[], dimension : int)
	declare local _total : int {Reuses: 0}
	i0{int} := 0
	while(i0{int} <= (dimension{int} - 1)) 
		i1{int} := 0
		while(i1{int} <= (dimension{int} - 1)) 
			i2{int} := 0
			while(i2{int} <= (dimension{int} - 1)) 
				_total{int} := 0
				i3{int} := 0
				while(i3{int} <= (dimension{int} - 1)) 
					_total{int} := _total{int} + _mtx[(i0{int} * ((num_elements[_mtx{int[]}, 2] * num_elements[_mtx{int[]}, 3]) * num_elements[_mtx{int[]}, 4])) + ((i1{int} * (num_elements[_mtx{int[]}, 3] * num_elements[_mtx{int[]}, 4])) + ((i2{int} * num_elements[_mtx{int[]}, 4]) + i3{int}))]{int}
					inc(i3{int}){Builtin, None}
				end while
				if(_total{int} # 0)
					i3{int} := 0
					while(i3{int} <= (dimension{int} - 1)) 
						_mtx[(i0{int} * ((num_elements[_mtx{int[]}, 2] * num_elements[_mtx{int[]}, 3]) * num_elements[_mtx{int[]}, 4])) + ((i1{int} * (num_elements[_mtx{int[]}, 3] * num_elements[_mtx{int[]}, 4])) + ((i2{int} * num_elements[_mtx{int[]}, 4]) + i3{int}))]{int} := real_to_int(round(int_to_real(_mtx[(i0{int} * ((num_elements[_mtx{int[]}, 2] * num_elements[_mtx{int[]}, 3]) * num_elements[_mtx{int[]}, 4])) + ((i1{int} * (num_elements[_mtx{int[]}, 3] * num_elements[_mtx{int[]}, 4])) + ((i2{int} * num_elements[_mtx{int[]}, 4]) + i3{int}))]{int}){Builtin, None} / (int_to_real(_total{int}){Builtin, None} / 1000)){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
						inc(i3{int}){Builtin, None}
					end while
				end if
				inc(i2{int}){Builtin, None}
			end while
			inc(i1{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
		inc(i0{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function mtx.combine(_dest : int[], _source : int[], mix : int, dimension : int)
	i0{int} := 0
	while(i0{int} <= (dimension{int} - 1)) 
		i1{int} := 0
		while(i1{int} <= (dimension{int} - 1)) 
			i2{int} := 0
			while(i2{int} <= (dimension{int} - 1)) 
				i3{int} := 0
				while(i3{int} <= (dimension{int} - 1)) 
					_dest[(i0{int} * ((num_elements[_dest{int[]}, 2] * num_elements[_dest{int[]}, 3]) * num_elements[_dest{int[]}, 4])) + ((i1{int} * (num_elements[_dest{int[]}, 3] * num_elements[_dest{int[]}, 4])) + ((i2{int} * num_elements[_dest{int[]}, 4]) + i3{int}))]{int} := ((_dest[(i0{int} * ((num_elements[_dest{int[]}, 2] * num_elements[_dest{int[]}, 3]) * num_elements[_dest{int[]}, 4])) + ((i1{int} * (num_elements[_dest{int[]}, 3] * num_elements[_dest{int[]}, 4])) + ((i2{int} * num_elements[_dest{int[]}, 4]) + i3{int}))]{int} * (1000 - mix{int})) + (_source[(i0{int} * ((num_elements[_source{int[]}, 2] * num_elements[_source{int[]}, 3]) * num_elements[_source{int[]}, 4])) + ((i1{int} * (num_elements[_source{int[]}, 3] * num_elements[_source{int[]}, 4])) + ((i2{int} * num_elements[_source{int[]}, 4]) + i3{int}))]{int} * mix{int})) / 1000
					inc(i3{int}){Builtin, None}
				end while
				inc(i2{int}){Builtin, None}
			end while
			inc(i1{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
		inc(i0{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	mtx.normalize(_dest{int[]}, dimension{int}){UserDefined, Inlining}
end function

function array.cascade(array : int[], newest_value : int)
	declare local _iterator : int {Reuses: 0}
	_iterator{int} := 0
	while(_iterator{int} <= (num_elements[array{[]}] - 2)) 
		array[(num_elements[array{[]}] - 1) - _iterator{int}]{unknown} := array[(num_elements[array{[]}] - 2) - _iterator{int}]{unknown}
		inc(_iterator{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	array[0]{unknown} := newest_value{unknown}
end function

function array.cascade_inv(array : int[], newest_value : int)
	declare local _iterator : int {Reuses: 0}
	_iterator{int} := 0
	while(_iterator{int} <= (num_elements[array{[]}] - 2)) 
		array[_iterator{int}]{unknown} := array[_iterator{int} + 1]{unknown}
		inc(_iterator{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	array[num_elements[array{[]}] - 1]{unknown} := newest_value{unknown}
end function

function generate_settings.load_preset{thread-unsafe}{restricted}
	wait_async(load_array_str(_rhythm.transition_matrix{int[]}, resources_path{string} & rtmx.file_name[_generate_settings.presets[(generate_settings.current_preset{int} * 12) + 8]{int}]{string}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	message(load_array_str(_pitch.transition_matrix{int[]}, resources_path{string} & ptmx.file_name[_generate_settings.presets[(generate_settings.current_preset{int} * 12) + 8]{int}]{string}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(mnu_rtmx_selection{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, _generate_settings.presets[(generate_settings.current_preset{int} * 12) + 8]{int}){Builtin, None}
	message("loaded rtmx: " & resources_path{string} & rtmx.file_name[_generate_settings.presets[(generate_settings.current_preset{int} * 12) + 8]{int}]{string}){Builtin, None}
	wait_async(load_array_str(_pitch.transition_matrix{int[]}, resources_path{string} & ptmx.file_name[_generate_settings.presets[(generate_settings.current_preset{int} * 12) + 9]{int}]{string}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	message(load_array_str(_pitch.transition_matrix{int[]}, resources_path{string} & ptmx.file_name[_generate_settings.presets[(generate_settings.current_preset{int} * 12) + 9]{int}]{string}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(mnu_ptmx_selection{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, _generate_settings.presets[(generate_settings.current_preset{int} * 12) + 9]{int}){Builtin, None}
	message("loaded ptmx: " & resources_path{string} & ptmx.file_name[_generate_settings.presets[(generate_settings.current_preset{int} * 12) + 9]{int}]{string}){Builtin, None}
	sli_prefer_chord_tones{int} := _generate_settings.presets[generate_settings.current_preset{int} * 12]{int}
	sli_prefer_scale_notes{int} := _generate_settings.presets[(generate_settings.current_preset{int} * 12) + 11]{int}
	sli_max_interval{int} := _generate_settings.presets[(generate_settings.current_preset{int} * 12) + 1]{int}
	sli_double_notes{int} := _generate_settings.presets[(generate_settings.current_preset{int} * 12) + 2]{int}
	mnu_min_note_length{int} := _generate_settings.presets[(generate_settings.current_preset{int} * 12) + 3]{int}
	mnu_max_note_length{int} := _generate_settings.presets[(generate_settings.current_preset{int} * 12) + 4]{int}
	mnu_syncopation{int} := _generate_settings.presets[(generate_settings.current_preset{int} * 12) + 5]{int}
	sli_triplets{int} := _generate_settings.presets[(generate_settings.current_preset{int} * 12) + 6]{int}
	mnu_chromatic_approach{int} := _generate_settings.presets[(generate_settings.current_preset{int} * 12) + 10]{int}
end function

function generate_settings.add_preset(id : int, name : string, rtmx : int, ptmx : int, chord_tones : int, scale_notes : int, max_interval : int, repeat_notes : int, min_length : int, max_length : int, syncopation : int, triplets : int, chromatic_approach : int)
	generate_settings.preset_names[id{unknown}]{string} := name{unknown}
	_generate_settings.presets[(id{unknown} * 12) + 8]{int} := rtmx{int}
	_generate_settings.presets[(id{unknown} * 12) + 9]{int} := ptmx{int}
	_generate_settings.presets[id{unknown} * 12]{int} := chord_tones{int}
	_generate_settings.presets[(id{unknown} * 12) + 11]{int} := scale_notes{int}
	_generate_settings.presets[(id{unknown} * 12) + 1]{int} := max_interval{int}
	_generate_settings.presets[(id{unknown} * 12) + 2]{int} := repeat_notes{int}
	_generate_settings.presets[(id{unknown} * 12) + 3]{int} := min_length{int}
	_generate_settings.presets[(id{unknown} * 12) + 4]{int} := max_length{int}
	_generate_settings.presets[(id{unknown} * 12) + 5]{int} := syncopation{int}
	_generate_settings.presets[(id{unknown} * 12) + 6]{int} := triplets{int}
	_generate_settings.presets[(id{unknown} * 12) + 10]{int} := chromatic_approach{int}
end function

function generate_settings.open{thread-unsafe}
	declare local ani_id2[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	btn_open_generate_settings{int} := 1
	animation.position.start(ani_id2[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}, generate_settings_display{int}, get_control_par(generate_settings_display{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None}, get_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_open_generate_settings{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}){Builtin, None}, get_control_par(generate_settings_display{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None}, get_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_open_generate_settings{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}){Builtin, None} + 30, 5, 3){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
	wait(50 * 1000){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(generate_settings_display{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_generate_settings.backdrop{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
end function

function generate_settings.close{thread-unsafe}
	declare local ani_id2[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	btn_open_generate_settings{int} := 0
	if(get_control_par(generate_settings_display{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}){Builtin, None} # HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int})
		animation.position.start(ani_id2[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}, generate_settings_display{int}, get_control_par(generate_settings_display{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None}, get_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_open_generate_settings{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}){Builtin, None} + 30, get_control_par(generate_settings_display{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None}, get_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_open_generate_settings{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}){Builtin, None}, 5, 2){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
		wait((250 * 1000) + 1){Builtin, None}
	end if
	animation.abort(ani_id2[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
	set_control_par(generate_settings_display{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}, (get_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_open_generate_settings{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}){Builtin, None} - 200) - 10){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(generate_settings_display{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_generate_settings.backdrop{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
end function

end function

	end if

end function

function meter.update
	host_manager.beats_per_bar_new{int} := beats_per_bar{int}
	host_manager.internal_multiplier_new{real} := tempo.internal_multiplier{real}
	if(mnu_beats_per_bar{int} # 99)
		host_manager.beats_per_bar_new{int} := meters.beats[mnu_beats_per_bar{int}]{int}
		host_manager.internal_multiplier_new{real} := meters.multiplier[mnu_beats_per_bar{int}]{real}
	end if
	if((host_manager.beats_per_bar_new{int} # beats_per_bar{int}) or (host_manager.internal_multiplier_new{real} # tempo.internal_multiplier{real}))
		if(melody.exists{int} = 1)
			if(global_vars.array[1]{int} = 1)
				alert_box.open{UserDefined, Call}
			else
				beats_per_bar{int} := host_manager.beats_per_bar_new{int}
				tempo.internal_multiplier{real} := host_manager.internal_multiplier_new{real}
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (((8 * 7) * 4) - 1)) 
					_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((i{int} * 3) + 1)]{int} := - 1
					_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + ((i{int} * 3) + 2)]{int} := 0
					_melody[(current_segment{int} * 672) + (i{int} * 3)]{int} := 0
					inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
				end while
				melody.exists{int} := 0
				undo.flush{UserDefined, Call}
				tempo.update{UserDefined, Call}
				midi_edit_display.update_allround{UserDefined, Call}
				midi_main_display.update_bars{UserDefined, Call}
				midi_main_display.update_notes{UserDefined, Call}
				midi_edit_display.update_bars{UserDefined, Call}
			end if
		else
			beats_per_bar{int} := host_manager.beats_per_bar_new{int}
			tempo.internal_multiplier{real} := host_manager.internal_multiplier_new{real}
			undo.flush{UserDefined, Call}
			midi_edit_display.update_allround{UserDefined, Call}
			midi_main_display.update_bars{UserDefined, Call}
			midi_main_display.update_notes{UserDefined, Call}
			midi_edit_display.update_bars{UserDefined, Call}
			mnu_beats_per_bar{int} := search[meters.beats{int[]}, beats_per_bar{int}]
			tempo.update{UserDefined, Call}
		end if
	end if
end function

function tempo.update
	real_buffer{real} := tempo{real}
	tempo{real} := int_to_real(ms_to_ticks(60000000){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None} / 960
	midi_steps{real} := (1000 / ((tempo{real} * tempo.internal_multiplier{real}) / 60)) / int_to_real(4){Builtin, None}
	if(play_pos{int} # 0)
		play_pos{int} := int(round(real(play_pos{int}){Builtin, None} * (real_buffer{real} / tempo{real})){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	end if
end function

function legato.stop_all{thread-unsafe}
	declare local _iter[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _inst.id[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	_iter[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} := 0
	while(_iter[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} <= (2 - 1)) 
		_inst.id[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} := slot.loaded_sound[_iter[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}]{int}
		if(_inst.id[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} # - 1)
			if(instrument.type[_inst.id[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}]{int} = 2)
				legato_release(_iter[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}, instrument.last_played_note[_iter[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}]{int}, none{int}, leg.note_id[_iter[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}]{int}, leg.release_id{int}, instrument.start_group[_inst.id[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}]{int}, instrument.dynamic_layers[_inst.id[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}]{int}, instrument.rr_nums[_inst.id[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}]{int}, instrument.trans_groups[_inst.id[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}]{int}){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
			else
				if(instrument.type[_inst.id[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
					message("triggered " & - 1 & " w/ " & 0){Builtin, None}
					inst.slot{int} := 0
					while(inst.slot{int} <= (2 - 1)) 
						inst.id{int} := slot.loaded_sound[inst.slot{int}]{int}
						if(inst.id{int} # - 1)
							instrument.rr_cycle[inst.id{int}]{int} := (instrument.rr_cycle[inst.id{int}]{int} + 1) mod instrument.rr_nums[inst.id{int}]{int}
							if((instrument.type[inst.id{int}]{int} = 0) and (((with_lookahead{int} = 0) and (lookahead[inst.slot{int}]{int} = 0)) or (((lookahead_slot{int} = inst.slot{int}) and (with_lookahead{int} = 1)) and (lookahead[inst.slot{int}]{int} > 0))))
								if(- 1 > - 1)
									if((_sustain.note_ids[(inst.slot{int} * 128) + (-1 + slot.note_offset[inst.slot{int}]{int})]{int} # - 1) and (instrument.last_played_note[inst.slot{int}]{int} # - 1))
										note_off(_sustain.note_ids[(inst.slot{int} * 128) + instrument.last_played_note[inst.slot{int}]{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
									end if
									one_shot(inst.slot{int}, - 1 + slot.note_offset[inst.slot{int}]{int}, none{int}, 0, _sustain.note_ids[(inst.slot{int} * 128) + (-1 + slot.note_offset[inst.slot{int}]{int})]{int}, instrument.start_group[inst.id{int}]{int}, instrument.rr_nums[inst.id{int}]{int}, instrument.rr_cycle[inst.id{int}]{int}, - 1){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
									if(get_control_par(btn_octave_doubling[inst.slot{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None} = 1)
										one_shot(inst.slot{int}, (- 1 + slot.note_offset[inst.slot{int}]{int}) + 12, none{int}, 0, _sustain.note_ids[(inst.slot{int} * 128) + ((-1 + slot.note_offset[inst.slot{int}]{int}) + 12)]{int}, instrument.start_group[inst.id{int}]{int}, instrument.rr_nums[inst.id{int}]{int}, instrument.rr_cycle[inst.id{int}]{int}, - 1){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
									end if
									instrument.last_played_note[inst.slot{int}]{int} := - 1 + slot.note_offset[inst.slot{int}]{int}
								else
									if(_sustain.note_ids[(inst.slot{int} * 128) + (-1 + slot.note_offset[inst.slot{int}]{int})]{int} # - 1)
										if(instrument.last_played_note[inst.slot{int}]{int} # - 1)
											note_off(_sustain.note_ids[(inst.slot{int} * 128) + instrument.last_played_note[inst.slot{int}]{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
										end if
										if(get_control_par(btn_octave_doubling[inst.slot{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}){Builtin, None} = 1)
											note_off(_sustain.note_ids[(inst.slot{int} * 128) + (instrument.last_played_note[inst.slot{int}]{int} + 12)]{int}){Builtin, None}
										end if
									end if
									one_shot_release(inst.slot{int}, instrument.last_played_note[inst.slot{int}]{int}, none{int}, none{int}){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
								end if
							else
								if((instrument.type[inst.id{int}]{int} = 1) and (((with_lookahead{int} = 0) and (lookahead[inst.slot{int}]{int} = 0)) or (((lookahead_slot{int} = inst.slot{int}) and (with_lookahead{int} = 1)) and (lookahead[inst.slot{int}]{int} > 0))))
									if(- 1 > - 1)
										if(instrument.last_played_note[inst.slot{int}]{int} > - 1)
											sustain_release(inst.slot{int}, instrument.last_played_note[inst.slot{int}]{int}, none{int}, _sustain.note_ids[(inst.slot{int} * 128) + instrument.last_played_note[inst.slot{int}]{int}]{int}, none{int}, instrument.start_group[inst.id{int}]{int}, instrument.dynamic_layers[inst.id{int}]{int}, instrument.rr_nums[inst.id{int}]{int}){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
										end if
