																	transition_id{int} := play_note((note{int} * abs(sh_right(abs(sh_right(interval[c.slot{int}]{int} - 0, 31){Builtin, None} + 1){Builtin, None} - 1, 31){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}) + (last_note[c.slot{int}]{int} * (sh_right(interval[c.slot{int}]{int} - 0, 31){Builtin, None} + 1)), (abs(interval[c.slot{int}]{int}){Builtin, None} * 5) + ((sh_right(interval[c.slot{int}]{int} - 0, 31){Builtin, None} + 1) * 60), real_to_int((int_to_real(s1.trans_zone_start[trans_idx{int}]{int}){Builtin, None} / 48000) * 1e+06){Builtin, None}, 0){Builtin, None}
																	redirect_output(transition_id{int}, OUTPUT_TYPE_BUS_OUT{int}, c.slot{int}){Builtin, None}
																	set_event_par_arr(transition_id{int}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int}, 0, ALL_GROUPS{int}){Builtin, None}
																	set_event_par_arr(transition_id{int}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int}, 1, trans_group[c.slot{int}]{int} + leg.current_trans_group{int}){Builtin, None}
																	change_vol(transition_id{int}, s1.trans_event_volume[trans_idx{int}]{int}, 0){Builtin, None}
																	set_event_par_arr(transition_id{int}, EVENT_PAR_MOD_VALUE_ID{int}, s1.trans_fadeIn_time[trans_idx{int}]{int}, 3){Builtin, None}
																	set_event_par_arr(transition_id{int}, EVENT_PAR_MOD_VALUE_ID{int}, s1.trans_fadeOut_time[trans_idx{int}]{int}, 5){Builtin, None}
																	set_event_par_arr(leg.note_id[1]{int}, EVENT_PAR_MOD_VALUE_ID{int}, s1.trans_wait_time[trans_idx{int}]{int}, 0){Builtin, None}
																	set_event_par_arr(leg.note_id[1]{int}, EVENT_PAR_MOD_VALUE_ID{int}, s1.sus_fadeIn_time[trans_idx{int}]{int}, 2){Builtin, None}
																end if
																set_event_par_arr(leg.note_id[inst.slot{int}]{int}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int}, 0, ALL_GROUPS{int}){Builtin, None}
																leg.i{int} := 0
																while(leg.i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[inst.id{int}]{int} - 1)) 
																	set_event_par_arr(leg.note_id[inst.slot{int}]{int}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int}, 1, leg.i{int} + sus_group[inst.slot{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
																	inc(leg.i{int}){Builtin, None}
																end while
																leg.i{int} := 0
																while(leg.i{int} <= ((instrument.dynamic_layers[inst.id{int}]{int} * instrument.sustain_fx[inst.id{int}]{int}) - 1)) 
																	set_event_par_arr(leg.note_id[inst.slot{int}]{int}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int}, 1, leg.i{int} + sus_fx_group[inst.slot{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
																	inc(leg.i{int}){Builtin, None}
																end while
															else
																fade_out(leg.old_note_id[inst.slot{int}]{int}, 152 * 1000, 1){Builtin, None}
																leg.note_id[inst.slot{int}]{int} := play_note(- 1 + slot.note_offset[inst.slot{int}]{int}, ((0 * (1 + (sh_right(127 - 0, 31){Builtin, None} .or. sh_right(0 - 1, 31){Builtin, None}))) - (1 * sh_right(0 - 1, 31){Builtin, None})) - (127 * sh_right(127 - 0, 31){Builtin, None}), sus_s_start{int}, - 1){Builtin, None}
																redirect_output(leg.note_id[inst.slot{int}]{int}, OUTPUT_TYPE_BUS_OUT{int}, inst.slot{int}){Builtin, None}
																set_event_par_arr(leg.note_id[inst.slot{int}]{int}, EVENT_PAR_MOD_VALUE_ID{int}, 150000, 0){Builtin, None}
																set_event_par_arr(leg.note_id[inst.slot{int}]{int}, EVENT_PAR_MOD_VALUE_ID{int}, DEFAULT_VAL.sus_fadeIn_time{int}, 2){Builtin, None}
																set_event_par_arr(leg.note_id[inst.slot{int}]{int}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int}, 0, ALL_GROUPS{int}){Builtin, None}
																leg.i{int} := 0
																while(leg.i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[inst.id{int}]{int} - 1)) 
																	set_event_par_arr(leg.note_id[inst.slot{int}]{int}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int}, 1, leg.i{int} + sus_group[inst.slot{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
																	inc(leg.i{int}){Builtin, None}
																end while
																leg.i{int} := 0
																while(leg.i{int} <= ((instrument.dynamic_layers[inst.id{int}]{int} * instrument.sustain_fx[inst.id{int}]{int}) - 1)) 
																	set_event_par_arr(leg.note_id[inst.slot{int}]{int}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int}, 1, leg.i{int} + sus_fx_group[inst.slot{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
																	inc(leg.i{int}){Builtin, None}
																end while
															end if
														else
															if(1 = 1)
																last_note[inst.slot{int}]{int} := - 1 + slot.note_offset[inst.slot{int}]{int}
																is_attack[inst.slot{int}]{int} := - 1
																attack_id[inst.slot{int}]{int} := play_note(- 1 + slot.note_offset[inst.slot{int}]{int}, (((0 * (1 + (sh_right((CC[101]{int} + 20) - 0, 31){Builtin, None} .or. sh_right(0 - (CC[101]{int} - 20), 31){Builtin, None}))) - ((CC[101]{int} - 20) * sh_right(0 - (CC[101]{int} - 20), 31){Builtin, None})) - ((CC[101]{int} + 20) * sh_right((CC[101]{int} + 20) - 0, 31){Builtin, None})) - (((((0 * (1 + (sh_right((CC[101]{int} + 20) - 0, 31){Builtin, None} .or. sh_right(0 - (CC[101]{int} - 20), 31){Builtin, None}))) - ((CC[101]{int} - 20) * sh_right(0 - (CC[101]{int} - 20), 31){Builtin, None})) - ((CC[101]{int} + 20) * sh_right((CC[101]{int} + 20) - 0, 31){Builtin, None})) - 127) .and. sh_right(127 - (((0 * (1 + (sh_right((CC[101]{int} + 20) - 0, 31){Builtin, None} .or. sh_right(0 - (CC[101]{int} - 20), 31){Builtin, None}))) - ((CC[101]{int} - 20) * sh_right(0 - (CC[101]{int} - 20), 31){Builtin, None})) - ((CC[101]{int} + 20) * sh_right((CC[101]{int} + 20) - 0, 31){Builtin, None})), 31){Builtin, None}), 0, 0){Builtin, None}
																redirect_output(attack_id[inst.slot{int}]{int}, OUTPUT_TYPE_BUS_OUT{int}, inst.slot{int}){Builtin, None}
																set_event_par_arr(attack_id[inst.slot{int}]{int}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int}, 0, ALL_GROUPS{int}){Builtin, None}
																set_event_par_arr(attack_id[inst.slot{int}]{int}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int}, 1, atk_group[inst.slot{int}]{int} + instrument.rr_cycle[inst.id{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
																instrument.rr_cycle[inst.id{int}]{int} := (instrument.rr_cycle[inst.id{int}]{int} + 1) mod instrument.rr_nums[inst.id{int}]{int}
																is_attack[inst.slot{int}]{int} := abs(sh_right(abs(1){Builtin, None} - 1, 31){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
																if(is_attack[inst.slot{int}]{int} = 0)
																	leg.note_id[inst.slot{int}]{int} := play_note(- 1 + slot.note_offset[inst.slot{int}]{int}, 69, 250000, - 1){Builtin, None}
																	redirect_output(leg.note_id[inst.slot{int}]{int}, OUTPUT_TYPE_BUS_OUT{int}, inst.slot{int}){Builtin, None}
																	set_event_par_arr(leg.note_id[inst.slot{int}]{int}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int}, 0, ALL_GROUPS{int}){Builtin, None}
																	leg.i{int} := 0
																	while(leg.i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[inst.id{int}]{int} - 1)) 
																		set_event_par_arr(leg.note_id[inst.slot{int}]{int}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int}, 1, atk_sus_group[inst.slot{int}]{int} + leg.i{int}){Builtin, None}
																		inc(leg.i{int}){Builtin, None}
																	end while
																end if
															else
																note_off(leg.note_id[inst.slot{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
															end if
														end if
														leg.old_note_id[inst.slot{int}]{int} := leg.note_id[inst.slot{int}]{int}
														last_transition[inst.slot{int}]{int} := transition_id{int}
														last_note[inst.slot{int}]{int} := - 1 + slot.note_offset[inst.slot{int}]{int}
														none{int} := - 1 + slot.note_offset[inst.slot{int}]{int}
														instrument.trigger_transition[inst.slot{int}]{int} := 1
													else
														slot.triggered_lookahead[inst.slot{int}]{int} := 0
													end if
												end if
											end if
											instrument.last_played_note[inst.slot{int}]{int} := - 1 + slot.note_offset[inst.slot{int}]{int}
										else
											if(with_lookahead{int} = 0)
												legato_release(inst.slot{int}, instrument.last_played_note[inst.slot{int}]{int}, none{int}, leg.note_id[inst.slot{int}]{int}, leg.release_id{int}, instrument.start_group[inst.id{int}]{int}, instrument.dynamic_layers[inst.id{int}]{int}, instrument.rr_nums[inst.id{int}]{int}, instrument.trans_groups[inst.id{int}]{int}){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
												instrument.trigger_transition[inst.slot{int}]{int} := 0
											end if
										end if
									end if
								end if
							end if
						end if
						inc(inst.slot{int}){Builtin, None}
					end while
				else
					if(instrument.type[_inst.id[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
						note_off(_sustain.note_ids[0]{int}){Builtin, None}
						message("triggered note off"){Builtin, None}
					end if
				end if
			end if
			instrument.last_played_note[_iter[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}]{int} := - 1
			last_note[_iter[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}]{int} := - 1
			instrument.trigger_transition[_iter[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}]{int} := 0
		end if
		inc(_iter[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function instrument.load(slot_id : int, id : int){thread-unsafe}{restricted}
	declare local _show_delay_comp[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	_show_delay_comp[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} := 0
	declare local _empty_slot[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	_empty_slot[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} := 0
	slot.loaded_sound[slot_id{unknown}]{int} := id{int}
	message("load inst " & id{int}){Builtin, None}
	if(id{int} # - 1)
		set_control_par_str(btn_slot[slot_id{unknown}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, instrument.short_names[id{int}]{string}){Builtin, None}
		slot.delay[slot_id{unknown}]{int} := instrument.attack_delay_time[id{int}]{int}
		message("loaded delay: " & instrument.attack_delay_time[id{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
		message("loaded range: " & instrument.range_low[id{int}]{int} & " - " & instrument.range_high[id{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
	else
		set_control_par_str(btn_slot[slot_id{unknown}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, "None"){Builtin, None}
		slot.delay[slot_id{unknown}]{int} := 0
	end if
	highest_delay{int} := 0
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (2 - 1)) 
		if(slot.delay[i{int}]{int} > highest_delay{int})
			highest_delay{int} := slot.delay[i{int}]{int}
		end if
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	update_purge{UserDefined, Inlining}
	update_range{UserDefined, Call}
	order_slots{UserDefined, Call}
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (2 - 1)) 
		lookahead[i{int}]{int} := slot.delay[i{int}]{int}
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	set_control_par_str(lbl_attack_delay_time[slot_id{unknown}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, highest_delay{int} - slot.delay[slot_id{unknown}]{int}){Builtin, None}
	loaded_legato{int} := 0
	_i{int} := 0
	while(_i{int} <= (2 - 1)) 
		if(slot.loaded_sound[_i{int}]{int} # - 1)
			if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[_i{int}]{int}]{int} = 2)
				if(_empty_slot[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} = 0)
					_show_delay_comp[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} := 1
				end if
				loaded_legato{int} := 1
			end if
		else
			_show_delay_comp[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} := 0
			_empty_slot[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} := 1
		end if
		inc(_i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	if(_show_delay_comp[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} = 1)
		if(global_vars.array[0]{int} = 1)
			set_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_delay_compensation{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, 1){Builtin, None}
		else
			if(global_vars.array[0]{int} = 0)
				set_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_delay_compensation{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, 0){Builtin, None}
			else
				info_box.open{UserDefined, Call}
			end if
		end if
	else
		info_box.close{UserDefined, Call}
	end if
	legato.load_arrays{UserDefined, Inlining}
end function

function instrument.reload_all{thread-unsafe}{restricted}
	declare local _failsafe[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _iterator[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	_failsafe[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} := 0
	while((preset.is_loading{int} = 1) and (_failsafe[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} < 300)) 
		wait(100000){Builtin, None}
		inc(_failsafe[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	_iterator[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} := 0
	while(_iterator[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} <= (2 - 1)) 
		instrument.load(_iterator[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}, slot.loaded_sound[_iterator[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}]{int}){UserDefined, Inlining}
		message("loaded slot " & _iterator[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} & "|" & slot.loaded_sound[_iterator[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
		inc(_iterator[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function update_purge{restricted}
	declare local _is_loaded : int {Reuses: 0}
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (512 - 1)) 
		if(instrument.exists[i{int}]{int} = 1)
			_is_loaded{int} := 0
			ii{int} := 0
			while(ii{int} <= (2 - 1)) 
				if(slot.loaded_sound[ii{int}]{int} = i{int})
					_is_loaded{int} := 1
				end if
				inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
			end while
			if(i{int} = preview_sound{int})
				_is_loaded{int} := 1
			end if
			ii{int} := instrument.start_group[i{int}]{int}
			while(ii{int} <= ((instrument.start_group[i{int}]{int} + instrument.num_groups[i{int}]{int}) - 1)) 
				if(_is_loaded{int} = 0)
					purge_group(ii{int}, 0){Builtin, None}
				else
					purge_group(ii{int}, 1){Builtin, None}
				end if
				inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
			end while
		end if
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function update_range
	if(btn_range_auto{int} = 1)
		range.low{int} := 0
		range.high{int} := 127
		_i{int} := 0
		while(_i{int} <= (2 - 1)) 
			if(slot.loaded_sound[_i{int}]{int} # - 1)
				if(instrument.range_low[slot.loaded_sound[_i{int}]{int}]{int} > range.low{int})
					range.low{int} := instrument.range_low[slot.loaded_sound[_i{int}]{int}]{int}
				end if
				if(instrument.range_high[slot.loaded_sound[_i{int}]{int}]{int} < range.high{int})
					range.high{int} := instrument.range_high[slot.loaded_sound[_i{int}]{int}]{int}
				end if
			end if
			inc(_i{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
		range.overshoot{int} := 0
		if((range.high{int} - range.low{int}) >= 24)
			range.overshoot{int} := range.high{int} - ((range.low{int} + 24) - 1)
			range.high{int} := (range.low{int} + 24) - 1
		else
			if((range.high{int} - range.low{int}) <= 12)
				range.high{int} := range.low{int} + 12
			end if
		end if
		range.high{int} := range.high{int} + (range.overshoot{int} / 2)
		range.low{int} := range.low{int} + (range.overshoot{int} / 2)
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_block_range{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
	else
		range.low{int} := vlue_range_low{int}
		range.high{int} := vlue_range_high{int}
		if((range.high{int} - range.low{int}) >= 24)
			if(last_touched{int} = get_ui_id(vlue_range_high{int}){Builtin, None})
				range.low{int} := range.high{int} - (24 - 1)
			else
				if(last_touched{int} = get_ui_id(vlue_range_low{int}){Builtin, None})
					range.high{int} := range.low{int} + (24 - 1)
				else
					message("range selection error: last touched = undefined"){Builtin, None}
				end if
			end if
		end if
		if((range.high{int} - range.low{int}) <= 12)
			if(last_touched{int} = get_ui_id(vlue_range_high{int}){Builtin, None})
				range.low{int} := range.high{int} - 12
			else
				if(last_touched{int} = get_ui_id(vlue_range_low{int}){Builtin, None})
					range.high{int} := range.low{int} + 12
				else
					message("range selection error: last touched = undefined"){Builtin, None}
				end if
			end if
		end if
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_block_range{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
	end if
	vlue_range_high{int} := range.high{int}
	vlue_range_low{int} := range.low{int}
	keycolor.update{UserDefined, Call}
	melody.put_in_range(_melody{int[]}, current_segment{int}, ((8 * beats_per_bar{int}) * 4) - 1){UserDefined, Inlining}
	midi_main_display.update_bars{UserDefined, Call}
	midi_main_display.update_notes{UserDefined, Call}
end function

function keycolor.update
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= 127) 
		set_key_color(i{int}, KEY_COLOR_INACTIVE{int}){Builtin, None}
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (2 - 1)) 
		if(slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int} # - 1)
			ii{int} := instrument.range_low[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} - slot.note_offset[i{int}]{int}
			while(ii{int} <= (instrument.range_high[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} - slot.note_offset[i{int}]{int})) 
				if(get_key_color(((ii{int} * (1 + (sh_right(127 - ii{int}, 31){Builtin, None} .or. sh_right(ii{int} - 0, 31){Builtin, None}))) - (0 * sh_right(ii{int} - 0, 31){Builtin, None})) - (127 * sh_right(127 - ii{int}, 31){Builtin, None})){Builtin, None} = KEY_COLOR_BLUE{int})
					set_key_color(((ii{int} * (1 + (sh_right(127 - ii{int}, 31){Builtin, None} .or. sh_right(ii{int} - 0, 31){Builtin, None}))) - (0 * sh_right(ii{int} - 0, 31){Builtin, None})) - (127 * sh_right(127 - ii{int}, 31){Builtin, None}), KEY_COLOR_CYAN{int}){Builtin, None}
				else
					set_key_color(((ii{int} * (1 + (sh_right(127 - ii{int}, 31){Builtin, None} .or. sh_right(ii{int} - 0, 31){Builtin, None}))) - (0 * sh_right(ii{int} - 0, 31){Builtin, None})) - (127 * sh_right(127 - ii{int}, 31){Builtin, None}), KEY_COLOR_BLUE{int}){Builtin, None}
				end if
				inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
			end while
		end if
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	i{int} := range.low{int}
	while(i{int} <= range.high{int}) 
		if(get_key_color(i{int}){Builtin, None} = KEY_COLOR_CYAN{int})
			set_key_color(i{int}, KEY_COLOR_GREEN{int}){Builtin, None}
		else
			if(get_key_color(i{int}){Builtin, None} = KEY_COLOR_BLUE{int})
				set_key_color(i{int}, KEY_COLOR_ORANGE{int}){Builtin, None}
				if(search[slot.loaded_sound{int[]}, - 1] # - 1)
					set_key_color(i{int}, KEY_COLOR_GREEN{int}){Builtin, None}
				end if
			else
				set_key_color(i{int}, KEY_COLOR_RED{int}){Builtin, None}
			end if
		end if
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function note_offset.update
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (2 - 1)) 
		slot.note_offset[i{int}]{int} := ((slot.note_offset[i{int}]{int} * (1 + (sh_right((4 * 12) - slot.note_offset[i{int}]{int}, 31){Builtin, None} .or. sh_right(slot.note_offset[i{int}]{int} - (- 4 * 12), 31){Builtin, None}))) - ((- 4 * 12) * sh_right(slot.note_offset[i{int}]{int} - (- 4 * 12), 31){Builtin, None})) - ((4 * 12) * sh_right((4 * 12) - slot.note_offset[i{int}]{int}, 31){Builtin, None})
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	update_range{UserDefined, Call}
end function

function instrument_browser.update_scroll
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (8 - 1)) 
		set_control_par(btn_sound[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
		if(_instrument_browser.structure[(current_category{int} * 176) + ((current_section{int} * 16) + i{int})]{int} # - 1)
			set_control_par_str(btn_sound[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, instrument.names[_instrument_browser.structure[(current_category{int} * 176) + ((current_section{int} * 16) + (i{int} + scroll_instr_offset{int}))]{int}]{string}){Builtin, None}
			set_control_par(btn_sound[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, 0){Builtin, None}
			set_font_types(btn_sound[i{int}]{int}, fonts.regular_white{int[]}){UserDefined, Inlining}
			if(slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int} = _instrument_browser.structure[(current_category{int} * 176) + ((current_section{int} * 16) + (i{int} + scroll_instr_offset{int}))]{int})
				set_control_par(btn_sound[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, 1){Builtin, None}
			else
				if(search[slot.loaded_sound{int[]}, _instrument_browser.structure[(current_category{int} * 176) + ((current_section{int} * 16) + (i{int} + scroll_instr_offset{int}))]{int}] # - 1)
					ii{int} := 0
					while(ii{int} <= (num_elements[font.types{int[]}] - 1)) 
						set_control_par(btn_sound[i{int}]{int}, font.types[ii{int}]{int}, fonts.regular_white[6]{int}){Builtin, None}
						inc(ii{int}){Builtin, None}
					end while
				end if
			end if
			set_control_par(btn_sound[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
		end if
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function instrument_browser.update
	declare local _num_sounds : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	read_slot_colors{UserDefined, Call}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_horizontal_devider{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE{int}, slot_colors[active_slot{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_override_fx{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE{int}, fonts.regular_white[0]{int}){Builtin, None}
	if(btn_override_fx{int} = 1)
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_override_fx{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE{int}, fonts.regular_white[1]{int}){Builtin, None}
	end if
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (5 - 1)) 
		set_control_par(btn_category[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, 0){Builtin, None}
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	set_control_par(btn_category[current_category{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, 1){Builtin, None}
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (11 - 1)) 
		set_control_par(btn_section[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, 0){Builtin, None}
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	set_control_par(btn_section[current_section{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, 1){Builtin, None}
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (11 - 1)) 
		set_control_par(btn_section[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
		if(instrument_browser.section_order[i{int} + (11 * current_category{int})]{int} # - 1)
			set_control_par_str(btn_section[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, instrument_browser.section_names[instrument_browser.section_order[i{int} + (11 * current_category{int})]{int}]{string}){Builtin, None}
			set_control_par(btn_section[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
		end if
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (16 - 1)) 
		if(_instrument_browser.structure[(current_category{int} * 176) + ((current_section{int} * 16) + i{int})]{int} # - 1)
			inc(_num_sounds{int}){Builtin, None}
		end if
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	lead_handle_size{int} := int(round(real(brwsr_sli_scroll_height{int}){Builtin, None} / (real(_num_sounds{int}){Builtin, None} / real(8){Builtin, None})){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	message("new handlle size: " & brwsr_sli_scroll_height{int} & " / (" & _num_sounds{int} & " / " & 8 & ") = " & lead_handle_size{int}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(sli_lead_scrollhandle{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT{int}, lead_handle_size{int}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(sli_lead_scrollhandle{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(sli_lead_scrollbar{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
	if(lead_handle_size{int} >= brwsr_sli_scroll_height{int})
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(sli_lead_scrollhandle{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(sli_lead_scrollbar{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
	end if
	current_instr_num{int} := _num_sounds{int}
	nks.update_all_labels{UserDefined, Call}
	instrument_browser.update_scroll{UserDefined, Call}
end function

function instrument_browser.open
	declare local _idx : int {Reuses: 0}
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (2 - 1)) 
		set_control_par(btn_open_fx[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(btn_open_fx[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, 0){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(btn_solo[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(btn_mute[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	_idx{int} := search[_instrument_browser.structure{int[]}, slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]
	if((_idx{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int} # - 1))
		current_category{int} := (_idx{int} / 16) / 11
		current_section{int} := (_idx{int} / 16) mod 11
	else
		current_category{int} := 0
		current_section{int} := 0
	end if
	set_control_par(instrument_browser{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
	sli_lead_scrollbar{int} := 1000000
	instrument_browser.update{UserDefined, Call}
end function

function instrument_browser.close
	set_control_par(instrument_browser{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (2 - 1)) 
		set_control_par(btn_open_fx[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(btn_solo[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(btn_mute[i{int}]{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function order_slots
	slot.order[0]{int} := 0
	slot.order[1]{int} := 1
	if((highest_delay{int} - slot.delay[1]{int}) < (highest_delay{int} - slot.delay[0]{int}))
		slot.order[0]{int} := 1
		slot.order[1]{int} := 0
	end if
end function

function fill_section(cat : int, sec : int, a : int, b : int, c : int, d : int, e : int, f : int, g : int, h : int, i : int, j : int, k : int, l : int, m : int, n : int, o : int, p : int)
	instrument_browser.section_order[search[instrument_browser.section_order{int[]}, - 1, cat{int} * 11, ((cat{int} + 1) * 11) - 1]]{int} := sec{int}
	_instrument_browser.structure[(cat{int} * 176) + (section_iterator[cat{int}]{int} * 16)]{int} := a{int}
	_instrument_browser.structure[(cat{int} * 176) + ((section_iterator[cat{int}]{int} * 16) + 1)]{int} := b{int}
	_instrument_browser.structure[(cat{int} * 176) + ((section_iterator[cat{int}]{int} * 16) + 2)]{int} := c{int}
	_instrument_browser.structure[(cat{int} * 176) + ((section_iterator[cat{int}]{int} * 16) + 3)]{int} := d{int}
	_instrument_browser.structure[(cat{int} * 176) + ((section_iterator[cat{int}]{int} * 16) + 4)]{int} := e{int}
	_instrument_browser.structure[(cat{int} * 176) + ((section_iterator[cat{int}]{int} * 16) + 5)]{int} := f{int}
	_instrument_browser.structure[(cat{int} * 176) + ((section_iterator[cat{int}]{int} * 16) + 6)]{int} := g{int}
	_instrument_browser.structure[(cat{int} * 176) + ((section_iterator[cat{int}]{int} * 16) + 7)]{int} := h{int}
	_instrument_browser.structure[(cat{int} * 176) + ((section_iterator[cat{int}]{int} * 16) + 8)]{int} := i{int}
	_instrument_browser.structure[(cat{int} * 176) + ((section_iterator[cat{int}]{int} * 16) + 9)]{int} := j{int}
	_instrument_browser.structure[(cat{int} * 176) + ((section_iterator[cat{int}]{int} * 16) + 10)]{int} := k{int}
	_instrument_browser.structure[(cat{int} * 176) + ((section_iterator[cat{int}]{int} * 16) + 11)]{int} := l{int}
	_instrument_browser.structure[(cat{int} * 176) + ((section_iterator[cat{int}]{int} * 16) + 12)]{int} := m{int}
	_instrument_browser.structure[(cat{int} * 176) + ((section_iterator[cat{int}]{int} * 16) + 13)]{int} := n{int}
	_instrument_browser.structure[(cat{int} * 176) + ((section_iterator[cat{int}]{int} * 16) + 14)]{int} := o{int}
	_instrument_browser.structure[(cat{int} * 176) + ((section_iterator[cat{int}]{int} * 16) + 15)]{int} := p{int}
	inc(section_iterator[cat{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
end function

function sustain(slot_ : int, event_note : int, event_notes : int, event_velocity : int, note_id : int, start_group : int, num_dynamic_layers : int, num_rr : int)
	event_notes{int} := event_note{int}
	note_id{int} := play_note(event_note{int}, ((event_velocity{int} * (1 + (sh_right(127 - event_velocity{int}, 31){Builtin, None} .or. sh_right(event_velocity{int} - 1, 31){Builtin, None}))) - (1 * sh_right(event_velocity{int} - 1, 31){Builtin, None})) - (127 * sh_right(127 - event_velocity{int}, 31){Builtin, None}), 0, - 1){Builtin, None}
	redirect_output(note_id{int}, OUTPUT_TYPE_BUS_OUT{int}, slot_{int}){Builtin, None}
	set_event_par_arr(note_id{int}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int}, 0, ALL_GROUPS{int}){Builtin, None}
	dyn{int} := 0
	while(dyn{int} <= (num_dynamic_layers{int} - 1)) 
		set_event_par_arr(note_id{int}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int}, 1, (dyn{int} + start_group{int}) + 1){Builtin, None}
		inc(dyn{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function sustain_release(slot_ : int, release_note : int, event_notes : int, note_id : int, release_id : int, start_group : int, num_dynamic_layers : int, num_rr : int)
	if(note_id{int} # - 1)
		note_off(note_id{int}){Builtin, None}
		note_id{int} := - 1
		event_notes{int} := - 1
	end if
end function

function one_shot(slot_ : int, event_note : int, event_notes : int, event_velocity : int, note_id : int, start_group : int, num_rr : int, rr_counter : int, sample_duration : int)
	event_notes{int} := event_note{int}
	rr_counter{int} := (rr_counter{int} + 1) mod num_rr{int}
	note_id{int} := play_note(event_note{int}, ((event_velocity{int} * (1 + (sh_right(127 - event_velocity{int}, 31){Builtin, None} .or. sh_right(event_velocity{int} - 1, 31){Builtin, None}))) - (1 * sh_right(event_velocity{int} - 1, 31){Builtin, None})) - (127 * sh_right(127 - event_velocity{int}, 31){Builtin, None}), 0, sample_duration{int}){Builtin, None}
	redirect_output(note_id{int}, OUTPUT_TYPE_BUS_OUT{int}, slot_{int}){Builtin, None}
	set_event_par_arr(note_id{int}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int}, 0, ALL_GROUPS{int}){Builtin, None}
	set_event_par_arr(note_id{int}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int}, 1, (rr_counter{int} + start_group{int}) + 1){Builtin, None}
end function

function one_shot_release(slot_ : int, release_note : int, event_notes : int, note_id : int)
	note_id{int} := - 1
	event_notes{int} := - 1
end function

function legato.load_arrays{thread-unsafe}{restricted}
	if(slot.loaded_sound[0]{int} # - 1)
		if(instrument.legato_prefix_id[slot.loaded_sound[0]{int}]{int} # - 1)
			message("LOADED LEGATO ARRAYS FOR " & 0 & ": " & legato_prefixes[instrument.legato_prefix_id[slot.loaded_sound[0]{int}]{int}]{string}){Builtin, None}
			message("path=" & legato_path{string} & legato_prefixes[instrument.legato_prefix_id[slot.loaded_sound[0]{int}]{int}]{string}){Builtin, None}
			wait_async(load_array_str(intervals{string[]}, legato_path{string} & legato_prefixes[instrument.legato_prefix_id[slot.loaded_sound[0]{int}]{int}]{string} & "intervals.nka"){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
			wait_async(load_array_str(trans_zone_ids{int[]}, legato_path{string} & legato_prefixes[instrument.legato_prefix_id[slot.loaded_sound[0]{int}]{int}]{string} & "trans_zone_ids.nka"){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
			wait_async(load_array_str(trans_zone_start{int[]}, legato_path{string} & legato_prefixes[instrument.legato_prefix_id[slot.loaded_sound[0]{int}]{int}]{string} & "trans_zone_start.nka"){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}

			wait_async(load_array_str(sus_fadeIn_time{int[]}, legato_path{string} & legato_prefixes[instrument.legato_prefix_id[slot.loaded_sound[0]{int}]{int}]{string} & "sus_fadeIn_time.nka"){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
			wait_async(load_array_str(file_names_master{string[]}, legato_path{string} & legato_prefixes[instrument.legato_prefix_id[slot.loaded_sound[0]{int}]{int}]{string} & "file_names_master.nka"){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
			wait_async(load_array_str(zone_ids_master{int[]}, legato_path{string} & legato_prefixes[instrument.legato_prefix_id[slot.loaded_sound[0]{int}]{int}]{string} & "zone_ids_master.nka"){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
			wait_async(load_array_str(completed_elements{int[]}, legato_path{string} & legato_prefixes[instrument.legato_prefix_id[slot.loaded_sound[0]{int}]{int}]{string} & "completed_elements.nka"){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
			array.copy(intervals{string[]}, s0.intervals{string[]}){UserDefined, Inlining}
			array.copy(trans_zone_ids{int[]}, s0.trans_zone_ids{int[]}){UserDefined, Inlining}
			array.copy(trans_zone_start{int[]}, s0.trans_zone_start{int[]}){UserDefined, Inlining}
			array.copy(trans_event_volume{int[]}, s0.trans_event_volume{int[]}){UserDefined, Inlining}
			array.copy(trans_wait_time{int[]}, s0.trans_wait_time{int[]}){UserDefined, Inlining}
			array.copy(trans_fadeIn_time{int[]}, s0.trans_fadeIn_time{int[]}){UserDefined, Inlining}
			array.copy(trans_fadeOut_time{int[]}, s0.trans_fadeOut_time{int[]}){UserDefined, Inlining}
			array.copy(sus_release_time{int[]}, s0.sus_release_time{int[]}){UserDefined, Inlining}
			array.copy(sus_fadeIn_time{int[]}, s0.sus_fadeIn_time{int[]}){UserDefined, Inlining}
			array.copy(file_names_master{string[]}, s0.file_names_master{string[]}){UserDefined, Inlining}
			array.copy(zone_ids_master{int[]}, s0.zone_ids_master{int[]}){UserDefined, Inlining}
			array.copy(completed_elements{int[]}, s0.completed_elements{int[]}){UserDefined, Inlining}
			message("test2 " & s0.trans_zone_ids[0]{int}){Builtin, None}
		end if
	end if
	if(slot.loaded_sound[1]{int} # - 1)
		if(instrument.legato_prefix_id[slot.loaded_sound[1]{int}]{int} # - 1)
			message("LOADED LEGATO ARRAYS FOR " & 1 & ": " & legato_prefixes[instrument.legato_prefix_id[slot.loaded_sound[1]{int}]{int}]{string}){Builtin, None}
			message("path=" & legato_path{string} & legato_prefixes[instrument.legato_prefix_id[slot.loaded_sound[1]{int}]{int}]{string}){Builtin, None}
			wait_async(load_array_str(intervals{string[]}, legato_path{string} & legato_prefixes[instrument.legato_prefix_id[slot.loaded_sound[1]{int}]{int}]{string} & "intervals.nka"){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
			wait_async(load_array_str(trans_zone_ids{int[]}, legato_path{string} & legato_prefixes[instrument.legato_prefix_id[slot.loaded_sound[1]{int}]{int}]{string} & "trans_zone_ids.nka"){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}

			wait_async(load_array_str(trans_wait_time{int[]}, legato_path{string} & legato_prefixes[instrument.legato_prefix_id[slot.loaded_sound[1]{int}]{int}]{string} & "trans_wait_time.nka"){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
			wait_async(load_array_str(trans_fadeIn_time{int[]}, legato_path{string} & legato_prefixes[instrument.legato_prefix_id[slot.loaded_sound[1]{int}]{int}]{string} & "trans_fadeIn_time.nka"){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
			wait_async(load_array_str(trans_fadeOut_time{int[]}, legato_path{string} & legato_prefixes[instrument.legato_prefix_id[slot.loaded_sound[1]{int}]{int}]{string} & "trans_fadeOut_time.nka"){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
			wait_async(load_array_str(sus_release_time{int[]}, legato_path{string} & legato_prefixes[instrument.legato_prefix_id[slot.loaded_sound[1]{int}]{int}]{string} & "sus_release_time.nka"){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
			wait_async(load_array_str(sus_fadeIn_time{int[]}, legato_path{string} & legato_prefixes[instrument.legato_prefix_id[slot.loaded_sound[1]{int}]{int}]{string} & "sus_fadeIn_time.nka"){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}

			wait_async(load_array_str(zone_ids_master{int[]}, legato_path{string} & legato_prefixes[instrument.legato_prefix_id[slot.loaded_sound[1]{int}]{int}]{string} & "zone_ids_master.nka"){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
			wait_async(load_array_str(completed_elements{int[]}, legato_path{string} & legato_prefixes[instrument.legato_prefix_id[slot.loaded_sound[1]{int}]{int}]{string} & "completed_elements.nka"){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
			array.copy(intervals{string[]}, s1.intervals{string[]}){UserDefined, Inlining}
			array.copy(trans_zone_ids{int[]}, s1.trans_zone_ids{int[]}){UserDefined, Inlining}
			array.copy(trans_zone_start{int[]}, s1.trans_zone_start{int[]}){UserDefined, Inlining}
			array.copy(trans_event_volume{int[]}, s1.trans_event_volume{int[]}){UserDefined, Inlining}

			array.copy(trans_fadeOut_time{int[]}, s1.trans_fadeOut_time{int[]}){UserDefined, Inlining}
			array.copy(sus_release_time{int[]}, s1.sus_release_time{int[]}){UserDefined, Inlining}
			array.copy(sus_fadeIn_time{int[]}, s1.sus_fadeIn_time{int[]}){UserDefined, Inlining}
			array.copy(file_names_master{string[]}, s1.file_names_master{string[]}){UserDefined, Inlining}
			array.copy(zone_ids_master{int[]}, s1.zone_ids_master{int[]}){UserDefined, Inlining}
			array.copy(completed_elements{int[]}, s1.completed_elements{int[]}){UserDefined, Inlining}
			message("test2 " & s1.trans_zone_ids[0]{int}){Builtin, None}
		end if
	end if
	legato.init_arrays{UserDefined, Call}
end function

function legato.init_arrays
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (2000 - 1)) 
		if(s0.sus_release_time[i{int}]{int} = 0)
			s0.sus_release_time[i{int}]{int} := DEFAULT_VAL.sus_release_time{int}
		end if
		if(s0.trans_fadeIn_time[i{int}]{int} = 0)
			s0.trans_fadeIn_time[i{int}]{int} := DEFAULT_VAL.trans_fadeIn_time{int}
		end if
		if(s0.trans_fadeOut_time[i{int}]{int} = 0)
			s0.trans_fadeOut_time[i{int}]{int} := DEFAULT_VAL.trans_fadeOut_time{int}
		end if
		if(s0.trans_wait_time[i{int}]{int} = 0)
			s0.trans_wait_time[i{int}]{int} := DEFAULT_VAL.trans_wait_time{int}
		end if
		if(s0.sus_fadeIn_time[i{int}]{int} = 0)
			s0.sus_fadeIn_time[i{int}]{int} := DEFAULT_VAL.sus_fadeIn_time{int}
		end if
		if(s0.trans_zone_ids[i{int}]{int} = 0)
			s0.trans_zone_ids[i{int}]{int} := - 1
		end if
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (2000 - 1)) 
		if(s1.sus_release_time[i{int}]{int} = 0)
			s1.sus_release_time[i{int}]{int} := DEFAULT_VAL.sus_release_time{int}
		end if
		if(s1.trans_fadeIn_time[i{int}]{int} = 0)
			s1.trans_fadeIn_time[i{int}]{int} := DEFAULT_VAL.trans_fadeIn_time{int}
		end if
		if(s1.trans_fadeOut_time[i{int}]{int} = 0)
			s1.trans_fadeOut_time[i{int}]{int} := DEFAULT_VAL.trans_fadeOut_time{int}
		end if
		if(s1.trans_wait_time[i{int}]{int} = 0)
			s1.trans_wait_time[i{int}]{int} := DEFAULT_VAL.trans_wait_time{int}
		end if
		if(s1.sus_fadeIn_time[i{int}]{int} = 0)
			s1.sus_fadeIn_time[i{int}]{int} := DEFAULT_VAL.sus_fadeIn_time{int}
		end if
		if(s1.trans_zone_ids[i{int}]{int} = 0)
			s1.trans_zone_ids[i{int}]{int} := - 1
		end if
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function get_trans_idx(result : int, event_id : int)
	if(c.slot{int} = 0)
		if(search[s0.trans_zone_ids{int[]}, (sh_left(lsb(abs(trans_group[c.slot{int}]{int} - get_zone_par(get_event_par(event_id{int}, EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{int}){Builtin, None}, ZONE_PAR_GROUP{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}, 14){Builtin, None} .or. sh_left(lsb(get_zone_par(get_event_par(event_id{int}, EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{int}){Builtin, None}, ZONE_PAR_HIGH_VELO{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}, 7){Builtin, None}) .or. lsb(get_zone_par(get_event_par(event_id{int}, EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{int}){Builtin, None}, ZONE_PAR_ROOT_KEY{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}] = - 1)
			result{int} := search[s0.trans_zone_ids{int[]}, - 1]
			message("zid not found: " & ((sh_left(lsb(abs(trans_group[c.slot{int}]{int} - get_zone_par(get_event_par(event_id{int}, EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{int}){Builtin, None}, ZONE_PAR_GROUP{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}, 14){Builtin, None} .or. sh_left(lsb(get_zone_par(get_event_par(event_id{int}, EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{int}){Builtin, None}, ZONE_PAR_HIGH_VELO{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}, 7){Builtin, None}) .or. lsb(get_zone_par(get_event_par(event_id{int}, EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{int}){Builtin, None}, ZONE_PAR_ROOT_KEY{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None})){Builtin, None}
		else
			result{int} := search[s0.trans_zone_ids{int[]}, (sh_left(lsb(abs(trans_group[c.slot{int}]{int} - get_zone_par(get_event_par(event_id{int}, EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{int}){Builtin, None}, ZONE_PAR_GROUP{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}, 14){Builtin, None} .or. sh_left(lsb(get_zone_par(get_event_par(event_id{int}, EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{int}){Builtin, None}, ZONE_PAR_HIGH_VELO{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}, 7){Builtin, None}) .or. lsb(get_zone_par(get_event_par(event_id{int}, EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{int}){Builtin, None}, ZONE_PAR_ROOT_KEY{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}]
		end if
	end if
	if(c.slot{int} = 1)
		if(search[s1.trans_zone_ids{int[]}, (sh_left(lsb(abs(trans_group[c.slot{int}]{int} - get_zone_par(get_event_par(event_id{int}, EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{int}){Builtin, None}, ZONE_PAR_GROUP{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}, 14){Builtin, None} .or. sh_left(lsb(get_zone_par(get_event_par(event_id{int}, EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{int}){Builtin, None}, ZONE_PAR_HIGH_VELO{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}, 7){Builtin, None}) .or. lsb(get_zone_par(get_event_par(event_id{int}, EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{int}){Builtin, None}, ZONE_PAR_ROOT_KEY{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}] = - 1)
			result{int} := search[s1.trans_zone_ids{int[]}, - 1]
			message("zid not found: " & ((sh_left(lsb(abs(trans_group[c.slot{int}]{int} - get_zone_par(get_event_par(event_id{int}, EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{int}){Builtin, None}, ZONE_PAR_GROUP{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}, 14){Builtin, None} .or. sh_left(lsb(get_zone_par(get_event_par(event_id{int}, EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{int}){Builtin, None}, ZONE_PAR_HIGH_VELO{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}, 7){Builtin, None}) .or. lsb(get_zone_par(get_event_par(event_id{int}, EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{int}){Builtin, None}, ZONE_PAR_ROOT_KEY{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None})){Builtin, None}
		else
			result{int} := search[s1.trans_zone_ids{int[]}, (sh_left(lsb(abs(trans_group[c.slot{int}]{int} - get_zone_par(get_event_par(event_id{int}, EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{int}){Builtin, None}, ZONE_PAR_GROUP{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}, 14){Builtin, None} .or. sh_left(lsb(get_zone_par(get_event_par(event_id{int}, EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{int}){Builtin, None}, ZONE_PAR_HIGH_VELO{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}, 7){Builtin, None}) .or. lsb(get_zone_par(get_event_par(event_id{int}, EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{int}){Builtin, None}, ZONE_PAR_ROOT_KEY{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}]
		end if
	end if
end function

function legato_release(slot_ : int, release_note : int, event_notes : int, note_id : int, release_id : int, start_group : int, num_dynamic_layers : int, num_rr : int, trans_groups : int)
	if((note_held{int} = 0) and (note_id{int} # - 1))
		event_notes{int} := - 1
		message("play release note " & release_note{int}){Builtin, None}
		count{int} := 0
		if((is_attack[slot_{int}]{int} = 0) and (release_note{int} # - 1))
			release_id{int} := play_note(release_note{int}, 50, 0, 0){Builtin, None}
			redirect_output(release_id{int}, OUTPUT_TYPE_BUS_OUT{int}, slot_{int}){Builtin, None}
			set_event_par_arr(release_id{int}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int}, 0, ALL_GROUPS{int}){Builtin, None}
			key[6]{int} := 0
			while(key[6]{int} <= (num_dynamic_layers{int} - 1)) 
				set_event_par_arr(release_id{int}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int}, 1, (((((((((((key[6]{int} + start_group{int}) + title_groups{int}) + num_rr{int}) + title_groups{int}) + num_dynamic_layers{int}) + title_groups{int}) + num_dynamic_layers{int}) + title_groups{int}) + (num_dynamic_layers{int} * sustain_fx{int})) + title_groups{int}) + trans_groups{int}) + title_groups{int}){Builtin, None}
				inc(key[6]{int}){Builtin, None}
			end while
		end if
		if(note_id{int} # - 1)
			playpos{int} := (((get_event_par(note_id{int}, EVENT_PAR_PLAY_POS{int}){Builtin, None} / 10) * (1 + (sh_right(140000 - (get_event_par(note_id{int}, EVENT_PAR_PLAY_POS{int}){Builtin, None} / 10), 31){Builtin, None} .or. sh_right((get_event_par(note_id{int}, EVENT_PAR_PLAY_POS{int}){Builtin, None} / 10) - 0, 31){Builtin, None}))) - (0 * sh_right((get_event_par(note_id{int}, EVENT_PAR_PLAY_POS{int}){Builtin, None} / 10) - 0, 31){Builtin, None})) - (140000 * sh_right(140000 - (get_event_par(note_id{int}, EVENT_PAR_PLAY_POS{int}){Builtin, None} / 10), 31){Builtin, None})
			fade_out(note_id{int}, real_to_int((((int_to_real(playpos{int}){Builtin, None} - 0) * (230000 - 1)) / (140000 - 0)) + 1){Builtin, None}, 1){Builtin, None}
			change_vol(release_id{int}, - real_to_int((((int_to_real(playpos{int}){Builtin, None} - 0) * (500 - 10000)) / (140000 - 0)) + 10000){Builtin, None}, 0){Builtin, None}
		end if
	end if
end function

function scan.samples{thread-unsafe}{restricted}
	declare local _zone_ids_master[100 * 2000] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	declare local _trans_ids[100 * 2000] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	declare local u[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	declare local v[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	declare local w[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	declare local zone_id[MAX::CB::STACK{int}] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (2000 - 1)) 
		_zone_ids_master[((NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod 100) * 2000) + i{int}]{int} := - 1
		_trans_ids[((NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod 100) * 2000) + i{int}]{int} := - 1
		inc(i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	u[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} := 0
	while(u[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} <= (instrument.trans_groups[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
		v[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} := instrument.range_low[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int}
		while(v[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} <= instrument.range_high[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int}) 
			w[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} := 1
			while(w[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} <= 120) 
				wait_longer{UserDefined, Call}
				blip_note{int} := play_note(v[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}, w[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}, 0, - 1){Builtin, None}
				set_event_par_arr(blip_note{int}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int}, 0, ALL_GROUPS{int}){Builtin, None}
				change_vol(blip_note{int}, - 2000000, 0){Builtin, None}
				set_event_par_arr(blip_note{int}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int}, 1, trans_group[active_slot{int}]{int} + u[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
				wait_longer{UserDefined, Call}
				zone_id[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} := get_event_par(blip_note{int}, EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{int}){Builtin, None}
				message("check zone_id: " & zone_id[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} & " in group " & (trans_group[active_slot{int}]{int} + u[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int})){Builtin, None}
				if((zone_id[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} # - 1) and (zone_id[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} # 0))
					if(search[_zone_ids_master{int[]}, zone_id[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}, (NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod 100) * 2000, ((NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod 100) * 2000) + 1999] = - 1)
						trans_idx{int} := search[_zone_ids_master{int[]}, - 1, (NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod 100) * 2000, ((NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod 100) * 2000) + 1999]
						if(1 = 1)
							_zone_ids_master[((NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod 100) * 2000) + trans_idx{int}]{int} := (sh_left(lsb(abs(trans_group[c.slot{int}]{int} - get_zone_par(get_event_par(blip_note{int}, EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{int}){Builtin, None}, ZONE_PAR_GROUP{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}, 14){Builtin, None} .or. sh_left(lsb(get_zone_par(get_event_par(blip_note{int}, EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{int}){Builtin, None}, ZONE_PAR_HIGH_VELO{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}, 7){Builtin, None}) .or. lsb(get_zone_par(get_event_par(blip_note{int}, EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{int}){Builtin, None}, ZONE_PAR_ROOT_KEY{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
						else
							_zone_ids_master[((NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod 100) * 2000) + trans_idx{int}]{int} := zone_id[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}
						end if
						message("write " & trans_idx{int} & "|" & ((sh_left(lsb(abs(trans_group[c.slot{int}]{int} - get_zone_par(get_event_par(blip_note{int}, EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{int}){Builtin, None}, ZONE_PAR_GROUP{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}, 14){Builtin, None} .or. sh_left(lsb(get_zone_par(get_event_par(blip_note{int}, EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{int}){Builtin, None}, ZONE_PAR_HIGH_VELO{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}, 7){Builtin, None}) .or. lsb(get_zone_par(get_event_par(blip_note{int}, EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{int}){Builtin, None}, ZONE_PAR_ROOT_KEY{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None})){Builtin, None}
					end if
				end if
				fade_out(blip_note{int}, 0, 1){Builtin, None}
				w[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} := w[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int} + 5
			end while
			wait_longer{UserDefined, Call}
			inc(v[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
		end while
		wait_longer{UserDefined, Call}
		inc(u[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod MAX::CB::STACK{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	save_array_str(_zone_ids_master[((NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod 100) * 2000) + *]{int}, legato_path{string} & legato_prefixes[instrument.legato_prefix_id[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int}]{string} & "zone_ids_master.nka"){Builtin, None}
	message("resaved " & legato_path{string} & legato_prefixes[instrument.legato_prefix_id[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int}]{string} & "zone_ids_master.nka"){Builtin, None}
	save_array_str(_zone_ids_master[((NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} mod 100) * 2000) + *]{int}, legato_path{string} & legato_prefixes[instrument.legato_prefix_id[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int}]{string} & "trans_zone_ids.nka"){Builtin, None}
	message("resaved " & legato_path{string} & legato_prefixes[instrument.legato_prefix_id[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int}]{string} & "trans_zone_ids.nka"){Builtin, None}
end function

function wait_longer{thread-unsafe}
	wait(900){Builtin, None}
end function

function global_vars.reset
	init_flag{int} := 1
	global_vars.array[0]{int} := - 1
	global_vars.array[1]{int} := 1
	delay_compensation_changed{int} := 0
end function

function global_vars.load{thread-unsafe}{restricted}
	wait_async(load_array_str(global_vars.array{int[]}, global_vars.array_path{string}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
end function

function global_vars.save{restricted}
	save_array_str(global_vars.array{int[]}, global_vars.array_path{string}){Builtin, None}
end function

function options_display.open
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_options_show_meter_warning{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, global_vars.array[1]{int}){Builtin, None}
	if(delay_compensation_changed{int} = 0)
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_delay_compensation{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, global_vars.array[0]{int} - ((global_vars.array[0]{int} - 0) .and. sh_right(global_vars.array[0]{int} - 0, 31){Builtin, None})){Builtin, None}
	end if
	set_control_par(options_display{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
	btn_open_settings{int} := 1
end function

function options_display.close
	set_control_par(options_display{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}){Builtin, None}
	btn_open_settings{int} := 0
end function

function set_font_types0(control_id : int, font_array : int[])
	_i{int} := 0
	while(_i{int} <= (num_elements[font.types{int[]}] - 1)) 
		set_control_par(control_id{int}, font.types[_i{int}]{int}, font_array[_i{int}]{int}){Builtin, None}
		inc(_i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function array.copy0(original : int[], empty : int[])
	lib.i{int} := 0
	while(lib.i{int} <= (num_elements[original{int[]}] - 1)) 
		empty[lib.i{int}]{int} := original[lib.i{int}]{int}
		inc(lib.i{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function console.print0(str : string)
	set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(lbl_console{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, str{string}){Builtin, None}
	timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_console{int}){Builtin, None}, "", 2000){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
end function

function console.print1(str : int)
	set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(lbl_console{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int}, str{int}){Builtin, None}
	timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_console{int}){Builtin, None}, "", 2000){UserDefined, ParameterStack}
end function

function doubleclick_start0(ui_control : int, double_click_control : int)
	set_control_par(double_click_control{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}, get_control_par(get_ui_id(ui_control{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(double_click_control{int}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}, get_control_par(get_ui_id(ui_control{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(double_click_control{int}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}, get_control_par(get_ui_id(ui_control{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(double_click_control{int}, CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT{int}, get_control_par(get_ui_id(ui_control{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT{int}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(double_click_control{int}){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}){Builtin, None}
	double_click_control{int} := 0
	clicktime[0]{int} := get_ui_id(ui_control{int}){Builtin, None}
	clicktime[1]{int} := ENGINE_UPTIME{int}
end function

function Array::clip(x : int, b : int)
	return (x{int} + ((- x{int} .and. sh_right(x{int}, 31){Builtin, None}) + ((x{int} - b{int}) .and. sh_right(b{int} - x{int}, 31){Builtin, None})))
end function

function ndarray$dim2<-init[int](_ndarray : int[], value : int, param1 : int)
	declare local _iter1 : int {Reuses: 0}
	_iter1{int} := 0
	while(_iter1{int} <= (num_elements[_ndarray{int[]}, Array::clip(1, 2){UserDefined, ExpressionFunc}] - 1)) 
		_ndarray[(param1{int} * num_elements[_ndarray{int[]}, 2]) + _iter1{int}]{int} := value{int}
		inc(_iter1{int}){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function
